wines.nose: Very deep and elegant.
wines.palate: The palate it is powerful with notes of cherry and chocolate.
wines.appearance: Dark colour with glints of violet.

wines.name: Girard Cabernet Sauvignon, Napa Valley
wines.description: Girard Girard Winery began in 1975 as a dream of a father-son duo. The two shared a passion for high quality wines, a respect for the Valley's rich history and a pioneering spirit. 25 years later, another vintner with the same passion for winemaking and roots deep in the Napa Valley is continuing the Girard legacy.
wines.nose: Aroma of ripe, brooding and dense, the nose reveals hints of cocoa, raspberry and black plum.
wines.palate: The palate, this well-structured wine reveals red and black berry fruit, wet stone-like minerality and savory dried herbs.
wines.appearance: Dark red ruby in colour.

wines.name: Tall Dark Stranger Malbec Mendoza
wines.description: Tall Dark Stranger Are you ready to meet your total dream wine? Rich and deeply satisfying, Tall Dark Stranger never disappoints dark, juicy, smooth, and silky. Fulfill your wildest wine dreams. Sip it with something or someone – delicious
wines.nose: The nose of juicy berry and plum.
wines.palate: An intense red wine with bright berry flavors and a soft, lush texture.
wines.appearance: Deep red color.

wines.name: Vasse Felix Tom Cullity Cabernet Sauvignon Malbec
wines.description: Vasse Felix Vasse Felix is Margaret River’s founding wine estate and was established in 1967 by regional pioneer Dr.Tom Cullity.Pristine isolation, ancient lands and twin oceans make Margaret River a wine paradise and one of the world’s greatest environments to grow ultra-premium Cabernet Sauvignon and Chardonnay…
wines.nose: Rather savory to start with meaty mushroom, nori, salty sea breeze, graphite and spicy cedar notes. Opens beautifully with cherry pip, cassis, Christmas cake, orange rind.
wines.palate: The flavours is full, yet elevated and carries cherry, cassis, hints of cinotto, cedar and chocolate. It finishes juicy, while fine and dry.
wines.appearance: Deep maroon with a brick and purple tint.

wines.name: Vasse Felix Heytesbury Chardonnay
wines.description: Vasse Felix Vasse Felix is Margaret River’s founding wine estate and was established in 1967 by regional pioneer Dr.Tom Cullity.Pristine isolation, ancient lands and twin oceans make Margaret River a wine paradise and one of the world’s greatest environments to grow ultra-premium Cabernet Sauvignon and Chardonnay…
wines.nose: Exotic floral details, with white peach and grapefruit, interweaving struck match, nougat and a nutty/mealy, custard complexity.
wines.palate: The palate is bursting with a luscious lemon freshness and stone fruit power that is sustained for incredible length.
wines.appearance: Pale yellow straw.

wines.name: Vasse Felix Premier Range Cabernet Suavignon
wines.description: Vasse Felix Vasse Felix is Margaret River’s founding wine estate and was established in 1967 by regional pioneer Dr.Tom Cullity.Pristine isolation, ancient lands and twin oceans make Margaret River a wine paradise and one of the world’s greatest environments to grow ultra-premium Cabernet Sauvignon and Chardonnay…
wines.nose: Fragrance of cassis, licorice, bay leaf and violets with savoury mushroom, loamy earth, dark chocolate and dry twiggy details combining to form an alluring Cabernet bouquet.
wines.palate: The palate is compact and concentrated in flavour but well resolved in structure with a stunning silky texture at such a young age.
wines.appearance: Deep maroon with a bright ruby red hue.

wines.name: Vasse Felix Filius Chardonnay
wines.description: Vasse Felix Vasse Felix is Margaret River’s founding wine estate and was established in 1967 by regional pioneer Dr.Tom Cullity.Pristine isolation, ancient lands and twin oceans make Margaret River a wine paradise and one of the world’s greatest environments to grow ultra-premium Cabernet Sauvignon and Chardonnay…
wines.nose: Light notes of pineapple, grapefruit and crunchy nectarine.
wines.palate: Light and fine, in touch with delicate citrus flavour, a hint vanilla biscuit and a zesty polished acid tang.
wines.appearance: Bright pale straw colour.

wines.name: Henschke Hill of Grace Shiraz, Eden Valley
wines.description: Henschke The Henschke family has been making wine since 1868. Today Henschke is recognised around the world for their innovative methods, their dedication to environmentally sustainable practices, and their production of exceptional wines from outstanding vineyards. Fifth-generation winemaker Stephen and his…
wines.nose: Captivating briary blackberry and mulberry aromatics lead to alluring exotic five spice, star anise and black peppercorn, with herbaceous notes.
wines.palate: The palate has incredible length and purity, with a focussed core of blackberry and plum fruit.
wines.appearance: Very deep crimson with violet hues.

wines.name: Henschke Mount Edelstone Shiraz, Eden Valley
wines.description: Henschke The Henschke family has been making wine since 1868. Today Henschke is recognised around the world for their innovative methods, their dedication to environmentally sustainable practices, and their production of exceptional wines from outstanding vineyards. Fifth-generation winemaker Stephen and his…
wines.nose: Succulent blue fruits, blackcurrant paste, blackberry and spiced plum aromas are interwoven with savoury Dutch liquorice, sage, cracked black pepper and cedar.
wines.palate: The palate has lovely concentration, with layers of plum, blackcurrant, blackberry and liquorice, finishing fleshy and well-structured, with rolling chalky tannins.
wines.appearance: Deep rich crimson in colour.

wines.name: Henschke Cyril Henschke Cabernet Sauvignon Blended, Eden Valley
wines.description: Henschke The Henschke family has been making wine since 1868. Today Henschke is recognised around the world for their innovative methods, their dedication to environmentally sustainable practices, and their production of exceptional wines from outstanding vineyards. Fifth-generation winemaker Stephen and his…
wines.nose: aromas of cassis, black and red currants, blackberry leaf and violets with underlying savoury nuances of crushed dried herbs, cigar box.
wines.palate: A flood of rich blackberry and bright red currants greet the palate, which is precisely defined by purity of acidity, an elegant structure and layers of long, silky fine-grained tannins that provide great persistence.
wines.appearance: Deep crimson with red hues.

wines.name: Henschke Keyneton Euphonium Shiraz, Barossa Valley
wines.description: Henschke The Henschke family has been making wine since 1868. Today Henschke is recognised around the world for their innovative methods, their dedication to environmentally sustainable practices, and their production of exceptional wines from outstanding vineyards. Fifth-generation winemaker Stephen and his…
wines.nose: Enticing aromas of blackberries, mulberries and ripe plums with herbaceous notes of crushed fresh bay leaf and sage, and underlying nuances of black pepper.
wines.palate: The palate is rich and lush, with fantastic balance between concentrated blackberry, mulberry and plum fruit flavours, spicy black pepper and mocha undertones, layers of texture, velvety fine-grained tannins and great length.
wines.appearance: Very deep crimson in colour.

wines.name: Henschke Croft Chardonnay, Adelaide Hills
wines.description: Henschke The Henschke family has been making wine since 1868. Today Henschke is recognised around the world for their innovative methods, their dedication to environmentally sustainable practices, and their production of exceptional wines from outstanding vineyards. Fifth-generation winemaker Stephen and his…
wines.nose: Pure yellow pear, white peach and melon aromas, with hints of tropical fruit, clove, vanilla and creamy cashew and hazelnut.
wines.palate: A complex palate of concentrated ripe yellow pear, white peach, stone-fruit and clove spice flavours are complemented by lush, textural layers of intense ripe nectarine acidity, and extraordinary balance, for a long, clean finish.
wines.appearance: Pale gold in colour.

wines.name: Henschke Julius Riesling, Eden Valley
wines.description: Henschke The Henschke family has been making wine since 1868. Today Henschke is recognised around the world for their innovative methods, their dedication to environmentally sustainable practices, and their production of exceptional wines from outstanding vineyards. Fifth-generation winemaker Stephen and his…
wines.nose: Aromas of flowering citrus and bath salts, concentrated white currants, lemons, limes and grapefruit zest, with hints of frangipani and green peppercorns.
wines.palate: The palate is pure and bursting with ripe limes and succulent white currant flavours, with layered mineral talc-like texture and pure lines of zesty acidity for a very long, fine, dry finish.
wines.appearance: Pale straw with green/gold hues.

wines.name: Mesh Riesling, Eden Valley
wines.description: Mesh When Yalumba’s fifth generation vigneron Robert Hill Smith joined forces with Clare winemaker extraordinaire Jeffrey Grosset to create a new Eden Valley Riesling, it was clear this would be no ordinary wine. Born of occasional musings, the essence of the adventure is two of Australia's best known Riesling makers…
wines.nose: Aromas of zesty lemon and grapefruit.
wines.palate: An intense and generous palate, with lively citrus fruit and hints of talc.
wines.appearance: Green and vibrant color.

wines.name: Pewsey Vale Riesling, Eden Valley
wines.description: Pewsey Vale Pewsey Vale Vineyard’s love affair with Riesling started in 1847, when our vineyard was the first planted in the Eden Valley. A hidden utopia, our family reinvigorated Pewsey Vale Vineyard in the 1960s. The focus fell sharply on the beauty and diversity of Riesling in its many forms.
wines.nose: Intense aromas reminiscent of fine dried herbs, white flowers, lemon and lime.
wines.palate: Shows great length and depth on the palate with grapefruit and lime flavours, fresh rosemary and a hint of tropical fruit. The wine finishes with a soft natural acidity which balances the flavour intensity and a minerality.
wines.appearance: Pale straw with green hues.

wines.name: WIRRA WIRRA Scrubby Rise Shiraz
wines.description: WIRRA WIRRA Wirra Wirra is an aboriginal name meaning "amongst the gum trees". The McLaren Vale winery was established by Robert Strangways Wigley, a former state cricketer and well known eccentric. Following his death in 1924 the vineyards were sold by his family and the cellars fell into disuse. It remained that way…
wines.nose: Blackberry, plum and raspberry alongside black pepper and a hint of biscuity oak.
wines.palate: Ripe red fruits combine with plush tannins for an exceptionally approachable texture and a rich, mouth-filling quality.
wines.appearance: Bright crimson with a fuchsia rim.

wines.name: WIRRA WIRRA Scrubby Rise Sauvignon Blanc
wines.description: WIRRA WIRRA Wirra Wirra is an aboriginal name meaning "amongst the gum trees". The McLaren Vale winery was established by Robert Strangways Wigley, a former state cricketer and well known eccentric. Following his death in 1924 the vineyards were sold by his family and the cellars fell into disuse. It remained that way…
wines.nose: he nose of Passionfruit, gooseberry and citrus all leap out of the glass in a bouquet that is vibrant, fresh and varietal.
wines.palate: The palate is loaded with bright, juicy lime and passionfruit, staying clean and crisp through to a finish with satisfying freshness and length.
wines.appearance: Bright, pale and clear with green highlights color.

wines.name: WIRRA WIRRA 1894 Adelaide Cabernet Sauvignon
wines.description: WIRRA WIRRA Wirra Wirra is an aboriginal name meaning "amongst the gum trees". Following his death in 1924 the vineyards were sold by his family and the cellars fell into disuse. It remained that way…

wines.palate: The palate is bright and juicy with plum and red berry fruits.
wines.appearance: Deep plum with brilliant crimson hue.

Following his death in 1924 the vineyards were sold by his family and the cellars fell into disuse. It remained that way…

wines.palate: The palate of youthful and varietal chardonnay nectarines, white peaches and citrus fruits fill.
wines.appearance: A pale straw with green hues color.

wines.name: WIRRA WIRRA Church Block Cabernet Sauvignon Shiraz Merlot, McLaren Vale

Following his death in 1924 the vineyards were sold by his family and the cellars fell into disuse. It remained that way…

wines.palate: The palate of bright red and black fruits are framed by fine sandy tannins and fresh cedar with tannin.
wines.appearance: Deep plum with a scarlet edge color.

wines.name: WIRRA WIRRA Catapult Shiraz, McLaren Vale
wines.description: WIRRA WIRRA Wirra Wirra is an aboriginal name meaning "amongst the gum trees". The McLaren Vale winery was established by Robert Strangways Wigley, a former state cricketer and well known eccentric. Following his death in 1924 the vineyards were sold by his family and the cellars fell into disuse. It remained that way…
wines.nose: Aroma of fruit showing bright raspberry and sour cherry alongside sweet blueberry and mulberry.
wines.palate: The palate of fresh fruits are countered with dried botanicals - fennel seed and thyme, black pepper, sweet cinnamon and musky white florals.
wines.appearance: Bright and clear crimson with a fuchsia rim.

wines.name: WIRRA WIRRA RSW Shiraz, McLaren Vale
wines.description: WIRRA WIRRA Wirra Wirra is an aboriginal name meaning "amongst the gum trees". The McLaren Vale winery was established by Robert Strangways Wigley, a former state cricketer and well known eccentric. Following his death in 1924 the vineyards were sold by his family and the cellars fell into disuse. It remained that way…

wines.palate: The palate of rich fruit, dark chocolate and an underlying earthiness. The palate shows both poise and power with a combination of structural and silky tannin.
wines.appearance: Deep plum with a crimson rim.

wines.name: John Duval Eligo Shiraz, Barossa Valley
wines.description: John Duval For over 100 years our family supplied grapes to South Australia’s best winemakers. Knowledge of the vineyard handed down through five generations, allied with a 30 year career at the pinnacle of Australian winemaking, are the foundations of John Duval Wines. Each wine made from fruit sourced exclusively…
wines.nose: Concentrated black and blue fruits with hints of earth, nutmeg and spicy, savoury oak.
wines.palate: Layers of rich, silky dark fruits with some earthy savouriness, smoked meat and liquorice. A long, generous and lively palate defined by polished and persistent tannins.
wines.appearance: Dark purple red.

wines.name: John Duval Annexus Grenache, Barossa Valley
wines.description: John Duval For over 100 years our family supplied grapes to South Australia’s best winemakers. Knowledge of the vineyard handed down through five generations, allied with a 30 year career at the pinnacle of Australian winemaking, are the foundations of John Duval Wines. Each wine made from fruit sourced exclusively…

wines.palate: Medium bodied with an array of vibrant cranberry and raspberry fruit carrying impressive purity and flavour intensity. The palate is supported by a core of fresh acidity and shaped by seamless, fine tannins.
wines.appearance: Bright purple red.

wines.name: John Duval Entity Shiraz, Barossa Valley
wines.description: John Duval For over 100 years our family supplied grapes to South Australia’s best winemakers. Knowledge of the vineyard handed down through five generations, allied with a 30 year career at the pinnacle of Australian winemaking, are the foundations of John Duval Wines. Each wine made from fruit sourced exclusively…

wines.palate: Rich yet tightly packed with an array of concentrated dark fruits. The layered fruit is supported by enlivening acidity and fine, very long tannins which will enable ample cellaring potential.
wines.appearance: Deep purple red.

wines.name: John Duval Plexus Shiraz Grenache Mourvédre, Barossa Valley
wines.description: John Duval For over 100 years our family supplied grapes to South Australia’s best winemakers. Knowledge of the vineyard handed down through five generations, allied with a 30 year career at the pinnacle of Australian winemaking, are the foundations of John Duval Wines. wines.palate: Generous with good intensity of bright, plush blackberry fruit and Christmas cake character. Appealing texture with soft tannin backbone.
wines.appearance: Vibrant purple-red.

wines.name: Yalumba The Caley Cabernet Shiraz, Coonawarra and Barossa Valley
wines.description: Yalumba Established on 184, family-owned and run by Robert Hill-Smith, Yalumba has a long commitment to quality and great vision in its selection of vineyard sites, new varieties and brands. It has always been a serious player at the top end of full-bodied (and full-blooded) Australian reds, and was a pioneer in the…
wines.nose: Fruit is at the core of the bouquet, all red and black currants – overlaid with savoury herbs, green spices, cedar and pipe tobacco.
wines.palate: The palate is of sophisticated precision with a refined line. Long and textured it captures the concentrated flavours and presents them with a silken grace.
wines.appearance: Deep garnet red in colour.

wines.name: Yalumba The Menzies Cabernet Sauvignon, Coonawarra

wines.palate: The palate is rich and powerful; red fruits and dark chocolate on a robust tannin framework. The finish is long, complex and well worth contemplating. A char-grilled rib-eye on the bone is an excellent food accompaniment.
wines.appearance: Full depth in colour with a plum red hue.

It has always been a serious player at the top end of full-bodied (and full-blooded) Australian reds, and was a pioneer in the…

wines.palate: Dry,soft & plummy. black cherry, loganberry, liquorice, cherry & creamy vanilla. smooth tannins.)
wines.appearance: Beautiful darkwine

wines.name: Yalumba The Cigar Cabernet Sauvignon, Coonawarra

It has always been a serious player at the top end of full-bodied (and full-blooded) Australian reds, and was a pioneer in the…

wines.palate: The palate is vibrant with blueberries and curry leaf, balanced by choc-mint with the tannins having a mouth filling praline texture. Long and lingering the finish has the structure that Coonawarra Cabernet Sauvignon is famed for.
wines.appearance: This wine is plum red in colour and medium to full depth in hue.

wines.appearance: Crimson with violet hues

It has always been a serious player at the top end of full-bodied (and full-blooded) Australian reds, and was a pioneer in the…

wines.appearance: Medium ruby

The McLaren Vale winery was established by Robert Strangways Wigley, a former state cricketer and well known eccentric. Following his death in 1924 the vineyards were sold by his family and the cellars fell into disuse. It remained that way…
wines.nose: The nose leads with lemon and lime, adding notes of mandarin and orange blossom along the way
wines.palate: The palate is generous with fruit and pithy citrus, the wine maintains precise focus the whole length of the palate, right through to the long, mineral finish
wines.appearance: Delicate pale straw with gold and green hints

Situated in the heart of the highly acclaimed Pipers River region of northeast Tasmania Growing cool climate premium Pinot Noir.

wines.name: Little Things Cabernet Sauvignon
wines.description: Little Things A strange thing happens to winemakers at the end of a great vintage, when the wine’s been bottled, labelled and safely cellared. This wine is crafted by a group of Aussie winemakers, over many laughs, countless stories and moments that built their friendships.

wines.palate: Full flavored in the mouth, the wine lingers with plump ripe cherries and finishes with elegant silky tannins
wines.appearance: A full bodied wine showing flavors of ripe blackcurrants

wines.appearance: Intense black-cherry colour with good depth of colour and hardly any signs of evolution.

wines.name: Villa Sandi Dolce Sandi Moscato
wines.description: Villa Sandi The Enological team at Villa Sandi is dedicated to producing the best wines possible, and with the support of Riccardo. Cotarella, one of Italy’s most famous Enologists, Villa Sandi has created wines that are considered as some of the finest. wines in both Italy and the world.
wines.nose: Intensely fruity and aromatic nose with a hint of exotic fruit and orange flowers. Soft and round in the mouth with persistent agreeably fruity flavour.
wines.appearance: It has a brilliant straw yellow colour, with a fine and delicate perlage.

wines.name: Villa Sandi Pinot Grigio
wines.description: Villa Sandi The Enological team at Villa Sandi is dedicated to producing the best wines possible, and with the support of Riccardo. Cotarella, one of Italy’s most famous Enologists, Villa Sandi has created wines that are considered as some of the finest. wines in both Italy and the world.
wines.nose: Predominantly of fruit and flowery fragrances reminiscent of the countryside in Summer at haymaking time.
wines.palate: Dry, round and flavoursome taste, well-structured, with a fruity, warm and well-balanced finish.
wines.appearance: Very bright pale straw yellow.

wines.name: Villa Sandi IL Fresco Prosecco Brut DOC
wines.description: Villa Sandi The Enological team at Villa Sandi is dedicated to producing the best wines possible, and with the support of Riccardo. Cotarella, one of Italy’s most famous Enologists, Villa Sandi has created wines that are considered as some of the finest. wines in both Italy and the world.
wines.nose: The aroma is fruity and flowery with hints of ripe golden apple and small mountain flowers.
wines.palate: The dry, fresh and flavoursome sensation on the palate is followed by a fruity and harmonious aftertaste.
wines.appearance: Very pale straw yellow and fine, persistent perlage.

wines.name: Villa Sandi Il Fresco Spumante Rose
wines.description: Villa Sandi The Enological team at Villa Sandi is dedicated to producing the best wines possible, and with the support of Riccardo. Cotarella, one of Italy’s most famous Enologists, Villa Sandi has created wines that are considered as some of the finest. wines in both Italy and the world.
wines.nose: Fruity and flowery with delicate notes of unripe golden apple and small mountain flowers. Dry, fresh and zesty, with a fruity and harmonious aftertaste
wines.appearance: A wine with a bright and pale pink colour.

wines.name: Villa Sandi ORGANIC Prosecco Brut NV
wines.description: Villa Sandi The Enological team at Villa Sandi is dedicated to producing the best wines possible, and with the support of Riccardo. Cotarella, one of Italy’s most famous Enologists, Villa Sandi has created wines that are considered as some of the finest. wines in both Italy and the world.
wines.nose: glass and in the mouth. Aromas of peach, citrus, gooseberry and a touch of exotic fruit enchant the nose and the palate. The wine is particularly soft, round and harmonious, with a charming and sustained finish.
wines.appearance: It has a brilliant straw yellow colour, with a fine and delicate perlage.

wines.name: Villa Sandi Valdobbiadene Prosecco Superiore DOCG Extra Dry NV
wines.description: Villa Sandi The Enological team at Villa Sandi is dedicated to producing the best wines possible, and with the support of Riccardo. Cotarella, one of Italy’s most famous Enologists, Villa Sandi has created wines that are considered as some of the finest. wines in both Italy and the world.
wines.nose: Fresh, slightly sweetish and soft to the palate and flavoursome on the back of the tongue, an agreeably fruity and harmonious finish
wines.appearance: It has a brilliant straw yellow colour, with a fine and delicate perlage.

wines.name: Villa Sandi Asolo Superiore DOCG Prosecco
wines.description: Villa Sandi The Enological team at Villa Sandi is dedicated to producing the best wines possible, and with the support of Riccardo. Cotarella, one of Italy’s most famous Enologists, Villa Sandi has created wines that are considered as some of the finest. wines in both Italy and the world.
wines.nose: Intense and fruity. Structured and fresh, with a rich bouquet of intensely fruity aromas.Elegant and balanced finish.
wines.appearance: It has a brilliant straw yellow colour, with a fine and delicate perlage.

wines.name: Villa Sandi Valdobiaddene Prosecco DOCG Millesimato
wines.description: Villa Sandi The Enological team at Villa Sandi is dedicated to producing the best wines possible, and with the support of Riccardo. Cotarella, one of Italy’s most famous Enologists, Villa Sandi has created wines that are considered as some of the finest. wines in both Italy and the world.
wines.nose: The aroma recalls hints of rennet apple and white peach. The taste is fresh and fragrant with a particularly fruity aromatic return.
wines.appearance: It has a brilliant straw yellow colour, with a fine and delicate perlage.

wines.name: Wither Hills Single Vineyard Sauvignon Blanc
wines.nose: The palate displays Taylor River’s hallmark rich layered structure with dark brambly wild berry fruits, spice and firm tannin profile.
wines.palate: A wine that is complex and thought-provoking, this wine is great to drink now and will cellar beautifully to expose its true self.
wines.appearance: Elegant, expressive and dressed in a green-yellow coloring.

wines.name: Vin de Bordeaux Milfort
Chateau Bellevue Bordeaux
Wither Hills Single Vineyard Pinot Noir
wines.nose: The palate displays Taylor River’s hallmark rich layered structure with dark brambly wild berry fruits, spice and firm tannin profile.
wines.palate: A wine that is complex and thought-provoking, this wine is great to drink now and will cellar beautifully to expose its true self.
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red.

wines.name: Wither Hills Marlborough Sauvignon Blanc
wines.nose: Distinctly Marlborough, this Sauvignon Blanc exudes vibrant ripe citrus notes, crunchy greens and hints of tropical guava on the nose.
wines.palate: The palate is refined and elegant with superb natural fruit weight providing a juicy core of layered fruit, entwined with a salty textural acidity, vibrant citrus pith and a moreish dry chalky finish. Another remarkable Wither Hills…
wines.appearance: Elegant, expressive and dressed in a green-yellow coloring.

wines.name: Wither Hills Marlborough Pinot Noir Rose
wines.palate: The palate has great length like those hot summer days with enticing aromas of wild strawberries and cream, balanced against bright acidity.
wines.appearance: Fresh watermelon pink in colour

wines.name: Wither Hills Marlborough Pinot Noir
wines.nose: Rich brooding aromatics full of juicy dark berries and subtle earthy undertones.
wines.palate: The palate is layered with sumptuous fruit and spice bundled together with bright acidity and fine tannins. Will reward patient cellaring up to 12 years.
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red.

wines.name: Wither Hills Marlborough Pinot Gris
wines.nose: Beautifully aromatic and ‘moreish’ with layer upon layer of fresh white peach, quince, Beurre Bosc pear and subtle heart warming spice.
wines.palate: The off-dry palate is vibrant and refreshing and delivers a juicy, succulent mouth feel.
wines.appearance: Pale straw

wines.name: Wither Hills Marlborough Chardonnay
wines.nose: A vivid, stylish and elegant Chardonnay. The distinctive fruit profile of nectarine, fresh grapefruit and minerality is interlaced with the spicy, cashew nut nuances of fine grained French oak.
wines.palate: Beautifully intense and expressive.
wines.appearance: Its yellow color and golden hues

wines.name: Wither Hills Early Light Marlborough Sauvignon Blanc
wines.nose: Showcasing tropical guava and mandarin on the nose with zingy lime citrus on the palate. A refreshingly light yet flavourful sensation at 9.5% alc/vol.
wines.appearance: Elegant, expressive and dressed in a green-yellow coloring.

wines.name: Wither Hills Early Light Marlborough Rose
wines.nose: this inaugural Early Light Rose is refreshing in style with perfumed aromas of wild strawberries and fresh raspberries.
wines.appearance: Fresh watermelon pink in colour with an enticing crushed ice blue hue.

wines.name: Kendall Jackson Vintner's Reserve Riesling
wines.nose: Deliciously crisp with vibrant fruit aromas and subtle spice notes.
wines.palate: Layers of apricot, peach and Anjou pear intermingle with bursts of aromatic jasmine delivering a delightful finish to this Vintner's Reserve Riesling.
wines.appearance: Its yellow color and golden hues

wines.name: Kendall Jackson Grand Reserve Cabernet Sauvignon
wines.nose: This Cabernet has distinct flavors of blackberry, blueberry, plus both red and black currants with enticing fragrances of mocha and nutmeg.
wines.palate: Subtle notes of chocolate and toasty vanilla add to the richness and length of this bold Cab, and are accompanied by fine grained tannins on a lengthy finish
wines.appearance: A deep, impressive ruby-red color

wines.name: Kendall Jackson Grand Reserve Chardonnay
wines.nose: Lush tropical fruit intertwines with lemon,lime and floral notes.
wines.palate: Elegantly layered, this Grand Reserve Chardonnayexhibits a rich texture and firm backbone with a hint of vanilla and spice to round out the long finish.
wines.appearance: Its yellow color and golden hues

wines.name: Kendall Jackson Vintner's Reserve Cabernet Sauvignon
wines.nose: Aromas of lush, bright blackberry and cassis draw you in.
wines.palate: Round, rich, seamless tannins provide a robust backbone and supple mid-palate. Notes of cedar, vanilla and a hint of mocha linger on the finish.
wines.appearance: A deep, impressive ruby-red color

wines.name: Kendall Jackson Vintner's Reserve Chardonnay
wines.nose: No.1 selling Chardonnay in US. #28 Wine Spectator Top 100 of 2017. Pineapple, mango and papaya, with citrus notes that explode in your mouth.
wines.palate: These flavors delicately intertwine with aromas of vanilla and honey to create depth and balance throughout. A hint of toasted oak and butter rounds out the long, lingering finish.
wines.appearance: Its yellow color and golden hues

wines.name: Kendall Jackson Vintner's Reserve Pinot Noir
wines.nose: Ripe fruit flavors and a generous helping of oak spices make this full-bodied wine flavorful and east to dip.
wines.palate: It brings cinnamon and red cherry to the nose, and black cherry, cranberry and baking spices to the palate.
wines.appearance: A deep, impressive ruby-red color

wines.name: Kendall Jackson Vintner's Reserve Sauvignon Blanc
wines.nose: Luscious honeysuckle, ripe pear and fresh lemongrass intertwine in this medium-bodied Vintner's Reserve Sauvignon Blanc.
wines.palate: Hints of fresh tropical grapefruit complement the subtle mineral quality while added layers of fig and honeysuckle round out this crisp, aromatic wine.
wines.appearance: Elegant, expressive and dressed in a green-yellow coloring.

wines.name: Kendall Jackson Vintner's Reserve Zinfandel
wines.nose: Plum, raspberry jam and blackberry flavors are supported with solid chalky tannins in this Zinfandel.
wines.palate: Sultry cedar and spice accents linger on this captivating, long-finishing wine.
wines.appearance: A deep, impressive ruby-red color

wines.name: Kendall Jackson Vintner's Reserve Merlot
wines.nose: Intricate layers of black cherry, plum, currant, and wild berry mingle with a hint of spice.
wines.palate: The soft, delicate, elegant tannins of this Bordeaux varietal carry these aromas and flavors to a long, silky and lingering finish.
wines.appearance: This wine is plum-red coloring is dark and intense.

wines.name: La Crema Sonoma Coast Pinot Noir
wines.nose: This special release offers up lively pie cherry aromas that mingle with alluring cocoa, allspice and black tea notes. Flavors of pomegranate combine with red plum and orange zest to deliver a well-balanced Sonoma Coast blend.
wines.palate: Fine tannins and good concentration create a broad, supple mouthfeel that lingers well into the back palate.
wines.appearance: A deep, impressive ruby-red color

wines.name: La Crema Sonoma Coast Chardonnay
wines.nose: Aromas of MEYER LEMON, GALA APPLE, and subtle hints of OAK are followed by flavors of WHITE STONE FRUIT, YELLOW PLUM, AND HONEYDEW MELON.
wines.palate: On the palate, the wine is vibrant and concentrated with juicy acidity that drives a lingering finish
wines.appearance: Its yellow color and golden hues

wines.name: La Crema Oregon Willamette Valley Pinot Noir
wines.nose: Notes of Blackbeery, allspice and cedar are complemented by aromas of boysenberry, BING CHERRY, cocoa, and EARTH.
wines.palate: On the palate, the wine has a core of JUICY acidity and a medium body with integrated POLISHED tannins.
wines.appearance: A deep, impressive ruby-red color

wines.name: La Crema Monterey Coast Pinot Noir
wines.nose: Aromas of black plum, cherry, rhubarb and hints of earth and loam.
wines.palate: Flavors of red plum, raspberry and blood orange are underpinned by distinctive riverstone minerality and savory umami character. Plush and richly textured with juicy yet balanced acidity and integrated toasty barrel spice.
wines.appearance: A deep, impressive ruby-red color

wines.name: La Crema Monterey Coast Chardonnay
wines.nose: On the nose, meyer lemon, passionfruit, grilled pineapple and pie crust.
wines.palate: On the palate, nectarine, papaya and crisp lemon-tangerine notes are complemented by a touch of spice and complex minerality. Each sip says Monterey. Smooth and elegant. Bright and exotic. Fresh. Spicy. And just a little wild.
wines.appearance: Its yellow color and golden hues

wines.name: Murphy Goode California Cabernet Sauvignon
wines.nose: Look forward to aromas and flavors of black cherry with a hint of black licorice.
wines.palate: The finish will add notes of chocolate, vanilla, and just a touch of toast.
wines.appearance: This Cabernet Sauvignon is a great varietal expression of one of our favorite tried and true wines.

wines.name: Murphy Goode California Red Blend
wines.grape: Zinfandel, Pairc Sirah, Syrah, Tempranillo, Malbec, Petit Verdot
wines.nose: The nose kicks in with dark aromas of black cherries and blueberries while the first taste mixes things up with raspberries and Bing Cherries.
wines.palate: The mouthfeel is rich yet soft and has a nice long finish that invites you to take a second sip
wines.appearance: This Red Wine is a soft but complex blend comprised of different varietals to show off the great fruit flavors that our grapes in California contribute.

wines.name: La Gioiosa Treviso Brut (Yellow Label) Prosecco
wines.nose: Excellent aperitif to accompany savouries. Ideal with steamed shellfish. Very pale straw yellow and a fine, persistent perlage. The aroma is fruity and flowery with hints of ripe golden appie and small mountain flowers.
wines.palate: The dry, fresh and flavoursome sensation on the palate is followed by a fruity and harmonious aftertaste.
wines.appearance: Very pale straw yellow and a fine, persistent perlage.

wines.name: La Gioiosa Tradizione Europa (White Label) Prosecco
wines.nose: A fine, persistent perlage. The aroma is fruity and flowery with hints of ripe golden apple and small mountain flowers. The dry, fresh and flavorsome sensation on the palate is followed by a fruity and harmonious aftertaste.
wines.appearance: Very pale straw yellow and a fine, persistent perlage.

wines.name: La Gioiosa Rose Sparkling Italian
wines.nose: Creamy and round on the palate with cranberry and strawberry fruit and a little hint of fresh flowers and chalky stone.
wines.palate: The dry, fresh and flavoursome sensation on the palate is followed by a fruity and harmonious aftertaste.
wines.appearance: Very pale straw yellow and a fine, persistent perlage.

wines.name: La Gioiosa Organic Prosecco
wines.nose: Fruity and flowery bouquet with delicate notes of golden apple and small mountain flowers. Served chill and enjoy with white fish and steamed shellfish.
wines.palate: The dry, fresh and flavoursome sensation on the palate is followed by a fruity and harmonious aftertaste.
wines.appearance: Very pale straw yellow and a fine, persistent perlage.

wines.name: La Gioiosa Cadivo Sparkling Italian
wines.nose: This is a delicate wine with fresh apple and floral flavours.
wines.palate: It is well balanced with fine bubbles and a pleasingly dry finish. This makes the perfect aperitif.
wines.appearance: Very pale straw yellow and a fine, persistent perlage.

wines.name: La Gioiosa Cabernet Sauvignon
wines.nose: Hints of small fruits of the forest, in particular raspberry, with a flowery sensation of violets and delicate pink pepper.
wines.palate: It is dry, flavorsome, with an agreeable touch of tannin. Its fruity flavor is persistent and the finish slightly herbaceous.
wines.appearance: A deep, impressive ruby-red color

wines.name: Les Dauphins Reserve Rhone Rose
wines.nose: the palate. Delightful served well-chilled with salads, grilled fish and white meats. Gold Medal at Gilbert and Gaillard 2015.
wines.appearance: Beautiful pink wine

wines.name: Les Dauphins Reserve Rhone White
wines.nose: with a delicate fruity and floral fragrance.
wines.palate: Rich, fine flavors and a silky mouth-feel. This wine makes an ideal aperitif, or delicious with chicken wings, salads and grilled fish.
wines.appearance: Beautiful pale yellow color

wines.name: Les Dauphins Reserve Rhone Red
wines.nose: Ripe fruit fragrance, spicy with a hint of blackcurrant.
wines.palate: Elegant and aromatic with soft tannins and good freshness. Perfect accompaniment to salads, assorted cooked meats, roast dishes and cheese.
wines.appearance: A deep, impressive ruby-red color

wines.name: Jean Noel Haton Classic Brut Champagne
wines.nose: With some good bottle age, this is a soft, biscuit- and almond-flavored wine. There is a crisp edge from the grapefruit flavor underneath, making this a Champagne that’s full of character and ready to drink now.

wines.name: Whistling Duck Cabernet Merlot
wines.nose: The nose has aromas of plum fruits with underlying hints of fresh berries.
wines.palate: On the palate the wine displays red berry and plum characters. The blend makes use of the unique symmetry between the tannic weight and drive of Cabernet Sauvignon and the soft characteristics of Merlot.
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red.

wines.name: Whistling Duck Chardonnay
wines.nose: The Whistling Duck Australian Chardonnay is pale straw with lively edges encompassing a bouquet of citrus, tropical notes complemented with a hint of oak.
wines.palate: This fresh zesty wine is balanced by a creamy palate whilst exhibiting up front citrus lemon and stone fruit flavours. Enjoy with seafood or grilled polenta with wild mushrooms.
wines.appearance: Pale straw

wines.name: Whistling Duck Semillon Sauvignon Blanc
wines.nose: The blend of Sauvignon Blanc and Semillon brings the fragrant grassy notes of Sauvignon Blanc together with the citrus and tropical aromas of Semillon. The palate is soft and fresh with balanced acidity. Clean and crisp finish.
wines.palate: The palate is soft and fresh with balanced acidity. Clean and crisp finish.
wines.appearance: Light straw with fresh green hue.

wines.name: Whistling Duck Moscato
wines.nose: This lovely Moscato is fresh, fruity and crisp. A tropical spritzy palate of peach and passionfruit embraced with a gentle sweet finish. The bouquet is bright flavours of rose petal, peach and passionfruit.
wines.palate: A fruity palate with natural sweetness. Low in alcohol with a clean and gently sweet finish.
wines.appearance: It has a brilliant straw yellow colour, with a fine and delicate perlage.

wines.name: Whistling Duck Shiraz
wines.nose: South Australian Shiraz A plush Aussie Shiraz that leaves you salivating for more. Deep ruby purple it’s everything a Shiraz promises - and more.
wines.palate: Like raspberry jam in the glass the hints of white pepper.
wines.appearance: Deep ruby purple

wines.name: Pinical Estate Semillon Sauvignon Blanc
wines.nose: The bouquet of this wine has refreshing aromas of tropical fruits and grasses.
wines.palate: The light bodied palate is well balanced and offers fruity layers. It is a crisp and well-rounded wine with good acidity and a lingering finish.
wines.appearance: Its yellow color and golden hues

wines.name: Pinical Estate Shiraz
wines.nose: Vibrant with a lifted spicy fruit nose. Smooth soft tannins on the palate that integrate well.
wines.palate: A fruit flavoured finish. A fresh wine best consumed within the year. Light-medium bodied.
wines.appearance: Deep purple.

wines.name: Buxy Bourgogne Pinot Noir
wines.description: Buxy Situated in the heart of wine-growing Burgundy, the Côte Chalonnaise is ideally placed to convey every nuance of the region. Our range of Buissonnier wines is produced from selected vineyards with a long history and a reputation for their ability to reveal the specific character of each appellation.
wines.nose: This wine offers a wide palette of aromas dominated by morello cherry and red fruits.
wines.palate: A hints of smoke and leather appear. Its structure is finely balanced with harmonious tannin.
wines.appearance: Red ruby Color.

wines.name: Buxy Mâcon-Villages
wines.description: Buxy Situated in the heart of wine-growing Burgundy, the Côte Chalonnaise is ideally placed to convey every nuance of the region. Our range of Buissonnier wines is produced from selected vineyards with a long history and a reputation for their ability to reveal the specific character of each appellation.

wines.name: Ronan by Clinet Bordeaux Rouge
La Gioiosa Treviso Brut (Yellow Label) Prosecco 200ml x 2
wines.nose: Excellent aperitif to accompany savouries. Ideal with steamed shellfish. The aroma is fruity and flowery with hints of ripe golden appie and small mountain flowers.
wines.palate: The dry, fresh and flavoursome sensation on the palate is followed by a fruity and harmonious aftertaste.
wines.appearance: Very pale straw yellow and a fine, persistent perlage.

wines.name: Yellow Tail Mini Bubbles White Wine
wines.description: Yellow Tail Yellow Tail is a brand of wine produced by Casella Family Brands. Yellow Tail as well as Casella Family Brands as a whole are both based in Yenda, New South Wales, Australia, which has a population of approximately 1,400 people.
wines.nose: [yellow tail] Bubbles pops with citrus flavours and a fresh, creamy finish. The everyday celebration!
wines.palate: Crisp and zesty, with flavours of tropical and citrus fruits with a hint of florals. Enjoy with summery salads, fruit salads or gelato.
wines.appearance: Pale straw

wines.name: Yellow Tail Mini Cabernet Sauvignon 187ml
wines.description: Yellow Tail Yellow Tail is a brand of wine produced by Casella Family Brands. Yellow Tail as well as Casella Family Brands as a whole are both based in Yenda, New South Wales, Australia, which has a population of approximately 1,400 people.
wines.nose: A fragrant aroma of red fruits and blackcurrants fill the nose, along with blackberries and sweet mocha.
wines.palate: Classic and velvety, with notes of juicy blackcurrants, sweet mocha and spice
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red.

wines.name: Yellow Tail Mini Chardonnay 187ml
wines.description: Yellow Tail Yellow Tail is a brand of wine produced by Casella Family Brands. Yellow Tail as well as Casella Family Brands as a whole are both based in Yenda, New South Wales, Australia, which has a population of approximately 1,400 people.
wines.nose: Aromas of melon and white peach fill the nose, with a light spice and vanilla undertone
wines.palate: Rich and vibrant, with fresh peach and melon flavours and a hint of vanilla.
wines.appearance: Medium golden yellow

wines.name: Yellow Tail Mini Merlot 187ml
wines.description: Yellow Tail Yellow Tail is a brand of wine produced by Casella Family Brands. Yellow Tail as well as Casella Family Brands as a whole are both based in Yenda, New South Wales, Australia, which has a population of approximately 1,400 people.
wines.nose: Soft aromas of ripe plums, mulberries, lingering vanilla and the sweet spiciness of Christmas cake.
wines.palate: Soft and smooth, with notes of dark plum, mulberries and subtle spice
wines.appearance: Pale ruby red laced with garnet hues

wines.name: Yellow Tail Mini Shiraz 187ml
wines.description: Yellow Tail Yellow Tail is a brand of wine produced by Casella Family Brands. Yellow Tail as well as Casella Family Brands as a whole are both based in Yenda, New South Wales, Australia, which has a population of approximately 1,400 people.
wines.nose: Concentrated red berry fruit is complemented by subtle liquorice and blueberry notes and subtle spice derived from the oak.
wines.palate: Soft and juicy on the palate, flavours of cherry and blackberry provide for a long and delicious finish.
wines.appearance: A youthful and vibrant red wine.

wines.name: Marques de Riscal Reserva Rioja XR
wines.description: Marqués de Riscal Marqués de Riscal is one of the oldest Rioja wineries. Founded in Elciego (Álava) in 1858 by Guillermo Hurtado de Amézaga, from the outset it has been a point of reference in the winemaking business at both national and international level. Throughout its history, Marqués de Riscal has always been an…
wines.nose: Very expressive aromas on the nose with notes of liquorice, cinnamon and black pepper, with just a subtle hint of the long cask-ageing, thanks to its great complexity and ripe, concentrated fruit.
wines.palate: Fresh and easy to drink on the palate, good backbone and lovely, polished tannins. The long, persistent finish leaves gentle balsamic reminders of the finest quality.
wines.appearance: Intense black-cherry colour with good depth of colour and hardly any signs of evolution.

wines.name: Villa Sandi Auris Brut N.V.
wines.description: Villa Sandi The Enological team at Villa Sandi is dedicated to producing the best wines possible, and with the support of Riccardo. Cotarella, one of Italy’s most famous Enologists, Villa Sandi has created wines that are considered as some of the finest. wines in both Italy and the world.
wines.nose: Once you pop the cork of Villa Sandi Auris' golden bottle, its delicate bubbles come alive streaming up your glass, while its fruity and flowery aromas are released from the glass . It is dry, crisp and fruity with hints of golden apple…
wines.appearance: It has a brilliant straw yellow colour, with a fine and delicate perlage.

wines.name: Villa Sandi Cabernet Sauvignon
wines.description: Villa Sandi The Enological team at Villa Sandi is dedicated to producing the best wines possible, and with the support of Riccardo. Cotarella, one of Italy’s most famous Enologists, Villa Sandi has created wines that are considered as some of the finest. wines in both Italy and the world.
wines.nose: Hints of small fruits of the forest, in particular raspberry with a flowery sensation of violets and delicate pink pepper. Dry, flavorsome, with an agreeable touch of tannin. Persistent fruity flavor and slight herbaceous finish.
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red.

wines.name: Villa Sandi Chardonnay
wines.description: Villa Sandi The Enological team at Villa Sandi is dedicated to producing the best wines possible, and with the support of Riccardo. Cotarella, one of Italy’s most famous Enologists, Villa Sandi has created wines that are considered as some of the finest. wines in both Italy and the world.
wines.nose: Fruity and flowery aroma with a predominance of golden apple and tuberose flowers. Fresh, lively and smooth. Well-structured with a slightly bitter aftertaste
wines.appearance: It has a brilliant straw yellow colour, with a fine and delicate perlage.

wines.name: Villa Sandi Il Fresco Millesimato Prosecco
wines.description: Villa Sandi The Enological team at Villa Sandi is dedicated to producing the best wines possible, and with the support of Riccardo. Cotarella, one of Italy’s most famous Enologists, Villa Sandi has created wines that are considered as some of the finest. wines in both Italy and the world.
wines.nose: Villa Sandi and its exquisite 16th Centry Palladian-style villa sits in the heart of the Prosecco area at the foot of the Valdobbiadene Prosecco DOCG hills just over an hours drive from Venice. This Villa Sandi Il Fresco Vintage Prosecco…
wines.appearance: It has a brilliant straw yellow colour, with a fine and delicate perlage.

wines.name: Villa Sandi Merlot
wines.description: Villa Sandi The Enological team at Villa Sandi is dedicated to producing the best wines possible, and with the support of Riccardo. Cotarella, one of Italy’s most famous Enologists, Villa Sandi has created wines that are considered as some of the finest. wines in both Italy and the world.
wines.nose: Markedly fruity with a predominance of blackberry, but also small red berries. Agreeable flowery hint of rose with a delicate pepper nuance. Dry and persistently flavorsome. Notable round tannins and a warm, pleasantly bitter aftertaste.
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red.

wines.description: Aviary Estate Shiraz

wines.name: Aviary Estate Cabernet Merlot
wines.description: Aviary Estate Cabernet Merlot

wines.grape: Quinta de Roriz Quinta da Perdiz
wines.description: Prats & Symington The Symington family aimed to ally its extensive knowledge of the different Douro terroirs and grape varieties to the experience of Bruno PRATS in the Bordeaux region so that together they could produce wine from the best grapes grown on the best plots on the best estates.
wines.nose: Fresh, plummy fruit aromas rise out of the glass. Quite herbal and spicy, with a slight scent of eucalyptus.
wines.palate: Taught and compact fruit on the palate, displaying black cherries and peppery tannins. Ends on a note of spice. Will benefit from cellaring for between 6 and 12 months.
wines.appearance: Deep garnet colour.

wines.name: Chappellet Pritchard Hill Cabernet Sauvignon (2019)
wines.description: Chappellet Pritchard Hill Cabernet Sauvignon 2019 is a red wine from Napa Valley, USA, made from 90% Cabernet Sauvignon, 10% Petit Verdot.
wines.nose: This wine displays depth and complexity. Pure, intense aromas of blackberry, cassis, perfumed violets, graphite and macerated berry skins leap from the glass, followed by layers of anise, vanilla, clove and chocolate
wines.palate: The luxurious dark berry and spice notes continue on the
wines.appearance: Elegant and classy deep ruby
wines.pairing: Barbecue, Best served with all types of classic meat dishes, Burgers, game

wines.name: Chappellet Pritchard Hill Cabernet Sauvignon (2018)
wines.description: Chappellet Pritchard Hill Cabernet Sauvignon 2018 is a red wine from Napa Valley, USA, made from 90% Cabernet Sauvignon, 10% Petit Verdot.
wines.nose: This wine displays depth and complexity. Pure, intense aromas of blackberry, cassis, perfumed violets, graphite and macerated berry skins leap from the glass, followed by layers of anise, vanilla, clove and chocolate
wines.palate: The luxurious dark berry and spice notes continue on the
wines.appearance: Elegant and classy deep ruby
wines.pairing: Barbecue, Best served with all types of classic meat dishes, Burgers, game

wines.name: Tohu Marewa Single Vineyard Sauvignon Blanc
wines.description: Tohu Marewa Single Vineyard Sauvignon Blanc 2024 is a white wine from Marlborough, New Zealand, made from Sauvignon Blanc.
wines.nose: It exhibits a refined bouquet with subtle layers of nettle, red capsicum and tropical pineapple aromas
wines.palate: Concentrated and textural with stonefruit, zesty citrus, blackcurrant leaf, supported by subtle French oak. Bright, pure and long finish with refined minerality. A vibrant yet layered Single Vineyard Sauvignon Blanc with lifted aromatics…
wines.appearance: Pale straw/gold with brilliant green shades
wines.pairing: creamy mouthfeel makes it highly food-friendly. It pairs excellently with versatile seafood dishes, creamy soft cheeses, Its textured, or poultry. Additional information

wines.name: Tenuta Luce Brunello di Montalcino DOCG
wines.description: Tenuta Luce Brunello di Montalcino DOCG 2020 is a red wine from Montalcino, Italy, made from Sangiovese.
wines.nose: The bouquet is multifaceted and complex, with red berryfruit melding into sweet violets and smooth spices
wines.palate: It boasts a full bodied, vibrant
wines.appearance: The
wines.pairing: It pairs with structured dishes like prime rib, or lamb ragout., roast duck, venison

wines.name: Masseria Trajone Primitivo Sussumaniello Puglia IGP
wines.description: Masseria Trajone Primitivo Sussumaniello Puglia IGP 2024 is a red wine from Puglia, Italy, made from Primitivo and Susumaniello.
wines.nose: The
wines.palate: Powerful yet well-balanced with a creamy, enveloping mouthfeel. It displays dark fruit jam flavors integrated with silky tannins. AGEING The wine primarily matures in stainless steel tanks
wines.appearance: Dense ruby red
wines.pairing: grilled lamb or medium-aged cheeses., It pairs exceptionally well with rich Italian cuisine such as lasagna, Risotto

wines.grape: Cabernet Franc, Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Petit Verdot
wines.description: Le Serre Nuove dell’Ornellaia Bolgheri DOC (1500ml) is a red wine from Bolgheri, Italy, added from the current Vinum Lector portfolio.

wines.grape: Cabernet Franc, Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Petit Verdot
wines.description: Le Serre Nuove dell’Ornellaia Bolgheri DOC (1500ml) is a red wine from Bolgheri, Italy, added from the current Vinum Lector portfolio.

wines.name: Héritage de Chasse-Spleen, Haut-Médoc AOC
wines.grape: Cabernet Franc, Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Petit Verdot
wines.description: Héritage de Chasse-Spleen, Haut-Médoc AOC 2021 is a red wine from Haut Médoc, France, made from 50% Merlot, 40% Cabernet Sauvignon, 8% Cabernet Franc, 2% Petit Verdot.
wines.nose: The
wines.palate: A medium-bodied red with a frank attack, characterized by fine tannins, good acidity, and flavors of cherry and plum. AGEING 12 to 14 months in 5% new oak barrels
wines.appearance: Clear and brilliant, dark garnet-red colour
wines.pairing: It harmonizes well with robust dishes such as beef, or hearty casseroles like veal onion or pumpkin., venison

wines.name: Seigneur d’Aupenac Saint-Chinian AOP
wines.description: Seigneur d'Aupenac Saint-Chinian AOP 2022 is a red wine from Saint-Chinian, France, made from Syrah, Grenache and Carignan.
wines.nose: Aromas of red and black fruits (raspberry, blackberry) and spicy notes of pepper and licorice
wines.palate: On the
wines.appearance: Intense ruby color with purple highlights
wines.pairing: herb-battered lamb, or mature cheeses like Roquefort and Comté. It also pairs well with dishes such as porcini risotto or grilled vegetables., Perfect with roast duck

wines.name: Tempo d’Angelus Bordeaux AOC by Château Angelus GCC
wines.description: Tempo d'Angelus Bordeaux AOC by Château Angelus GCC is a red wine from Saint-Émilion, France, added from the current Vinum Lector portfolio.

wines.name: Château Tour de Pez, Saint-Estèphe Cru Bourgeois
wines.description: Château Tour de Pez, Saint-Estèphe Cru Bourgeois 2018 is a red wine from Saint-Estèphe, France, made from 66% Merlot, 25% Cabernet Sauvignon, 9% Cabernet Franc.
wines.nose: Aromas of fresh red fruit prevail, thanks to a dominant proportion of Merlot
wines.palate: Delicately full and round in the mouth with tannins of great finesse that confer charm and grace. The balance is impeccable in this wine of pure pleasure that reveals a delightfully juicy and superbly silky finish. AGEING The wine was aged…

wines.description: Château Cantemerle, Haut Médoc Grand Cru Classé AOC 2021 is a red wine from Haut Médoc, France, made from 50% Cabernet Sauvignon, 30% Merlot, 15% Cabernet Franc, 5% Petit Verdot.
wines.nose: The 2013 Cantemerle has still an austere, tobacco-tinged, tertiary bouquet, discreet, with aromas of cinnamon, blackberry, fig and wood notes more evident after agitation; decanting will bring out still other aromas
wines.palate: Elegant, with a focus on fresh red and black currant fruit, vibrant acidity, and soft, fine tannins. AGEING Ageing for 12 months in French oak barrels (of medium toast) which 40% are new
wines.appearance: Superbly deep ruby color
