wines.name: Buglioni (I’m)Perfetto Valpolicella Classico Superiore DOC
wines.description: Buglioni (I’m)Perfetto Valpolicella Classico Superiore DOC is a vivid, expressive Valpolicella that showcases the purity and charm of its historic terroir. This certified organic wine is made from 100% estate fruit from Buglioni’s vineyards in Valpolicella Classico. The name “(I’M)Perfetto” itself tells a story…
wines.nose: Distinct and elegant aromas of ripe red fruit and black cherry, with scents of spices and vanilla
wines.palate: Peculiar notes of ripe red fruit in a dry red wine, which cuddles and fills the mouth. It is rounded, velvety, and harmonic, offering a mouth-filling and soft experience with velvety tannins and a harmonic structure
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red color
wines.pairing: cured meats, grilled red meats and lamb. Unmissable with fresh pasta with tomato sauce. Try with spicy vegetable couscous or chicken curry., porcini dishes

wines.name: Buglioni Gabriella Lugana DOC
wines.description: Buglioni Gabriella Lugana DOC is an exquisite Italian white wine, celebrated for its vibrant freshness and profound minerality. Hailing from the unique terroir of Lugana, nestled on the southern shores of Lake Garda, this wine is crafted from 100% Trebbiano di Lugana grapes, locally known as Turbiana. It offers a…
wines.nose: Intense aroma, rich with notes of flowers, cherry blossoms, and fruity hints of citrus, complemented by delicate almond undertones
wines.palate: Good structure and lively acidity with delicate mineral undertones. The palate offers a full, round texture, leaving a pleasant mouthfeel with hints of stone fruit before a fresh finish
wines.appearance: Straw yellow colour with green shimmers
wines.pairing: Light appetizers and soft cheeses. Elegant with grilled fish, sea bass and amberjack in primis. Excellent with seafood starters including soups and spaghetti with clams.

wines.name: Dezzani 8 Bucce Piemonte Rosso DOC
wines.grape: Albarossa, Barbera, Bonarda, Cabernet, Dolcetto, Freisa, Merlot, Syrah
wines.description: Dezzani 8 Bucce Piemonte Rosso DOC is a unique and masterful blend that celebrates the “eight skins” (8 Bucce) of its diverse grape varieties. This wine embodies Dezzani’s philosophy, merging tradition with modernity by harmoniously combining native Piedmontese grapes with international varietals to create a…
wines.nose: The aroma is full and harmonious, with pleasant and delicate notes of red fruits, vanilla, and spices
wines.palate: On the palate, it is balanced and elegant, with a pleasant vinous finish. It offers a smooth, medium-bodied experience with generous layers of dark red fruit
wines.pairing: and light pasta dishes. Perfect as a by the glass wine., barbecued meats, Charcuterie, Excellent aperitif wine

wines.name: Dezzani 4 Bucce Piemonte Bianco DOC
wines.description: Dezzani 4 Bucce Piemonte Bianco DOC is a unique and captivating white wine, masterfully crafted from a blend of four distinct grape varieties: Cortese, Chardonnay, Sauvignon, and Timorasso. This thoughtful combination marries native Piedmontese varietals with international selections, resulting in a wine of…
wines.nose: This wine reveals deep and persistent scents, showcasing delightful floral and fruity aromas
wines.palate: The notes perceived on the nose are beautifully enriched by mineral and flint tones on the palate. It is medium-bodied, structured, and compact, offering a long-lasting finish
wines.appearance: Exhibits an intense straw yellow color
wines.pairing: and white meat dishes. It also makes an excellent choice as an aperitif and a great by the glass white wine., Elegant and versatile, fresh cheeses, it pairs beautifully with…

wines.name: Domaine Dutron & Fils Pouilly-Fuissé 1er Cru ‘Les Perrières’
wines.description: Domaine Dutron & Fils Pouilly-Fuissé 1er Cru ‘Les Perrières’ is an exquisite white Burgundy, a testament to generations of winemaking excellence from a renowned Pouilly-Fuissé 1er Cru climat. Crafted with dedication to sustainable farming, this wine showcases the exceptional potential of its unique terroir.
wines.nose: On the nose it is elegant and delicate, releasing aromas of fresh almond, buttery brioche and white flowers
wines.palate: The attack is supple and buttery. The midpalate is both mineral and toasty and packed with hazelnut and grilled almond flavours. The overall impression is one of refinement with good tension
wines.pairing: It is particularly good with fine shellfish and white meats in a creamy sauce.

wines.name: Domaine Dutron & Fils Pouilly-Fuissé ‘Les Vignes du Château’
wines.description: Domaine Dutron & Fils Pouilly-Fuissé ‘Les Vignes du Château’ is an exquisite dry white wine from Burgundy, France, crafted by a family with a winemaking legacy dating back to 1835. This particular cuvée is a testament to its historic origins, blended from grapes grown on ancient 13th-century plots with vines averaging…
wines.nose: Very open on the nose and expresses notes of hawthorn, acacia blossom and citrus fruit, entwined with a light touch of spice
wines.palate: The attack is crisp, with good acidity, but it develops gradually to give the impression of fullness. It shows pronounced notes of candied citrus fruit and zesty mineral finish
wines.pairing: as well as white meats in a creamy sauce., but also pairs well with shellfish and fish, It makes a perfect aperitif wine

wines.name: Domaine Dutron & Fils Saint-Véran ‘A la Côte’
wines.description: Domaine Dutron & Fils Saint-Véran ‘A la Côte’ is a brilliant expression of Mâconnais Chardonnay, crafted by a family with a winemaking legacy stretching back to 1835. This exceptional white wine hails from some of the Saint-Véran appellation’s highest-lying vineyards, reaching up to 500 meters, where rich…
wines.nose: On the nose, it is very lightly spiced, with some candied fruit notes against a mineral backdrop
wines.palate: The attack is crisp but gives way to a very smooth mid-palate with hints of lemon and fresh hazelnuts. The finish is crisp and long
wines.pairing: Comté or Bleu de Bresse., seafood or even strong cheeses such as Beaufort, This Saint-Véran is perfect served with fish

wines.name: Maison Dutron Mâcon-Fuissé
wines.description: Maison Dutron Mâcon-Fuissé is a captivating white Burgundy wine, meticulously crafted from 100% Chardonnay grapes. It embodies the vibrant spirit of the Mâcon-Fuissé appellation, offering a unique blend of aromatic intensity and refreshing crispness. This wine stands out for its elegant balance and distinctive…
wines.nose: Its nose, of great intensity, is open, with floral and fruity notes, fresh and fine
wines.palate: The attack
wines.pairing: appetizers, but also pairs nicely with shellfish, cold meats, fish and goat’s cheeses.

wines.name: Marcel Pierre Champagne Brut
wines.description: Marcel Pierre Champagne Brut is a tantalizing and traditionally crafted Champagne, born from the esteemed terroir of Épernay. This delicate and smooth sparkling wine offers a bright and fresh style, renowned for its exceptional balance and length.
wines.nose: The nose is expressive, revealing enchanting aromas of white flowers, vibrant citrus, and crisp green apples, complemented by a delightful creaminess and hints of yeast and toasted brioche
wines.palate: Light and crisp on the palate, this Champagne delivers pleasant acidity and a distinct minerality. The finish is dry, long, and smooth, leaving a subtle hint of toastiness
wines.appearance: A beautiful straw colour with a fine, persistent bead
wines.pairing: from a very casual gathering to a special celebration. Perfect with seared scallops or fig and goat cheese crostini., Ideal for any occasion

wines.name: Kalfu Molu Pinot Noir
wines.description: Kalfu Molu Pinot Noir is a beautifully crafted expression of cool-climate Chilean winemaking, showcasing the unique influence of the Pacific Ocean on the Casablanca Valley. Its name, “Kalfu,” meaning “blue” in Mapudungun, reflects the deep blue of the ocean and the expansive sky, while “Molu” signifies “west” or…
wines.nose: Fruity and expressive, it reveals delightful cherry and raspberry notes, complemented by a soft spicy character and a vanilla touch from oak ageing
wines.palate: Soft and mouthwatering, with prominent red berry flavors, leading to vanilla and cinnamon hints in the long and clean aftertaste
wines.pairing: Pairs well with pastas and white meat.

wines.name: Kalfu Molu Sauvignon Blanc
wines.description: Kalfu Molu Sauvignon Blanc is a vibrant and expressive white wine from Chile’s renowned Casablanca Valley, a cool-climate region perfectly suited for this varietal. This wine, part of Kalfu’s esteemed Reserva range, embodies the essence of its coastal origin, with “Kalfu” meaning “blue” in Mapudungun, reflecting the…
wines.nose: Fresh and expressive, revealing a delightful mix of citrus and tropical fruit aromas such as lime, grapefruit, pineapple, and water pear. Hints of green apple, white peach, subtle gooseberry, and a touch of passionfruit add layers of…
wines.palate: The palate is invigorated by vibrant acidity, maintaining the characteristic freshness of the variety. Citrus fruits reappear prominently, harmonizing with nuances of green apple, white peach, and tropical passionfruit, all leading to a…
wines.pairing: accompany salads, ceviche and fish., Ideal as an aperitif, Seafood

wines.name: Kalfu Molu Chardonnay
wines.description: Kalfu Molu Chardonnay is an elegant and expressive wine, renowned for its vibrant tropical fruit aromas and a beautifully balanced palate that is both concentrated and fresh. Hailing from Chile’s celebrated cool-climate Casablanca Valley, this Chardonnay benefits from the region’s unique terroir, where morning mists…
wines.nose: With good tipicity it brings aromas of pineapple, papaya and mango, complemented with gentle notes of vanilla and dry fruits
wines.palate: A well-rounded wine with good volume, a concentrated palate but fresh at the same time where vanilla and tropical fruit flavors intermingle. Long and clean finish
wines.pairing: Ideal to accompany fatty fish, pasta and white meats.

wines.name: Moser Weine Terra Austria Grande Reserve
wines.description: Moser Weine Terra Austria Grande Reserve is a prestigious red cuvée, a true ‘Grande Reserve’ that embodies the philosophy that quality takes time and space. It’s a selection of reserve wines, potentially undergoing light barrique aging, crafted to reflect the unique typicity of the Gols winegrowing region in…
wines.nose: This outstanding red wine opens with the refreshing fragrance that mirrors the region of blackcurrant, licorice and mint
wines.palate: The opulent nose of this full-bodied wine gives way to a fruity palate enriched with the flavor of raspberry, cherry, strawberry and plum
wines.pairing: Best with smoked pulled pork, mature cheeses., roast, steaks and strong

wines.name: Moser Weine Variety Austria St. Laurent
wines.description: Moser Weine Variety Austria St. Laurent is a captivating red wine known for its deep ruby hue, aromatic complexity, and elegant structure, often drawing comparisons to Pinot Noir. This wine offers a finessed and full-bodied style, showcasing the unique character of the St. Laurent grape.
wines.nose: Loaded with aromas of blackberry, followed by flavors of ripened cherry, strawberries, peppercorn with a smoky spice tinge
wines.palate: Fruity, velvety-dry, full-bodied. Pleasant tannin with aromas of sour cherry and currant on the palate
wines.pairing: dark meat and mushroom dishes. Best with duck., Goes perfectly with game

wines.name: Moser Weine Variety Austria Zweigelt Heideboden Neusiedlersee DAC
wines.description: Moser Weine Variety Austria Zweigelt Heideboden Neusiedlersee DAC is a vibrant and characterful expression of Austria’s most planted red grape, Zweigelt, hailing from the prestigious Neusiedlersee DAC region. This wine embodies the unique terroir of the Heideboden, where warm, permeable black earth soils contribute to…
wines.nose: Delicate red cherry fruit, a hint of plum, fine nuances of tobacco and herbs
wines.palate: Youthful red and black fruits with medium body, fine tannins, subtle sweetness on the finish, already well developed
wines.pairing: Best with venison and heavy beef menus, mature cheeses.

wines.name: Moser Weine Pure Austria Blauburgunder
wines.description: Moser Weine Pure Austria Blauburgunder is an elegant expression of Pinot Noir from Austria’s Burgenland region, crafted with a philosophy that emphasizes quality, time, and space. This wine is part of the “Pure Austria” line, known for its uncomplicated, fresh, and traditionally cultivated wines that beautifully…
wines.nose: On the nose, delicate cherry fruits with a hint of strawberry
wines.palate: On the palate, a sweet texture and fully ripe cherries, leading to a soft finish
wines.appearance: Medium ruby garnet
wines.pairing: Best with Asia cuisine, in particular noodles or also pasta in light and spiced sauces.

wines.name: Moser Weine Pure Austria Blaufränkisch
wines.description: Moser Weine Pure Austria Blaufränkisch is an expressive and pure representation of Austria’s flagship red grape, crafted as part of the “Pure Austria” line which focuses on uncomplicated, fresh, and traditionally cultivated wines with a beautiful interplay of varietal character and vibrant fruit. This wine embodies…
wines.nose: Earthy, herbal, peppery aromas of bramble berry, dark chocolate and blueberry
wines.palate: Racy and subtly tannin-rich with a well-structured, strong body. Fine acidity with delicate tartness and a dry finish
wines.pairing: dark meat and cheese., Goes perfectly with game and game poultry

wines.name: Moser Weine Pure Austria Grüner Veltliner
wines.description: Moser Weine Pure Austria Grüner Veltliner is an uncomplicated, fresh, and classically produced wine, showcasing a beautiful interplay of varietal character and vibrant fruit. This wine embodies the Moser Weine philosophy, where quality is given the time and space it deserves.
wines.palate: The fresh aromas are complemented by delightful notes of apricot on the palate, which also features a lively acidity and the characteristic spiciness typical of the Grüner Veltliner grape variety, often presenting hints of white pepper
wines.pairing: Best with roast pork, deep-fried meats and fish, light cheeses.

wines.name: Andeluna 1300 Malbec (375ml)
wines.description: Andeluna 1300 Malbec is a celebrated red wine that embodies the rich viticultural tradition of Argentina, known for producing exceptional Malbec.
wines.nose: Aromas of ripe black fruits, such as blackberry and plum, intertwined with floral notes of violet and subtle hints of spice and tobacco
wines.palate: Full-bodied with well-structured tannins and flavors of ripe blackberries, cherries, and a hint of chocolate and espresso on the finish, providing depth and complexity
wines.appearance: Deeply colored with a rich, dark violet hue

wines.name: Hermanos Hernáiz Las Cenizas Rioja DOCa
wines.description: Hermanos Hernáiz Las Cenizas Rioja DOCa is an exceptional village wine from Cenicero in the heart of Rioja Alta, crafted by Hermanos Hernáiz to embody the elegance and classicism of fine Rioja wines. This luscious and voluptuous red is a testament to the producer’s dedication to their unique terroir and sustainable…
wines.nose: A captivating bouquet of dark cherries, blackberries, and plums intertwines with nuanced notes of cedar, milk chocolate, cocoa beans, and subtle spices. Hints of morello cherry, black currant, dark chocolate, black tea, and gingerbread…
wines.palate: Dense, full-bodied, and flavorful on the palate, this wine boasts well-integrated and firm tannins, leading to a pleasant, lingering finish. It offers a fleshy, creamy texture with a rich, almost buttery character, presenting a wonderfully…
wines.pairing: Chorizo, Grilled Vegetables, Manchego Cheese, Paella

wines.name: Pirovano Collezione Costantino Nero D’Avola Sicilia DOC
wines.description: Pirovano Collezione Costantino Nero D’Avola Sicilia DOC is a distinguished red wine that pays tribute to the essence of Sicily, one of the most emblematic and ancient regions of Italian viticulture. This wine, part of the Collezione Costantino, celebrates a rich family legacy and highlights the vibrant qualities of…
wines.nose: Very intense and complex, with pronounced hints of dark cherry, plum, and blackberry, intertwined with notes of undergrowth, spicy nuances, licorice, and a subtle touch of cocoa
wines.palate: Dry, rounded, and full-bodied on the palate, it reveals velvety tannins and a good mineral strength that supports an excellent structure, leading to a lingering and unexpectedly fresh finish
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red with captivating purple hints
wines.pairing: Aged Cheese, Grilled Meats, Pasta, Pizza

wines.name: Château Quintus, Saint-Émilion Grand Cru AOC
wines.description: Château Quintus, Saint-Émilion Grand Cru AOC is a distinguished red wine from the renowned Saint-Émilion region, embodying the exceptional winemaking expertise of Domaine Clarence Dillon, proprietors of the esteemed Château Haut-Brion. Named “Quintus” as a nod to both its status as the fifth Bordeaux wine in their…
wines.palate: The palate offers a broad and fleshy attack, leading to a remarkably caressing sensation that evolves into a full-bodied wine with smooth, fine-grained tannins mid-palate. Flavors of plum, black cherry, and raspberry intertwine with…

wines.name: Brio de Cantenac Brown, Margaux AOC
wines.grape: Cabernet Franc, Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Petit Verdot
wines.description: Brio de Cantenac Brown, Margaux AOC is the elegant second wine of the esteemed Château Cantenac Brown, a Third Growth in the historic 1855 Bordeaux Classification. Crafted with the same dedication to quality and tradition as its Grand Vin, it offers a glimpse into the estate’s artistry and the quintessential Margaux…
wines.nose: The nose is aromatic, revealing an inviting medley of red and black fruit aromas, including red currants, blackberries, and plums, beautifully intertwined with delicate floral notes, bramble, wild herbs, and a hint of cedar and wood spice
wines.palate: On the palate, the wine is well-balanced and rounded, offering a fresh, elegant, and rich taste with a burst of succulent red cherry fruit, cassis, and plum. It features silky, fine tannins, bright acidity, and a touch of vanilla from oak…
wines.appearance: A deep ruby red with inviting purple hints

wines.name: Pichon Comtesse Réserve, Pauillac AOC
wines.description: Pichon Comtesse Réserve, Pauillac AOC is the distinguished second wine of Château Pichon Longueville Comtesse de Lalande, a renowned Second Growth estate in Bordeaux’s prestigious 1855 classification, often lauded as a “Super Second”. It serves as a superb introduction to the Grand Vin’s unique style, embodying the…
wines.nose: The nose reveals a complex bouquet of ripe black and blue fruits, including blackcurrants, black raspberries, and plums, intertwined with elegant notes of cedar, pencil lead, and tobacco. Hints of licorice, wild roses, violets, and a touch…
wines.palate: On the palate, this wine is rich, full-bodied, and velvety, delivering an abundance of juicy red fruits. It is elegantly structured with fine-grained, pliant tannins, balanced by a lovely freshness and a subtle earthiness. The finish is…
wines.appearance: A captivating deep ruby red, beautifully accented with alluring purple hints

wines.name: Fleur de Pédesclaux, Pauillac AOC
wines.description: Fleur de Pédesclaux, Pauillac AOC is the elegant second wine from the esteemed Château Pédesclaux, offering a more approachable and vibrant expression of the prestigious Pauillac terroir. Known for its sophisticated structure and youthful charm, this wine presents an unusual softness for a Pauillac, making it both…
wines.nose: A powerful and captivating nose reveals ripe blackcurrant, blackberry, and plum, intertwined with notes of cedar, graphite, and subtle spice. Delicate hints of white flowers, violets, and fresh red berries add complexity, sometimes with a…
wines.palate: The palate offers a fresh, delicate, and juicy attack, with a medium body and beautifully integrated, silky tannins. Flavors of dark fruit, chocolate, and a hint of earthiness are balanced by lively acidity and a well-integrated oak…
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red with alluring purple hints

wines.name: Domaine Patrick Pestre Les Plantes Au Baron Nuits-Saint-Georges
wines.description: Domaine Patrick Pestre Les Plantes Au Baron Nuits-Saint-Georges is a quintessential red Burgundy from the esteemed Côte de Nuits, crafted by an estate dedicated to organic cultivation, shunning pesticides, herbicides, and insecticides. This wine embodies the unique complexity and depth derived from…
wines.palate: A silky texture on the palate, revealing a delicate balance between acidity and roundness, with a fine and elegant structure, expressive of its rich red and black fruit character, subtle spices, and melted tannins
wines.pairing: Duck, Game Birds, Mushroom Dishes, Roasted Poultry

wines.name: Domaine Patrick Pestre Pommard
wines.description: Domaine Patrick Pestre Pommard is a quintessential expression of Burgundy’s renowned Pommard appellation, celebrated for its robust and structured red wines. Produced by Domaine Patrick Pestre, a winery committed to organic cultivation methods, this wine embodies the unique terroir of its origin.
wines.palate: On the palate, this wine presents a firm yet delicate structure, a fruit-filled mouth, and chewy tannins that soften beautifully with age. It is known for its powerful, structured, and fleshy character, offering remarkable complexity and…
wines.pairing: Duck, Game Birds, Mushroom Dishes, Roasted Poultry

wines.name: Domaine Patrick Pestre Pernand-Vergelesses Pinot Noir
wines.description: Domaine Patrick Pestre Pernand-Vergelesses Pinot Noir is a wine of classic Burgundy elegance and fresh energy, crafted by a producer committed to organic cultivation since 1992, avoiding pesticides, herbicides, and insecticides. This red wine from Pernand-Vergelesses is renowned for its pronounced red fruit aromas…
wines.nose: A vibrant bouquet of red berries like strawberry, raspberry, cherry, and redcurrant, complemented by notes of violet, ripe plum, and subtle spicy undertones, sometimes even roasted
wines.palate: Full-bodied and powerful, it presents a juicy fruit character with a structured yet accommodating palate. Expect fine-grained, silky tannins that are well-melted and a balanced acidity, leading to an elegant and persistent finish
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red with alluring purple hints
wines.pairing: Duck, Game Birds, Mushroom Dishes, Roasted Poultry

wines.name: Domaine Patrick Pestre Pernand-Vergelesses Chardonnay
wines.description: Domaine Patrick Pestre Pernand-Vergelesses Chardonnay is an elegant white wine from Burgundy, celebrated for its unique minerality and harmonious character. Produced by Domaine Patrick Pestre, a winery established in 1992 that champions organic cultivation methods, this Chardonnay reflects the exceptional terroir of…
wines.palate: On the palate, it is mineral, harmonious, and easy to drink, offering a fresh, vivid, and complex profile with excellent balance and depth
wines.pairing: Creamy Sauces, Grilled Fish, Shellfish, Soft Cheese

wines.name: Calrossie Vineyard Grand Reserve Pinot Noir
wines.description: Calrossie Vineyard Grand Reserve Pinot Noir is an exquisite expression of Marlborough’s Awatere Valley, celebrated for its exceptional quality and meticulous attention to detail. Sourced from a unique hillside vineyard, this Pinot Noir benefits from its distinctive terroir of wind-blown gravels over rich clay soils…
wines.pairing: as lamb rack., Match it with light dishes as grilled salmon, or more rich red meats

wines.name: Calrossie Vineyard Dry Riesling
wines.description: Calrossie Vineyard Dry Riesling is an exceptional wine from the Awatere Valley in Marlborough, New Zealand, celebrated for its meticulous quality and attention to detail. This unique offering marks the first standalone release of Riesling from Calrossie Vineyard, showcasing the distinct character of the hillside site…
wines.nose: Loaded with key lime, white peach, and red apple flavors, complemented by a taut, fine line of acidity
wines.palate: Ripe citrus notes, a medium-bodied clay-richness, and a long, dry, steely mineral finish
wines.pairing: fish and seafood., Match it with Asian cuisine, Pad Thai noodles, Smoked Salmon

wines.name: Calrossie Vineyard Sauvignon Blanc
wines.description: Calrossie Vineyard Sauvignon Blanc is an elegant expression of Marlborough’s renowned Sauvignon Blanc, celebrated for its vibrant intensity and meticulous attention to detail. This wine captures the essence of New Zealand’s flagship wine region, offering a refreshing and distinctive profile.
wines.nose: This Calrossie Vineyard Sauvignon Blanc delivers all the hallmark traits that Marlborou
wines.palate: The palate is dry, focused and refreshing, with flavours of finger lime, white peach and nectarine. The finish is balanced, long and lingering
wines.pairing: Match it with calamari and green-lipped mussels.

wines.name: I Mori Chianti DOCG (in “fiasco” straw bottle)
wines.description: I Mori Chianti (in “fiasco” straw bottle) is a quintessential expression of Tuscan winemaking tradition, presented in its iconic straw-covered ‘fiasco’ bottle that harks back to centuries of Italian conviviality. Crafted by I Mori in the rolling hills of Chianti, this wine embodies the region’s rich heritage and the…
wines.nose: The nose is characterized by scents of fruit and a fruity bouquet
wines.palate: The palate is dry with slightly tannic taste
wines.pairing: Dressed in a “fiasco” straw bottle, especially dishes of Tuscan cuisine., this is a wine for the entire meal

wines.name: Antica Vigna Amarone della Valpolicella DOCG
wines.description: Antica Vigna Amarone della Valpolicella is a majestic and expressive red wine from Italy’s renowned Valpolicella region, celebrated for its unique winemaking tradition. This full-bodied and rich wine is crafted using the ancient ‘appassimento’ method, where grapes are carefully air-dried for several months to…
wines.nose: Complex aromas of dark berries combine with delicate nuances of dried fruit, dark chocolate, and a hint of licorice. Balsamic and spicy notes complement the bouquet
wines.palate: On the palate, the wine impresses with a velvety richness and cedarwood tones
wines.pairing: Its elegant structure and remarkable length make it an excellent choice for game dishes or aged cheeses.

wines.name: Antica Vigna Pinot Grigio delle Venezie DOC
wines.description: Antica Vigna Pinot Grigio delle Venezie is a vibrant and elegant white wine that perfectly embodies the renowned style of Italy’s Delle Venezie DOC. This exceptional Pinot Grigio is celebrated for its crisp acidity, refreshing minerality, and versatile, easy-drinking character, making it a beloved choice for both…
wines.nose: This light-footed and charming Pinot Grigio presents itself with a fresh, floral fragrance. The aroma combines citrus notes, green apples, and subtle mineral nuances
wines.palate: Lively and balanced on the palate, it really impresses with its clarity and pleasant freshness and uncomplicated style and versatility. It offers a clean, crisp profile with well-balanced acidity and a delightful finish
wines.pairing: It pairs perfectly with crisp salads, light fish dishes, or Mediterranean summer cuisine.

wines.name: Pfaff 1957 Pinot Noir Alsace AOP
wines.description: Pfaff Pinot Noir Alsace is a captivating expression from one of Alsace’s leading and oldest cooperative producers, Cave des Vignerons de Pfaffenheim, established in 1957. This wine embodies a unique balance of tradition and innovative winemaking, reflecting the distinct limestone and chalky clay terroir of the region…
wines.nose: The nose is both intense and complex, unveiling great concentration with prominent red berry aromas and a delicate touch of vanilla
wines.palate: The attack on the palate is strong, revealing well-ripened and silky tannins alongside a dense, concentrated matter. Ample and exceptionally well-balanced, it lingers long on the finish, often showing notes of vanilla, discrete spices, and…
wines.appearance: A thick and deep ruby color with alluring violet tints, brilliant and limpid in the glass
wines.pairing: It pairs well with beef, quiches and pâtés. It can also be served with an entire meal., roasts

wines.name: Pfaff Riesling Zinnkoepfle Alsace Grand Cru AOP
wines.description: Pfaff Riesling Zinnkoepfle Alsace Grand Cru is a powerful and elegant expression of Riesling, hailing from the esteemed Zinnkoepflé Grand Cru, a majestic hillside whose name translates to “Mont du Soleil” or “Sun Hill” due to its ideal south and southeast exposure. This exceptional terroir, characterized by…
wines.nose: Dry and refined Riesling that exhales a sophisticated bouquet with mineral, floral and delicate fruit nuances evoking citrus, pine sap and cinnamon notes
wines.palate: The attack on the palate is refined. However, the frank acidity remains elegant and subtle. This is a strong wine with good balance and heaps of volume. Lemon and lime are expressive with lots of amplitude and good length
wines.pairing: raclette or fresh goat’s cheese., Rich and subtle, this wine will go perfectly well with fish in creamy sauce, white meat

wines.name: Pierre Chainier Chardonnay
wines.description: Pierre Chainier Chardonnay is a testament to generations of winemaking expertise, crafted by a family whose roots in viticulture trace back to the 18th century in Bordeaux, with their establishment in the esteemed Loire Valley in 1973. This exquisite 100% Chardonnay embodies the unique qualities derived from the…
wines.nose: A complex, fresh, and aromatic nose, revealing elegant and refined notes of white flowers and citrus
wines.palate: Very subtle and delicate on the palate, offering harmonious white flower and citrus aromas, with a lovely roundness and refreshing finish that hints at grapefruit
wines.pairing: Enjoy this Chardonnay on its own as an aperitif, fish and poultry., or with seafood

wines.name: Tertre Blanc
wines.grape: Chardonnay, Gros Manseng, Sauvignon Blanc, Viognier
wines.description: Tertre Blanc is an aromatic and elegant white wine, an epicurean discovery for lovers of atypical white wines. Produced by Château du Tertre, a distinguished 5th Growth Classified Estate in Margaux, this unique blend stands out in Bordeaux for its innovative use of varietals. The vineyard is situated on one of the…
wines.nose: The nose entices with a pronounced, yet refined aromatic profile. The bouquet reveals elegant floral notes, such as lilac and jasmine, harmoniously interwoven with fruity aromas of pear and peach
wines.palate: The attack is characterized by a roundness typical of Chardonnay, supported by a fine acidity. The tasting concludes with a saline finish imparted by the Gros Manseng
wines.pairing: and of course cheese., sashimi, Shellfish, Sushi

wines.name: Château Notton Margaux AOC
wines.description: Château Notton Margaux is an elegant and refined expression of its prestigious appellation, renowned for producing wines of exceptional finesse and structure. This Bordeaux red wine, a blend of Cabernet Sauvignon and Merlot, is ideally situated on deep gravel soils that contribute to its distinctive character and…
wines.nose: Its ripe red fruit bouquet, elegant and refined, reveals its terroir’s true character. Margaux wines are often noted for perfumed aromas of cassis, floral notes, tobacco, and earthiness
wines.palate: A rich, well-structured wine with full body, good acidity and great ageing potential, complemented by silky tannins
wines.pairing: Good with red meats, Grilled Meats, lamb and game.

wines.name: Tertio de Montrose, Saint-Estèphe AOC
wines.grape: Cabernet Franc, Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Petit Verdot
wines.description: Tertio de Montrose, Saint-Estèphe is the vibrant third wine from the esteemed Château Montrose, a distinguished Second Growth estate in the heart of Saint-Estèphe. Crafted with the same meticulous attention to detail as its Grand Vin and second wine, La Dame de Montrose, this expression offers an earlier-drinking…
wines.nose: The nose reveals elegant aromas of red fruit accompanied by some spicy and lightly smoky notes
wines.palate: The attack, full and round, reveals beautiful freshness on the palate, harmoniously balanced with rich tannins and dark fruit character
wines.pairing: beef and game. St. Estèphe is also good with both hard and soft cheese., Best served with roasted, braised or grilled meats like steak, Pork

wines.name: Lapostolle Prelude Apalta
wines.grape: Cabernet Sauvignon, Carménère, Merlot, Petit Verdot
wines.description: Lapostolle Prelude Apalta is a vibrant and fruit-driven red blend, serving as an inviting introduction to the esteemed winemaking philosophy of Clos Apalta. It embodies the harmonious fusion of French expertise and the exceptional terroir of Chile’s Apalta Valley, crafted from old vines in a unique microclimate to…
wines.nose: Intense nose with spices and blackberry, figs and sweet spices from a well integrated oak
wines.palate: Round palate with volume, concentration of ripe fruit, textured tannins and a long, lasting finish
wines.pairing: couscous or charred Catalan onions served with a red pepper and tomato sauce., Serve this straightforward but enjoyable red with vegetarian dishes, smoked aubergine

wines.name: Schild Estate Barossa Old & Survivor Vine Grenache
wines.description: Schild Estate Barossa Old & Survivor Vine Grenache is a captivating Barossa red that celebrates the intensity and elegance of old-vine Grenache, reflecting the unique characteristics of its historic vineyards. Crafted from ‘Old Vines’ (35+ years) and ‘Survivor Vines’ (70+ years, with some plantings dating back to…
wines.nose: This old vines Grenache offers dark cherries, red currents with floral undertones and savoury spices
wines.palate: The bright fruit is evenly layered amongst a softly tannic frame are followed by a long licorice-infused finish
wines.pairing: Pair with slow-braised beef and a medly of your favourite roasted root vegetables.

wines.name: Schild Estate Barossa GSM
wines.description: Schild Estate Barossa is a captivating 100% Grenache, crafted from venerable old vines, some dating back to 1916. This wine embodies the Schild Estate’s deep-rooted passion, a family of grapegrowers in the Barossa Valley for four generations, dedicated to expressing the unique character of their vineyards. It…
wines.nose: This old vines Grenache offers dark cherries, red currents with floral undertones and savoury spices
wines.palate: The bright fruit is evenly layered amongst a softly tannic frame are followed by a long licorice-infused finish
wines.pairing: Pair with slow-braised beef and a medly of your favourite roasted root vegetables.

wines.name: Bone Dry Pinot Noir
wines.description: Bone Dry Pinot Noir is an elegant and vibrant expression of cool-climate Australian Pinot Noir, crafted for those who appreciate purity and finesse without compromise. This wine stands out for its unique commitment to being low in sugar, with less than 1g per bottle and only 76 calories per serve, appealing to…
wines.nose: The nose of this Pinot Noir is light, delicate, energetic and harmonious, with lifted aromas of red cherry, wild strawberry, soft spice, hints of dried herbs, and a touch of rose petal
wines.palate: A soft and supple wine, light to medium-bodied, offering black cherry, strawberry, cranberry, raspberry, and brown spice characters with integrated, silky tannins and crisp acidity. It delivers a beautifully balanced, incredibly drinkable…
wines.pairing: and pasta with tomato or cream sauces., and various fish dishes, Bone Dry Pinot Noir pairs well with poultry like duck and chicken, especially salmon and tuna. Other excellent…

wines.name: Bone Dry Rosé
wines.description: Bone Dry Rosé is an exceptionally crisp and refreshing Australian Rosé, crafted with a dedication to a truly dry style. With less than 0.1% of sugar per bottle, this vegan-friendly wine offers a guilt-free indulgence without compromising on vibrant flavor and character. It embodies a modern approach to winemaking…
wines.nose: A deliciously dry Rosé with crisp acidity and notes of strawberries and cream
wines.palate: With less than 0.1% of sugar per bottle, this Rosé is light-bodied, vegan friendly, and incredibly refreshing. The palate is restrained, dry and savoury with faint lemon peel nuances
wines.pairing: and lighter proteins. Excellent pairings include seafood, and spicy foods, Bone Dry Rosé pairs well with salty, cured meats

wines.name: Bone Dry Sauvignon Blanc
wines.description: Bone Dry Sauvignon Blanc is a vibrant and crisp Australian white wine, meticulously crafted for the health-conscious consumer with its exceptionally low sugar content (less than 1g per bottle) without compromising on flavour. This refreshing, bone-dry expression of Sauvignon Blanc embodies a modern approach to…
wines.nose: An invigorating Sauvignon Blanc displaying notes of passionfruit, guava, and intriguing herbal undertones
wines.palate: This Sauvignon Blanc is lively, refreshing, and vegan friendly, offering a clean, zesty finish with bright acidity
wines.pairing: and dishes with green vegetables, Bone Dry Sauvignon Blanc pairs well with fresh seafood, citrus, goat cheese

wines.name: Bone Dry Prosecco
wines.description: Bone Dry Prosecco is a vibrant and refreshing sparkling wine from South Australia, celebrated for its remarkably low sugar content and crisp, fruit-forward profile. Crafted for the health-conscious consumer, this wine offers a guilt-free indulgence without compromising on flavour, making it a modern and effortlessly…
wines.nose: Vibrant effervescence and crisp citrus aromas
wines.palate: This dry Prosecco is lively with zesty acidity and hints of green apple for a refreshing finish
wines.pairing: and seafood like oysters, as well as with delicate dishes and cheeses like mozzarella or goat cheese. An ideal choice for celebratory moments or a sunny day’s indulgence., Bone…

wines.name: Bone Dry Sparkling
wines.description: Bone Dry Sparkling is a revolutionary Australian sparkling wine crafted with a focus on reducing sugar and carbohydrates without compromising on vibrant flavor. This health-conscious choice delivers a refreshingly crisp and clean profile, making it a truly guilt-free indulgence.
wines.pairing: as its crisp acidity cuts through fat and complements fresh flavors., Bone Dry Sparkling pairs best with light and delicate dishes, but rich foods as well

wines.name: Susana Balbo Nosotros Library Edition Cabernet Sauvignon
wines.description: Susana Balbo Nosotros Library Edition Cabernet Sauvignon is a truly exceptional “selection of selections” that embodies the pioneering spirit of Susana Balbo, Argentina’s first female winemaker. This wine celebrates a story of courage and unwavering commitment to excellence, showcasing Cabernet Sauvignon, a varietal…
wines.nose: A wine displaying aromas of red fruits like currants and subtle notes of spices, tobacco, and chocolate due to its oak aging
wines.palate: It has a balanced acidity with elegant, fine-grained tannins, excellent mouthfeel, and a very pleasant finish
wines.pairing: Ideal with beef, Lamb, Pork, quail and other game birds in cream-based sauces.

wines.name: Opus One Napa Valley (2012)
wines.grape: Cab. Franc, Cabernet Sauvignon, Malbec, Merlot, Petit Verdot
wines.description: Opus One Napa Valley is a legendary creation born from the historic partnership between Napa Valley’s visionary Robert Mondavi and Baron Philippe de Rothschild of Château Mouton Rothschild. This iconic Bordeaux-style blend represents a seamless fusion of Old World tradition and New World innovation, meticulously…
wines.nose: Effuses seductive, dark fruit aromas of crushed cassis, blackberry, and black cherry with subtle hints of violet, vanilla, and baking spices
wines.palate: Bright and fresh on the attack, concentrated flavors mirror the aromas and are coupled with an exceptionally plush, creamy texture in the mid-palate from the fine-grained tannins. Poignant notes of black tea, licorice, and chocolate lead…
wines.pairing: Opus One is a wine that goes well with large meat dishes, perhaps enhanced with a sprinkling of fine black truffle., Throughout the meal

wines.name: Lacroix-Martillac Par Latour-Martillac Pessac-Leognan AOC (2016)
wines.description: Lacroix-Martillac Par Latour-Martillac Pessac-Leognan is a distinguished red wine crafted from selected plots of the esteemed Château LaTour-Martillac, a Cru Classé (Classed Growth) in the 1953 Classification of Graves wine. This wine embodies the producer’s dedication to quality yield and traditional viticulture…
wines.nose: The nose is intense and aromatic, with fruity (red and black fruits), spicy (liquorice) and slightly smoky notes
wines.palate: The palate is powerful and fresh with wellrounded tannins. Good length on the finish

wines.name: Lacroix-Martillac Par Latour-Martillac Pessac-Leognan AOC (2018)
wines.description: Lacroix-Martillac Par Latour-Martillac Pessac-Leognan is a distinguished red wine crafted from selected plots of the esteemed Château LaTour-Martillac, a Cru Classé (Classed Growth) in the 1953 Classification of Graves wine. This wine embodies the producer’s dedication to quality yield and traditional viticulture…
wines.nose: The nose is intense and aromatic, with fruity (red and black fruits), spicy (liquorice) and slightly smoky notes
wines.palate: The palate is powerful and fresh with wellrounded tannins. Good length on the finish

wines.name: Château Prieuré-Lichine, Margaux Grand Cru Classé AOC (2021)
wines.description: Château Prieuré-Lichine, Margaux Grand Cru Classé is a distinguished Fourth Growth (Quatrième Cru Classé) from the historic 1855 classification, renowned for embodying the quintessential elegance, finesse, and aromatic complexity of the prestigious Margaux appellation. This Grand Cru Classé fully expresses the fine…
wines.nose: Bright and fresh, The wine opens with a mix of raspberry, pomegranate and plum notes guided by light floral and spice notes
wines.palate: The palate expresses fresh and sweet red fruits, oak and thyme. A Margaux that seduces with its finesse, its refinement as well as its rich aromatic palette combined with a tannic structure of great delicacy
wines.pairing: Aged Hard Cheese, Beef Wellington, Duck Breast, Mushroom Risotto

wines.name: Château Pontet-Canet, Pauillac Grand Cru Classé AOC (2019)
wines.grape: Cabernet Franc, Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Petit Verdot
wines.description: Château Pontet-Canet, Pauillac Grand Cru Classé is a pioneering estate renowned for its unwavering commitment to biodynamic viticulture, setting a benchmark for quality and environmental stewardship in Bordeaux. This Fifth Growth, often lauded for performing at the level of a Second Growth, crafts wines of exceptional…
wines.nose: The nose offers a magical array of aromatics ranging from graphite and cedar-wood notes to aromas of wild fruit
wines.palate: The depth of flavour on the palate is underpinned by soft tannins and lovely acidity. The finish reveals subtle smoky notes and is amazingly long
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, BBQ Short Ribs, Braised Lamb Shank, Grilled Ribeye Steak

wines.name: Aimé by Aimé Roquesante Méditerranée Rosé IGP
wines.description: Aimé by Aimé Roquesante Méditerranée Rosé is an authentic expression of Provence, crafted with unrivaled skill in the calm serenity of its vineyards. This wine delivers the best of southern French varietals, expressing their flavors with elegance and finesse, embodying all the elegance of Provence in a fruity and…
wines.nose: An expressive nose, mixing notes of citrus fruits, white flowers and a hint of red fruits
wines.palate: The palate is fresh and elegant, with notes of red fruits and citrus fruits. A beautiful balance and tension, all the elegance of Provence in this fruity and bright rosé
wines.pairing: Grilled Shrimp Skewers, Mediterranean Salad, Roast Chicken, Smoked Salmon

wines.name: Chappellet Signature Cabernet Sauvignon
wines.grape: Character. The Dry, Elevates Flavor Complexity., Even Ripening, Intensely Flavorful Grapes. Crop Thinning Allows For Full, Rocky Soils Of Pritchard Hill Produce Small
wines.description: Chappellet Signature Cabernet Sauvignon is a benchmark for the long-lived hillside wines of the Napa Valley, renowned for its depth, longevity, and elegance. Sourced from the esteemed Pritchard Hill, this wine embodies the unique mountain terroir, where dry, rocky soils yield intensely flavorful grapes, cultivated…
wines.nose: It displays alluring aromas of cassis, dark cherry, plum, chocolate, and sweet baking spices, with hints of toasted oak, cardamom, clove and vanilla from French oak aging
wines.palate: On the palate, this wine is voluptuously full bodied, with a lavish structure and supple tannins framing the ripe dark berry and black currant flavors. As it glides to a long resonant finish, sophisticated hints of cedar, espresso, cigar…
wines.appearance: Luxuriously dark and concentrated
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, BBQ Short Ribs, Braised Lamb Shank, Grilled Ribeye Steak

wines.name: 1924 Whisky Barrel Aged French Blend
wines.grape: Cabernet Sauvignon, Malbec, Merlot, Petite Verdot
wines.description: Whisky Barrel Aged French Blend is a daring creation from 1924 Wines, crafted with rich, dark fruit and a portion aged for a minimum of two months in premium whiskey barrels, imparting classically smooth vanilla and toasted oak notes. This unique blend pays homage to the rebellious spirit of the Prohibition Era…
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, BBQ Short Ribs, Braised Lamb Shank, Grilled Ribeye Steak

wines.name: Viña Amate Tempranillo Rioja DOCa COMING SOON
wines.description: Viña Amate Tempranillo Rioja DOCa is a captivating Spanish red wine crafted by the Aldeanueva Cooperative, a collective of over 900 dedicated farmers. Sourced from venerable vines, some between 50 and 100 years old, grown across diverse plots and altitudes, this wine achieves remarkable complexity and character. As a…
wines.nose: Aromas of warm summer berry pudding, strawberries, blackberries and stewed plum with wafts of vanilla cream, toasted brioche and wild herbs
wines.palate: The palate is rich and soft, layers of dark fruit with melt-in-the-mouth tannins, with hints of coffee, hazelnut, chocolate and vanilla and on a long, smooth finish
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, BBQ Short Ribs, Braised Lamb Shank, Grilled Ribeye Steak

wines.name: Vicente Gandia Bobal Negro
wines.description: Vicente Gandia Bobal Negro is a powerful and elegant expression of Spain’s indigenous Bobal grape, meticulously crafted by the renowned Vicente Gandia winery. This red wine showcases a harmonious balance of intense fruit and subtle oak, reflecting the unique terroir of Utiel-Requena. It is well-rounded and…
wines.nose: Aromas of red fruits and English caramel with light smoky nuances
wines.palate: In the mouth it is resounding, filling the mouth, leaving an oaky sensation
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, BBQ Short Ribs, Braised Lamb Shank, Grilled Ribeye Steak

wines.name: El Miracle Nº01 (Bobal, Cabernet Sauvignon)
wines.description: El Miracle Nº01 is a premium Spanish red wine from the historic Utiel-Requena region, crafted by the esteemed Vicente Gandia winery. This wine embodies the philosophy of celebrating life’s everyday miracles, offering a truly extraordinary experience in every glass. It’s a testament to the unique terroir of its origin…
wines.nose: On the nose, inviting aromas of ripe red fruits, succulent plum, and delicate notes of caramel emerge, creating a captivating bouquet
wines.palate: The palate reveals a wine of impressive structure, characterized by soft tannins and a wonderfully persistent finish that lingers long after the last sip
wines.appearance: An intense red color, beautifully accented with vibrant violet hues
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, BBQ Short Ribs, Braised Lamb Shank, Grilled Ribeye Steak

wines.name: Vicente Gandia Patacona Garnacha
wines.description: Vicente Gandia Patacona Garnacha is a captivating red wine that embodies a delightful Mediterranean character, offering a smooth, expressive, and fragrant profile. This easy-drinking and easy-pairing wine is known for its delicate nature, highlighting vibrant red fruits, and presenting with pleasant, well-defined…
wines.nose: Delicate, expressive, and fragrant, with prominent notes of red fruits, particularly plum
wines.palate: Unctuous and pleasant on the palate, featuring very marked, round tannins and a long finish. It offers a light and fruity sensation with flavors of plums, cherries, redcurrant, cranberry, and strawberry, complemented by subtle undertones…
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, BBQ Short Ribs, Braised Lamb Shank, Grilled Ribeye Steak

wines.name: Vicente Gandia Patacona Tempranillo
wines.description: Vicente Gandia Patacona Tempranillo is a testament to the renowned winemaking expertise of Vicente Gandía, a producer celebrated for consistently delivering high-quality Spanish wines at excellent value. This red wine stands out in the Patacona line for its slightly firmer character, crafted entirely from the noble…
wines.palate: Possessing a good structure, this wine delights the palate with a fresh, round, and well-balanced profile. It offers a smooth texture, juicy acidity, and a fresh, elegant finish where the delightful flavours of jam, fruit, and berry…
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, BBQ Short Ribs, Braised Lamb Shank, Grilled Ribeye Steak

wines.name: Vicente Gandia Patacona Sauvignon Blanc
wines.description: Vicente Gandia Patacona Sauvignon Blanc is a vibrant expression of Spanish winemaking, crafted by the esteemed, century-old Bodegas Vicente Gandia. This wine embodies the winery’s commitment to quality and innovation, offering a delightful and approachable profile that has garnered international recognition for the…
wines.nose: It gives off aromas of tropical fruits such as pineapple and passion fruit
wines.palate: On the palate, it’s fresh, unctuous and with citrus notes that remind to grapefruit. The end is tasty and long
wines.pairing: Goat Cheese Salad, Grilled Sea Bass, Roast Chicken, Shellfish Platter

wines.description: Pluvium Winemaker Selection Vino Tinto is an exquisite Spanish red wine from the acclaimed Vicente Gandia winery, known for its dedication to quality and innovation since 1885. This special selection harmoniously blends two distinct varietals, resulting in a wine that is both expressive and beautifully balanced…
wines.nose: The vibrant nose combines ripe plums with floral touches of violets
wines.palate: The palate is round and its excellent acidity enhances liveliness and balance, maintaining a nice tannic structure. It offers sensations of ripe fruit and rich, perfectly integrated tannins, culminating in a silky, generous, and balanced…
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, BBQ Short Ribs, Braised Lamb Shank, Grilled Ribeye Steak

This “Winemaker Selection” skillfully blends the vibrant character of Sauvignon Blanc with the unique charm of Merseguera, an indigenous Spanish grape…

wines.palate: Full-bodied in the mouth, but with a vibrant acidity that keeps the wine always well balanced. It offers a fresh and lively palate, often featuring nuances of peach, ripe apple, and lemon
wines.appearance: A golden yellow colour
wines.pairing: Goat Cheese Salad, Grilled Sea Bass, Roast Chicken, Shellfish Platter

wines.name: Klippenkop Pinotage
wines.description: Klippenkop Pinotage is an exquisite and characterful South African red wine, offering a luscious blend of bold, plummy fruit flavours enhanced by a hint of warm spice. Crafted from South Africa’s signature Pinotage grape, it is produced in an early drinking style, showcasing well-integrated wood and a soft, smooth…

wines.palate: Produced in an early drinking style with well integrated wood and a soft, smooth finish
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, BBQ Short Ribs, Braised Lamb Shank, Grilled Ribeye Steak

wines.description: Klippenkop Chenin Blanc is a vibrant expression of South Africa’s most widely planted white grape, offering a delightful balance of refreshing crispness and abundant fruit. Crafted in the renowned Robertson region, this wine captures the essence of its unique terroir, delivering a harmonious and appealing profile that…

wines.palate: On the palate, the wine is refreshing and crisp with a good balance between acidity and fruitiness. The flavors of the wine are dominated by zesty citrus and fruit, and it has a slightly sweet finish, well balanced by the acidity

wines.description: Tiroliro Branco Vinho Verde is a vibrant and refreshing expression of Portugal’s renowned Vinho Verde region, known for its youthful exuberance and crisp character. It perfectly blends four indigenous grape varieties to create a wine that is both aromatic and delightfully fresh.

Known for its light, crisp, and often subtly spritzy character, it offers an invigorating drinking experience. The name “Twin Vines” celebrates the birth of the twin daughters of…

wines.palate: Fresh and lively on the palate, crisp and quenching, with that classic Vinho Verde slight fizz in the mouth and a refreshing, zesty acidity

wines.name: Galodoro Lisboa Vinho Tinto

wines.palate: The palate delights with elegantly dry flavors of black currant and morello cherry, leading to a youthful finish with beautiful length
wines.appearance: Boasting a deep violet colour
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, BBQ Short Ribs, Braised Lamb Shank, Grilled Ribeye Steak

wines.name: Hat Trick Alentejano Vinho Tinto
wines.grape: Cabernet Sauvignon, Castelão, Syrah, Touriga Nacional

wines.palate: The palate is spicy and full of ripe black fruits, balanced by well-integrated tannins and refreshing acidity. Light wood notes contribute extra complexity, creating an elegant, soft, round, and mouth-caressing finish
