wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Cheese, Grilled Lamb Chops, Roast Pork Loin, Slow-Cooked Beef Stew

wines.name: Porta Do Monte Alentejano Vinho Tinto
wines.grape: Alicante Bouschet, Petit Verdot, Syrah, Touriga Nacional
wines.description: Porta Do Monte Alentejano Vinho Tinto is a genuine expression of the Alentejano region, beautifully reflecting its unique characteristics. This red wine stands out with its robust structure and a harmonious balance between acidity and tannins, leading to a long and enduring finish. It is known for being soft and…
wines.nose: Concentrated aroma with pleasant notes of ripe red fruit combined with floral notes
wines.palate: In the mouth it has a great structure with combined notes of ripe black fruit and spice, firm and ripe tannins. Rich, elegant with a long, persistent finish
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, BBQ Short Ribs, Braised Lamb Shank, Grilled Ribeye Steak

wines.name: Meia Serra Jaen Dão Tinto DOC
wines.description: Meia Serra Jaen Dão Tinto is a captivating expression of Portugal’s indigenous Jaen grape, also known as Mencía in neighboring Spain. This wine showcases the unique character of the Dão region, where the Jaen varietal thrives in cool, wet climates and granitic soils. Crafted by the highly awarded Casa Santos Lima…
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, BBQ Short Ribs, Braised Lamb Shank, Grilled Ribeye Steak

wines.name: Red Blend Portugal Lisboa
wines.description: Red Blend Portugal Lisboa is a captivating expression of Portugal’s vibrant winemaking heritage, crafted by the esteemed Casa Santos Lima. This elegant red blend embodies the unique terroir of the Lisboa region, offering a harmonious balance of aromatic complexity and delightful fruit flavors.
wines.nose: Extremely aromatic, yet smooth and elegant, with hints of red fruit, oak, vanilla, and subtle spice notes
wines.palate: The palate reveals luscious flavors of ripe red fruit and balanced acidity, beautifully integrated with oak notes from barrel aging. The lingering aftertaste is characterized by soft tannins and dominant notes of pepper and liquor
wines.appearance: A beautiful, inviting ruby red
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, BBQ Short Ribs, Braised Lamb Shank, Grilled Ribeye Steak

wines.name: Janare Quid Falanghina Spumante Brut
wines.description: Janare Quid Falanghina Spumante Brut is an exceptional sparkling wine that encapsulates the vibrant spirit and unique terroir of Campania. Crafted from 100% Falanghina grapes, this Brut is a testament to the ancient winemaking traditions of the Sannio region, reflecting the rich, volcanic soils and meticulous care of…
wines.nose: The nose is fresh with floral notes of lime, nuance of citrus, white peach and pineapple, often complemented by hints of orange blossom, flint, and a delicate yeasty complexity
wines.palate: The mouth is tense and crunchy, fresh and enveloping, savory, refined and with a very pleasant persistent finish, offering a balanced, creamy, and vibrant palate with bright acidity
wines.pairing: Goat Cheese Crostini, Oysters Rockefeller, Prosciutto Melon, Sushi Rolls

wines.name: Villa Mottura Negroamaro Salento IGT
wines.description: Villa Mottura Negroamaro Salento is an exceptional expression of Puglia’s winemaking heritage, crafted from the region’s emblematic Negroamaro grape, often hailed as the “King of Salento”. This robust and versatile red wine embodies the spirit, authenticity, and energy of its sun-drenched homeland, reflecting…
wines.nose: Intense, broad bouquet of ripe fruit, pepper, almond, blackberry, tobacco and walnuts, slightly ethereal
wines.palate: The taste is velvety, full and harmonious. A warm and rounded red wine in taste
wines.pairing: Aged Pecorino Cheese, Grilled Lamb Chops, Orecchiette With Ragu, Sausage And Peppers

wines.name: Maia Primitivo Puglia IGT Bio
wines.description: Maia Primitivo Puglia Bio is an exceptional organic red wine that beautifully captures the vibrant essence of Italy’s sun-drenched Puglia region. This robust and sophisticated wine, crafted by Maia Wine, showcases the esteemed heritage of the Primitivo grape, offering a remarkable balance of tradition and innovation.
wines.nose: Delicate and fragrant, with predominant notes of violet and gooseberry, complemented by pleasant hints of spices, red fruits, and black berries
wines.palate: Rounded, soft, and velvety on the palate, it reveals bold flavors of ripe red fruit, dark cherry, and blackberry. Undertones of dried fig, black plum, liquorice, and subtle spices lead to a smooth, balanced finish
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, BBQ Short Ribs, Braised Lamb Shank, Grilled Ribeye Steak

wines.name: Cantina Zaccagnini “Tralcetto” Montepulciano d’Abruzzo Riserva DOC
wines.description: Cantina Zaccagnini “Tralcetto” Montepulciano d’Abruzzo Riserva is a distinguished red wine that embodies the essence of its Abruzzese origins. This wine is renowned for its commitment to “absolute quality, from cluster to glass,” a philosophy upheld by Cantina Zaccagnini through a blend of traditional winemaking and…
wines.nose: The nose opens to notes of red berries and spicy nuances of white pepper, complemented by hints of ripe cherries
wines.palate: A vibrant medium-textured body emerges on the palate, offering a round, complex experience with rich fruit notes and a lush, structured mouthfeel that leads to a long, smooth finish
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, BBQ Short Ribs, Braised Lamb Shank, Grilled Ribeye Steak

wines.name: Tenuta Ulisse Premium Pecorino
wines.description: Tenuta Ulisse Premium Pecorino is a wine of remarkable power, roundness, and distinctive character, embodying the richness of Abruzzo’s finest Pecorino vineyards. It represents Tenuta Ulisse’s dedication to showcasing the immense potential of this unique terroir and ancient variety with a contemporary approach, making…
wines.nose: The nose expresses vibrant notes of pineapple, white peach, citrus, and sage, opening to a fine and very elegant aromatic profile
wines.palate: On the palate it is rich, round, and perfectly balanced, offering good acidity and minerality for a fresh and lively finish
wines.pairing: Goat Cheese Salad, Grilled Sea Bass, Roast Chicken, Shellfish Platter

wines.name: Fattoria Il Muro Castro Rosso di Toscana IGT
wines.description: Fattoria Il Muro Castro Rosso di Toscana is considered a “Baby Super Tuscan,” a delightful expression of a traditional Super Tuscan blend crafted for immediate enjoyment. Its name pays homage to the Castro torrent, a mountain stream that meanders through the estate’s vineyards, reflecting the deep connection between…
wines.nose: Intense, floral nose that leads to notes of coffee and dark chocolate and continues with black cherries hints
wines.palate: Pleasantly smooth and slightly sweet on the palate, with fragrant body and structure, with soft silky tannins
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, BBQ Short Ribs, Braised Lamb Shank, Grilled Ribeye Steak

wines.name: Fattoria Il Muro Spigallo Chianti DOCG
wines.description: Fattoria Il Muro Spigallo Chianti is a vibrant expression of Tuscany, crafted by the Pancaro family who have cultivated these lands for over two centuries. This Chianti DOCG is a fresh, new, and fruity wine, designed to be pleasant and easily enjoyed by all. Its unique name, “Spigallo,” is a playful combination of the…
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, BBQ Short Ribs, Braised Lamb Shank, Grilled Ribeye Steak

wines.name: Fattoria Il Muro Lama Chardonnay di Toscana IGT
wines.description: Fattoria Il Muro Lama Chardonnay di Toscana is an exquisite expression of Tuscan winemaking, crafted by a family with over 200 years of dedication to viticulture. This Chardonnay embodies a philosophy focused on producing wines that are pleasant, fresh, and easily enjoyed by all. Its unique character is shaped by the…
wines.nose: On the nose is a fresh and fruity wine with an extraordinary range of perfumes, mainly the scent of elder flowers
wines.palate: The taste is fruity with a well-balanced mineral acidity
wines.pairing: Goat Cheese Salad, Grilled Sea Bass, Roast Chicken, Shellfish Platter

wines.name: Le Farnete Carmignano DOCG
wines.description: Le Farnete Carmignano is a distinguished red wine from the heart of Tuscany, representing one of Italy’s most historically significant and unique DOCG appellations. This wine stands apart with its pioneering blend of Sangiovese and Cabernet Sauvignon, a tradition established centuries before the rise of ‘Super…
wines.nose: Persistent, fine and elegant bouquet with great aromatic complexity of ripe red fruit, tobacco and sweet spices
wines.palate: Elegant and balanced in the initial impact, sensation of enveloping and great structure, rich but sweet and soft tannins with a long and persistent finish
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, BBQ Short Ribs, Braised Lamb Shank, Grilled Ribeye Steak

wines.name: Sasyr Sangiovese Syrah Toscana IGT (3000ml)
wines.description: Sasyr Sangiovese Syrah Toscana (3000ml) is a captivating blend that beautifully marries the vibrant acidity of Sangiovese with the rich, spicy notes of Syrah, creating a modern expression of Tuscan winemaking. This “Super Tuscan” style wine from the esteemed Rocca delle Macìe offers a harmonious balance of fruit and…
wines.nose: The nose is broad and of lively intensity with fruity aromas of blackberry, raspberry, and cherry with a subtle spiciness
wines.palate: On the palate it demonstrates softness and good structure. Fresh and aromatic in the persistent finish
wines.appearance: In the glass it appears an intense ruby red
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, BBQ Short Ribs, Braised Lamb Shank, Grilled Ribeye Steak

wines.name: Campo Maccione Vermentino Maremma Toscana DOC
wines.description: Campo Maccione Vermentino Maremma Toscana is a vibrant and elegant white wine that beautifully expresses the unique coastal terroir of Maremma, Tuscany. Crafted by the esteemed Rocca delle Macìe, this 100% Vermentino offers a delightful balance of aromatic complexity, refreshing acidity, and a distinctive saline…
wines.nose: A floral and fruity bouquet unfolds with notes reminiscent of acacia blossom and broom, gracefully leading to delicate perfumes of apple and pineapple. Hints of yellow-fleshed stone fruits, lime zest, and a touch of ocean air also emerge
wines.palate: The palate is dry, smooth, and pleasantly fresh, culminating in a slightly almond aftertaste. It presents crisp acidity, saline and mineral undertones, offering a persistent and well-balanced finish
wines.pairing: Goat Cheese Salad, Grilled Sea Bass, Roast Chicken, Shellfish Platter

wines.name: Rubinelli Vajol Destinée Amarone della Valpolicella Classico Riserva DOCG
wines.description: Rubinelli Vajol Destinée Amarone della Valpolicella Classico Riserva is a testament to the Rubinelli Vajol family’s dedication to crafting exceptionally elegant and harmonious wines from their unique Vajol CRU. This special Riserva, produced only in the finest vintages and in very limited quantities, is a profound…
wines.nose: Classic in its olfactory expression, with ripe red fruit, cherry in alcohol, flowers, licorice, undergrowth and spices
wines.palate: In the mouth, the sip is well defined and tends to be juicy, with good tannic structure and round and crunchy fruitiness enhanced by a savory acidity, which gives rhythm and thickness
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, BBQ Short Ribs, Braised Lamb Shank, Grilled Ribeye Steak

wines.name: Corte S. Anna Amarone della Valpolicella Classico DOCG
wines.description: Corte S. Anna Amarone della Valpolicella Classico is an exquisite dry red wine crafted in the heart of Italy’s renowned Valpolicella Classica region by the esteemed family-run winery, Rubinelli Vajol. This Amarone is a testament to the traditional “appassimento” method, where hand-selected grapes are carefully dried…
wines.nose: An enchanting bouquet that evokes rich red ripe fruits preserved in spirits, intertwined with notes of cherry, decadent chocolate, a hint of black pepper, delicate vanilla, and robust coffee. Further complexities include fig, prune…
wines.palate: This fruity red wine presents a medium body with a dominant, yet harmonious, acidity. Its complex structure gracefully unfolds on the tongue and palate, revealing finely mature tannins that contribute to a velvety, warm, and elegant…
wines.appearance: A brilliant ruby red, captivating the eye with its vibrant hue
wines.pairing: Aged Parmigiano Reggiano, Braised Beef Cheeks, Lamb Ossobuco, Mushroom Risotto

wines.name: Corte S. Anna Valpolicella Ripasso Classico Superiore DOC
wines.description: Corte S. Anna Valpolicella Ripasso Classico Superiore is a distinguished expression of Valpolicella, crafted using the traditional “Ripasso” technique. This unique winemaking method involves re-fermenting the Valpolicella wine on the nutrient-rich pomace of dried Amarone grapes, imparting enhanced structure, depth…
wines.nose: The nose impresses with typical aromas of dried fruit, raisins, dark berries, and a subtle hint of tobacco, evolving with notes of morello cherry and various spices
wines.palate: On the palate, the wine is full, rounded, and strongly structured. It presents a harmonious balance of fruity and spicy notes with a slightly sweet edge, supported by round tannins and a velvety mouthfeel
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, BBQ Short Ribs, Braised Lamb Shank, Grilled Ribeye Steak

wines.name: Maia Pinot Grigio delle Venezie Doc Bio
wines.description: Maia Pinot Grigio delle Venezie Doc Bio is an elegantly crafted organic white wine that beautifully expresses the unique terroir of Italy’s Friuli-Venezia Giulia region. This wine stands out for its vibrant freshness, aromatic complexity, and a captivating personality that embodies the Italian concept of “Bel Vivere”…
wines.nose: Excellent impact on the nose with a complex and well-blended bouquet of wild flowers and ripe fruit, notably apple and banana, complemented by subtle notes of orchard fruit and white flowers
wines.palate: Possessing a strong personality, this wine is long, pleasantly fresh, and lingering on the palate, with a harmonious balance of orchard fruit, white flowers, and ripe citrus
wines.pairing: Goat Cheese Salad, Grilled Sea Bass, Roast Chicken, Shellfish Platter

wines.name: La Torre di Veglia Pinot Grigio Delle Venezie DOC
wines.description: La Torre di Veglia Pinot Grigio Delle Venezie is an authentic and balanced expression of this beloved Italian varietal, showcasing a commitment to quality and sustainable practices. Crafted from high-quality grapes sourced from a single estate, it offers a delightful harmony of fruit ripeness and invigorating…
wines.nose: A dry and authentic style with enjoyable aromas of white flowers, orchard fruits, yellow peach, and citrus
wines.palate: On the palate the wine is crisp, with good balance of fruit ripeness and freshness

wines.name: St. Michael-Eppan Sanct Valentin Pinot Noir Riserva Alto Adige DOC
wines.description: St. Michael-Eppan Sanct Valentin Pinot Noir Riserva Alto Adige is a prestigious Italian red that exemplifies the finesse and depth of Alto Adige Pinot Noir, representing one of the estate’s flagship wines. Producing this top-quality Pinot Noir is a significant challenge, demanding specific soil and climate conditions…
wines.nose: Aromas of small red berries, strawberry, violet, smoky notes and cinnamon
wines.palate: Spicy, soft, elegant and seductive, with a supple texture
wines.appearance: Ruby red
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, BBQ Short Ribs, Braised Lamb Shank, Grilled Ribeye Steak

wines.name: St. Michael-Eppan Sanct Valentin Gewürztraminer Alto Adige DOC
wines.description: St. Michael-Eppan Sanct Valentin Gewürztraminer Alto Adige is a sublime expression of elegance and aromatic complexity, designed for lovers of high-end white wines. It is a wine that is elegant, layered, and multidimensional, characterized by exquisite minerality, elegant aromas, and excellent aging potential. This…
wines.nose: An intense and complex bouquet of rose, exotic fruits, oriental spices, lychee, and passion fruit. Further notes include exotic flowers, herbs, tropical fruits, and sweet spices such as cinnamon and cloves
wines.palate: Powerful, complex, and lush, with a light residual sugar that is beautifully balanced by a refreshing acidity. It is rich and well-structured, offering a pleasant softness, a luscious texture, and a long, aromatic persistence with flavors…
wines.appearance: Intense golden yellow
wines.pairing: Goat Cheese Salad, Grilled Sea Bass, Roast Chicken, Shellfish Platter

wines.name: St. Michael-Eppan Sanct Valentin Chardonnay Alto Adige DOC
wines.description: St. Michael-Eppan Sanct Valentin Chardonnay Alto Adige is one of the most expressive and acclaimed white wines from Alto Adige, representing the pinnacle of quality and innovation from the renowned St. Michael-Eppan winery. This prestigious wine, part of the Sanct Valentin line first launched in 1986, is celebrated…
wines.nose: A sophisticated bouquet of ripe fruit, complemented by enticing notes of vanilla and toast, alongside hints of apple, peach, and citrus. Subtle nuances of butter and sweet spices emerge from elegant wood aging
wines.palate: Powerful, mineral, buttery, and full-bodied, this wine is full and enveloping on the palate. It boasts a fresh, bright acidity that ensures perfect balance and a long, luscious aromatic persistence
wines.appearance: Straw yellow with light green reflections
wines.pairing: Goat Cheese Salad, Grilled Sea Bass, Roast Chicken, Shellfish Platter

wines.name: Tropical by Luca Bosio Lux Mango Moscato
wines.description: Tropical by Luca Bosio Lux Mango Moscato is an innovative and delightful sparkling wine that masterfully blends premium Moscato from Italy’s renowned Piedmont region with the vibrant essence of real Brazilian mango. Crafted by third-generation winemaker Luca Bosio, this wine stands out for its proprietary process that…
wines.nose: The wine exudes sweet notes of mango, pineapple, crisp pear, nectarine and ripe guava, balanced with the refreshing notes of lemon and bergamot
wines.palate: Bright notes of tropical fruits and full, ripe mango are balanced by a refreshing finish with only 90 calories per serving. The wine is easy to enjoy with a smooth sweetness and a refreshing light sourness
wines.pairing: Goat Cheese Crostini, Oysters Rockefeller, Prosciutto Melon, Sushi Rolls

wines.name: Gerald’s Pinot Noir
wines.description: Gerald’s Pinot Noir is a refined expression of 100% Pinot Noir from the acclaimed Pfalz region of Germany, crafted by the esteemed Weingut Am Kaiserbaum Hummel-Hundiger. This elegant red wine is a testament to the family’s dedication to sustainable winemaking and traditional maturation in wooden barrels, resulting in…
wines.nose: Aromatic bouquet of red cherry, raspberry, and plum, with subtle notes of rose petal, earthy undertones, and a hint of vanilla
wines.palate: Smooth and well-balanced, featuring flavors of ripe red berries, black cherry and a touch of cranberry. Soft tannins and gentle acidity provide structure, while nuances of spice and oak add depth. Elegant and lingering, with a delicate…
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, BBQ Short Ribs, Braised Lamb Shank, Grilled Ribeye Steak

wines.name: Gerald’s Riesling Dry
wines.description: Gerald’s Riesling Dry is a vibrant expression of the Pfalz region, crafted by Weingut Am Kaiserbaum Hummel-Hundiger, a winery celebrated for its commitment to quality and sustainable practices. This wine embodies the modern approach of winemaker Gerald Hundinger, who has elevated the family estate to new heights…
wines.nose: Bright and aromatic nose with notes of green apple, lime zest, and white peach, complemented by hints of jasmine and wet stone
wines.palate: Crisp and refreshing, featuring a lively acidity that balances flavors of tart citrus, green apple, and pear. Subtle undertones of mineral and flint add complexity. Clean and dry, with a lingering finish that highlights its citrus and…
wines.pairing: Goat Cheese Salad, Grilled Sea Bass, Roast Chicken, Shellfish Platter

wines.name: Codex Grande Reserve Cabernet Sauvignon Pays d’Oc IGP
wines.description: Codex Grande Reserve Cabernet Sauvignon Pays d’Oc is a testament to the winemakers’ dedication to protecting exceptional terroirs, resulting in a premium range of uniquely flavored wines. Sourced from carefully selected vineyards in the South of France, this Cabernet Sauvignon benefits from ideal conditions of hot…
wines.nose: This particular blend shows an outstanding complexity, with intense aromas of black currant, plum, tobacco and dark chocolate
wines.palate: A full-bodied style of Cabernet Sauvignon, particularly concentrated, with fine-grained tannins and intense vanilla notes on a lingering finish
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Cheese, Beef Wellington, Braised Short Ribs, Grilled Lamb Chops

wines.name: Plaimont PAN Colombard-Petit Mansaeng Côtes de Gascogne IGP
wines.description: Plaimont Colombard-Petit Mansaeng Côtes de Gascogne is an exquisite white wine that masterfully balances freshness with elegant sweetness, a hallmark of its unique Gascony blend. Produced by Plaimont, a highly regarded cooperative dedicated to preserving indigenous varietals, this wine embodies the vibrant character…
wines.nose: This original Gascony blend offers intense, tonic notes of wild flowers, peach, pineapple and lychee
wines.palate: Well-balanced on the palate with elegant sweet flavours and a fresh finish
wines.appearance: Intense yellow, with golden reflections
wines.pairing: Goat Cheese Salad, Grilled Sea Bass, Roast Chicken, Shellfish Platter

wines.name: Château Les Moines, Saint-Émilion Grand Cru AOC
wines.description: Château Les Moines, Saint-Émilion Grand Cru is a distinguished Bordeaux red, crafted by the Carreau family with over a century of winemaking expertise in the prestigious Saint-Émilion appellation. This wine embodies the unique terroir of its vineyard, situated on the western hillside of Saint-Émilion, just 2 km from…
wines.nose: Fruity with blackcurrant and blueberry notes and spicy on the nose
wines.palate: Rich and fresh on the palate. Lovely mellow oak with silky tannins
wines.pairing: Duck, Duck Breast, Lamb, Red Meat

wines.name: Petit Picoron Castillon Côtes de Bordeaux AOC
wines.description: Petit Picoron Castillon Côtes de Bordeaux is a distinctive 100% Merlot expression crafted by Château Picoron, an Australian-owned, family-run winery with a rich history dating back to 1570. This wine stands out for its transparent and honest representation of its unique terroir, located on the celebrated limestone and…
wines.nose: An aromatic bouquet of ripe red fruit, vanilla, spices, and earth
wines.palate: On the palate, it has a juicy texture with flavors of blackberry, cherry, and a hint of pepper. The finish is long and smooth with a touch of oak, in perfect balance between strength and freshness
wines.pairing: Aged Cheese Board, Duck Confit, Mushroom Risotto, Roasted Root Vegetables

wines.name: Château Loumelat Cuvée J.J. Lesgourgues, Blaye Côtes de Bordeaux AOC
wines.description: Château Loumelat Cuvée J.J. Lesgourgues, Blaye Côtes de Bordeaux is a testament to the unique terroir of Blaye, offering a modern and dynamic expression of Bordeaux winemaking. This limited production cuvée is crafted from low yields, ensuring a remarkable concentration and complexity of flavors.
wines.nose: An intense nose of fruit with a dominance of blackcurrant and blackberry, complemented by elegant notes of toast and vanilla from barrel aging
wines.palate: A pleasant mouthfeel with an elegant tannic structure, revealing notes of black fruits and a lingering toasted finish
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, BBQ Short Ribs, Braised Lamb Shank, Grilled Ribeye Steak

wines.name: Château Haut-Vigneau, Pessac-Leognan Blanc AOC COMING SOON
wines.description: Château Haut-Vigneau, Pessac-Leognan Blanc is a testament to the esteemed Pessac-Léognan appellation, crafted by Eric Perrin, owner of the renowned Château Carbonnieux. This elegant dry white Bordeaux, with its relatively recent white wine production, embodies a harmonious balance of structure, minerality, acidity…
wines.nose: The expressive nose is dominated by alluring mango notes, complemented by an overall exotic and floral aromatic palette, with hints of tropical fruits, grapefruit, and white peach
wines.palate: In the mouth, it reveals a delightful array of exotic fruits and floral notes, showcasing a superb balance between structure, refreshing minerality, bright acidity, and luscious fruit. It presents a lively attack, a beautiful aromatic…
wines.pairing: Goat Cheese Salad, Grilled Sea Bass, Roast Chicken, Shellfish Platter

wines.name: Carré d’As Graves Rouge AOC
wines.description: Carré d’As Graves Rouge is a testament to the esteemed Graves appellation, offering a fleshy and gourmet profile that is both balanced and captivating. This wine’s unique qualities stem from its gravel-rich terroir, a hallmark of Bordeaux’s oldest wine region, which imparts a distinctive character to its red wines…
wines.nose: On the nose its youth gives us aromas of small black fruits like blackcurrant and blueberry as well as light roasted notes
wines.palate: On the palate the balance is perfect thanks to a preserved freshness combined with an ideal maturity of the grapes. It offers a mouth with very present and tender tannins. Carré D’As red is a fleshy and gourmet wine
wines.pairing: Aged Gouda Cheese, Beef Tenderloin, Duck Breast, Roast Lamb Chops

wines.name: Carré d’As Graves Blanc AOC
wines.description: Carré d’As Graves Blanc is a quintessential expression of its esteemed Bordeaux appellation, renowned for its unique gravelly soils. This wine is a testament to the region’s rich winemaking heritage, being one of the oldest wine-growing areas in Bordeaux. Produced by Les Hauts de Palette, a family estate with a…
wines.nose: Beautiful balance with an expressive freshness made of charm and sensuality around the olfactory nuances
wines.palate: Its beautiful length in the mouth ends on a subtly tangy note. A typical blend of the Graves appellation

wines.name: L’Inattendu des Grands Chênes, Médoc AOC by Bernard Magrez
wines.description: L’Inattendu des Grands Chênes, Médoc by Bernard Magrez is a structured and suave wine crafted by the renowned Bernard Magrez, a visionary known for his relentless pursuit of perfection and innovation in winemaking. Hailing from Saint-Christoly-Médoc, a town historically significant for its trading port, this wine…
wines.nose: The nose is aromatic and it reveals notes of blackberry, flowers and slightly crushed blackcurrant
wines.palate: On the palate this wine expresses notes of small fleshy red berries associated with fine touches of blackberry, violet as well as fine hints of liquorice. Round, balanced, and complex
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, BBQ Short Ribs, Braised Lamb Shank, Grilled Ribeye Steak

wines.name: Le Fleurs de Bibian, Listrac-Médoc AOC
wines.description: Le Fleurs de Bibian, Listrac-Médoc is a meticulously crafted red wine, representing a rigorous selection from the younger plots of Château Bibian, one of the oldest estates in the Listrac-Médoc appellation. This wine is designed to be enjoyed in its vibrant youth, showcasing a delightful roundness and abundant…
wines.nose: A fruity wine with remarkable freshness, the nose is subtly woody with inviting aromas of blackcurrant
wines.palate: On the palate, the wine is silky, with supple and velvety tannins. The finish is fresh, hinting at a promising future
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, BBQ Short Ribs, Braised Lamb Shank, Grilled Ribeye Steak

wines.name: Château Bibian, Cru Bourgeois Supérieur, Haut Médoc AOC
wines.description: Château Bibian, Cru Bourgeois Supérieur, Haut Médoc is a distinguished red wine from one of the oldest estates in Listrac-Médoc, meticulously crafted by the Meyre family, now in its sixth generation. This Cru Bourgeois Supérieur offers a testament to the unique terroir of the Haut-Médoc, benefiting from a vineyard…
wines.nose: The nose is rich and aromatic with notes of blackcurrant, blackberry and black cherry
wines.palate: This smoky wine has a fine density. The ripe tannic structure is rich, silky and ample with a long finish
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Board, Duck Confit, Mushroom Risotto, Pan-Seared Steak

wines.name: Château Puy Castera Grand Vin, Cru Bourgeois Haut-Médoc AOC
wines.grape: Cabernet Franc, Cabernet Sauvignon, Malbec, Merlot, Petit Verdot
wines.description: Château Puy Castera Grand Vin, Cru Bourgeois Haut-Médoc is a distinguished wine from a historically rich estate, nestled in the prestigious Haut-Médoc region between Saint-Estèphe and Pauillac. Its name, meaning ‘fortress on a hill,’ alludes to its ancient origins and the exceptional terroir of deep gravel and…
wines.nose: Very expressive nose with aromas of black fruits, lively and intense
wines.palate: The rich, full body and delicate tannins make this a truly remarkable wine, developing charming aromatic nuances with age
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, BBQ Short Ribs, Braised Lamb Shank, Grilled Ribeye Steak

wines.name: Château Plagnac Cru Bourgeois Médoc AOC
wines.description: Château Plagnac Cru Bourgeois Médoc is a distinguished wine that perfectly embodies the essence of the Médoc region, offering a remarkable balance of power, vigorous tannins, and finesse derived from its unique clay-limestone terroir. Classified as Cru Bourgeois since 1932, this estate consistently demonstrates a…
wines.nose: Even before the first sip, a strong and fruity bouquet with notes of wild berries, cherries and an evident hint of cocoa
wines.palate: Beautifully balanced in the mouth, with moderate acidity and an impressive length, this wine shows its elegance and class
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, BBQ Short Ribs, Braised Lamb Shank, Grilled Ribeye Steak

wines.name: La Salargue Bordeaux Supérieur AOC
wines.description: La Salargue Bordeaux Supérieur is a testament to the esteemed Bordeaux Supérieur appellation, offering a step up in quality and complexity from standard Bordeaux AOC wines. Produced by Vignobles Lassagne, a family winery with three generations of history, this wine embodies a blend of tradition and innovation. Sourced…
wines.nose: Inviting aromas of ripe fruit, black fruits, and cherry, waiting to unfold in the glass
wines.palate: A fleshy, structured, and well-balanced wine, showcasing toasted notes and beautiful, fine, coated tannins. It offers a very elegant and long finish in the mouth
wines.appearance: A captivating deep ruby red color
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, BBQ Short Ribs, Braised Lamb Shank, Grilled Ribeye Steak

wines.name: Château Franc Couplet Bordeaux Supérieur AOC Limited Edition
wines.description: Château Franc Couplet Bordeaux Supérieur Limited Edition is a unique selection from the finest plots of the vineyard, representing a limited quantity of exceptional bottles. This wine undergoes a meticulous maturation process, aged for twelve months in French oak barrels, which contributes to a softened palate and an…
wines.nose: The aroma of the wine is fruity, fresh and slightly spicy due to the aging in oak barrels, with pleasant notes of cherry and plum, complemented by hints of toasted coffee
wines.palate: The taste is medium to full-bodied and dry, revealing dark red fruit that transitions to fine tones. It is balanced with refined tannins, a wide range of fruit flavors including raspberries, cherries, and plums, and a fresh finish. Aging…
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, BBQ Short Ribs, Braised Lamb Shank, Grilled Ribeye Steak

wines.name: Cap Royal Bordeaux Supérieur Rouge AOC
wines.description: Cap Royal Bordeaux Supérieur Rouge is a distinguished expression of Bordeaux, crafted with meticulous attention to detail and benefiting from the expertise of renowned winemakers associated with Grand Cru Classé estates. This wine embodies a singular aromatic profile, marked by a beautiful freshness and rare elegance…
wines.nose: The nose opens with a traditional blend of Cabernet Sauvignon and Merlot, revealing inviting aromas of red fruit, blackberry, and blueberry jam, complemented by spicy and toasted notes
wines.palate: On the palate, it presents a classic Bordeaux medium body with vibrant red berry fruit, supported by silky tannins and a bright acidity on the finish. The richness of the wine is evident through a creamy texture, enhanced by vanilla notes…
wines.appearance: A deep red colour with alluring purple reflections

wines.name: Château La Plaige Bordeaux Supérieur AOC
wines.description: Château La Plaige Bordeaux Supérieur is an exceptional red wine that embodies the rich winemaking tradition of Bordeaux, offering a profile that is both powerful and elegant. Situated on a hillside overlooking the Dordogne river, the estate benefits from a unique combination of clay and limestone soils, contributing…
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, BBQ Short Ribs, Braised Lamb Shank, Grilled Ribeye Steak

wines.name: Château Saintongey Vieilles Vignes Bordeaux AOC
wines.description: Château Saintongey Vieilles Vignes Bordeaux is a superb expression of classic Bordeaux, crafted from old vines that lend exceptional concentration and complexity to the wine. Produced by Les Hauts de Palette, a respected family estate with a legacy dating back to 1859, this wine embodies generations of winemaking…
wines.nose: The nose is warm and intense, offering enticing notes of small black fruits like blackberry and blueberry, beautifully supported by delicate touches of spices
wines.palate: On the palate, it is superb and deliciously balanced, culminating in an intense and sustained finish. This is a truly rich and tasty wine with good depth and structure
wines.appearance: Reveals a superb, bright garnet color, inviting appreciation
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, Duck Confit, Grilled Ribeye Steak, Mushroom Risotto

wines.name: Blanc of Black By Château Cap Léon Veyrin (100% Cabernet in white)
wines.description: Blanc of Black By Château Cap Léon Veyrin (100% Cabernet in white) is a truly pioneering and deliciously atypical wine, born from the ambitious vision of winemaker Julien Meyre to craft a white wine from 100% Cabernet Sauvignon grapes. This rare creation challenges traditional Bordeaux norms, offering a unique…
wines.nose: The freshness is reminiscent of that of a Muscadet, rather than the typical Bordeaux Blanc but also finds a nice tannic structure that gives you a taste of coming back to it
wines.palate: The freshness and liveliness in the mouth resonate like a Hard Rock album and the notes of white peaches dance delicately on the finish like a romantic ballad. A deliciously atypical wine in its shape, texture and fruit
wines.appearance: Very clear, almost transparent, yellow
wines.pairing: Goat Cheese Salad, Grilled Sea Bass, Roast Chicken, Shellfish Platter

wines.name: Cuvée du Moulin du Château Saintongey Vieilles Vignes Entre-deux-Mers
wines.description: Cuvée du Moulin du Château Saintongey Vieilles Vignes Entre-deux-Mers is an exquisite dry white wine from Bordeaux, crafted from old vines (“Vieilles Vignes”) that impart remarkable depth and concentration. This wine embodies the rich winemaking legacy of Les Hauts de Palette, a family estate with roots in Bordeaux…
wines.nose: The nose offers an impression of freshness with its aromas mixed with white-fleshed fruits and exoticism enhanced by a note of citrus fruits
wines.palate: The mouth offers a lively and ample attack, unfolding on freshness and fruitiness. The length and retro-olfaction evoke the typicality of Sauvignon Blanc and Gris
wines.pairing: Goat Cheese Salad, Grilled Sea Bass, Roast Chicken, Shellfish Platter

wines.name: La Burgondie Montagny 1er Cru Les Coères
wines.description: La Burgondie Montagny 1er Cru Les Coères is an exquisite expression of 100% Chardonnay from Burgundy’s Côte Chalonnaise, renowned for its exceptional mineral subtlety and rich, powerful character. This Premier Cru wine embodies the meticulous craftsmanship of La Burgondie, a collective dedicated to sustainable…
wines.nose: Aromas of fruits and flowers with notes of candied quince and almond
wines.palate: Frank, rich, the mouth is structured with a beautiful mineral finish
wines.pairing: Goat Cheese Tart, Grilled Scallops, Lemon Herb Chicken, Oysters Mignonette

wines.name: La Burgondie Saint-Bris Sauvignon Blanc COMING SOOM
wines.description: La Burgondie Saint-Bris Sauvignon Blanc is a captivating expression of Burgundy’s unique terroir, standing out as the region’s only appellation dedicated to Sauvignon Blanc. This wine offers a lively and fresh character, shaped by the renowned Kimmeridgian soils it shares with its prestigious Chablis neighbors. It’s a…
wines.nose: An expressive bouquet featuring vibrant notes of citrus fruits like grapefruit and mandarin, intertwined with exotic hints of lychee and mango, and subtle undertones of broom and boxwood
wines.palate: Tense and thirst-quenching on the palate, delivering a crisp, lively sensation with a beautifully tangy finish
wines.pairing: Goat Cheese Salad, Grilled Sea Bass, Roast Chicken, Shellfish Platter

wines.name: La Burgondie Bourgogne Aligoté Les Chailloux Silex
wines.description: La Burgondie Bourgogne Aligoté Les Chailloux Silex is a captivating white wine that draws its unique character from a meticulous plot selection in the heart of Burgundy’s Côte Chalonnaise. This Aligoté showcases the distinct singularity imparted by its terroir, where vines thrive on limestone and marl hills rich in…
wines.appearance: Pale gold, crystalline with
wines.pairing: Goat Cheese Salad, Grilled Sea Bass, Roast Chicken, Shellfish Platter

wines.name: Domaine de Fiervaux Les Écobues Saumur Chenin Blanc
wines.description: Domaine de Fiervaux Les Écobues Saumur Chenin Blanc is an exquisite expression of its Loire Valley origins, showcasing the renowned complexity of the Chenin Blanc grape, also known as Pineau Blanc de la Loire. This wine offers an unmistakable territorial profile, characterized by vibrant citrus and mentholated notes…
wines.nose: The nose expresses an olfactory profile of unmistakable territorial origin, all played on citrus notes, grapefruit and lemon, and mentholated hints followed by scents of chamomile, hay and white peach
wines.palate: Elegant, fine, wonderfully defined also in the mouth, where freshness and acidity chase each other until a soft and long finish
wines.pairing: Goat Cheese Salad, Grilled Sea Bass, Roast Chicken, Shellfish Platter

wines.name: Clos de Nouys Vouvray Sec AOP
wines.description: Clos de Nouys Vouvray Sec is a quintessential expression of dry Vouvray, showcasing the purest and most crystalline qualities of the Chenin Blanc grape. This wine is celebrated for its natural vivacity and refined minerality, a true signature of the Loire Valley’s unique terroir.
wines.nose: The nose is intense and fruity with notes of white flowers and quince
wines.palate: The palate is frank and well balanced with aromas of dried fruits, a fresh structure and aromatic finish
wines.pairing: Goat Cheese Salad, Grilled Sea Bass, Roast Chicken, Shellfish Platter

wines.name: Château de Pocé Touraine Sauvignon Blanc AOP
wines.description: Château de Pocé Touraine Sauvignon Blanc is a captivating expression of the Loire Valley, crafted by the esteemed Domaine Chainier, a family with winemaking roots tracing back to the 18th century. This wine hails from the historic Château de Pocé, a 15th-century estate nestled within the UNESCO world heritage site…
wines.nose: This refreshing wine reveals delicate aromas of grapefruits, peach, and white flowers, with subtle hints of fine green vegetal notes
wines.palate: The mouth is round and well balanced with good persistence, offering a delightful and precise palate
wines.pairing: Goat Cheese Salad, Grilled Sea Bass, Roast Chicken, Shellfish Platter

wines.name: Amayna Sauvignon Blanc COMING SOON
wines.description: Amayna Sauvignon Blanc is a distinctive and elegant wine, renowned for its complexity and concentrated flavors, reflecting the unique terroir of the Leyda Valley. It is considered Chile’s answer to a focused and mineralic Sancerre, offering a full and balanced expression with exquisite personality. The vineyards…
wines.nose: Shows a good intensity and complexity of fresh lime and a mineral sensation. After a few minutes shows some tropical notes like physalis fruit with a hint of fresh pineapple and white peach. It finishes with a gentle herbal character very…
wines.palate: In mouth is concentrated with a balanced acidity that gives a creamy and fresh feeling with a good contrast of a salinity taste in the back palate
wines.pairing: Goat Cheese Salad, Grilled Sea Bass, Roast Chicken, Shellfish Platter

wines.name: Luma Chequén Gran Reserva Carménère COMING SOON
wines.description: Luma Chequén Gran Reserva Carménère is an exceptional Chilean red wine, revealing elegance, complexity, and a sumptuous concentration of flavors. Crafted by Invina, a dedicated family-owned winery with over two decades of viticultural expertise in the Maule Valley, this wine is a testament to meticulous winemaking. It…
wines.palate: Enjoy a complex and plush palate featuring rich flavors of blueberries, chocolate, and spices, alongside notes of prunes, ground pepper, and dried leaves, all delivered with a smooth, creamy mouthfeel. It offers a vibrant and well-balanced…
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, BBQ Short Ribs, Braised Lamb Shank, Grilled Ribeye Steak

wines.name: Schild Estate Barossa Shiraz (1,500ml)
wines.description: Schild Estate Barossa Shiraz (1,500ml) is a classic expression of Barossa Shiraz, crafted with exceptional elegance by a family deeply rooted in the region since 1952. This wine embodies generations of viticultural wisdom, showcasing vibrant fruit flavours, balance, and a super-fine tannin structure derived from…
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, BBQ Short Ribs, Braised Lamb Shank, Grilled Ribeye Steak

wines.name: Schild Estate Clare Valley Riesling
wines.description: Schild Estate Clare Valley Riesling is a vibrant and precise expression of Australian Riesling, showcasing the distinctive qualities of the Clare Valley. Crafted with authenticity and passion by a family with generations of winemaking history, this wine embodies a fresh, mineral-driven style with intense citrus…
wines.nose: Highly scented exotic aromas of lemon, lime citrus, crunchy green apple and perfumed floral notes
wines.palate: Refreshing and bright, the palate is fine and precise with beautiful minerally acidity. It has a crunchy and lively feel through to a very long finish. An excellent illustration of Polish Hill in the Clare Valley
wines.pairing: Goat Cheese Salad, Grilled Sea Bass, Roast Chicken, Shellfish Platter

wines.name: Thompson Steer Single Vineyard Shiraz Coonawarra
wines.description: Thompson Steer Single Vineyard Shiraz Coonawarra is a captivating expression of Coonawarra’s esteemed terroir, named after the meandering lakes and adjoining fields to the vineyards that define its unique origin. This single vineyard Shiraz reflects the distinct qualities of its vineyard location, offering a premium…
wines.nose: Gorgeously fruited and inviting on the nose showing black/blueberry, rich floral and cedary oak characters with a hint of dried herb complexity
wines.palate: The palate is superbly concentrated and weighted, offering plush texture backed by fine-grained tannins, finishing impressively long and satisfying. Wonderfully composed and styled, offering terrific drinking
wines.pairing: Braised Beef Short Ribs, Grilled Lamb Chops, Peppercorn Steak, Smoked Brisket

wines.name: Magarey Lane Glenroy Coonawarra Cabernet Sauvignon
wines.description: Magarey Lane Glenroy Coonawarra Cabernet Sauvignon is a distinguished Australian Cabernet Sauvignon, hailing from Coonawarra’s renowned Terra Rossa soil. This wine is crafted from mature, largely unirrigated vines planted in 1989, yielding wonderfully ripe and concentrated fruit that expresses the unique terroir of…
wines.nose: This fruit-driven wine offers rich notes of blackcurrant, plum, and morello cherry
wines.palate: Touches of oak, chocolate, and vanilla bean complete the rich, round palate. It is a muscular wine with good layers of spice and a nice dry finish to the tannins, still retaining plenty of youth and vibrancy in its tightly coiled package
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar, Beef Wellington, Grilled Lamb Chops, Mushroom Risotto

wines.name: Magarey Lane Limestone Coast Shiraz
wines.description: Magarey Lane Limestone Coast Shiraz is a vibrantly composed and sensually appealing Australian Shiraz, crafted from mature, largely unirrigated vines that yield wonderfully ripe and concentrated fruit. It embodies the unique terroir of the Limestone Coast, delivering a harmonious balance of bold fruit, subtle spice…
wines.nose: This Shiraz delivers bold dark-fruits along with rich red-berry concentrates
wines.palate: Touches of subtle oak and pepper complete the palate, supported by a fine tannin structure, leading to a velvety mouthfeel
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, BBQ Short Ribs, Braised Lamb Shank, Grilled Ribeye Steak

wines.name: Reschke Vitulus Cabernet Sauvignon (1,500ml)
wines.description: Reschke Vitulus Cabernet Sauvignon (1,500ml) is a distinguished Australian Cabernet Sauvignon, meticulously crafted from low-yielding vineyards nestled in Coonawarra’s renowned Terra Rossa soil. This wine embodies a unique blend of elegance, depth, and complexity, reflecting the exceptional terroir of its origin. The…
wines.nose: The nose reveals hints of green peppercorn and forest floor, complemented by notes of dark berries and cassis
wines.palate: The palate delivers fruit intensity with flavours of blackcurrant and blueberry, intertwined with refreshing dried herbs. Sandy tannins and integrated vanillin oak characteristics contribute to a long and engaging finish
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, BBQ Short Ribs, Braised Lamb Shank, Grilled Ribeye Steak

wines.name: Reschke Bull Trader Shiraz
wines.description: Reschke Bull Trader Shiraz is a testament to Coonawarra’s renowned terroir and Reschke’s rich cattle grazing heritage, reflected in its distinctive name and bull logo. Crafted from exceptional estate-grown grapes, this wine embodies a plush, generous, and ripe style, showcasing the modern vibrancy of Coonawarra…
wines.nose: The notes of blackberry, cherry and dark chocolate are balanced with subtle spicy oak characters
wines.palate: This Shiraz is full bodied with a smooth rich texture. The lengthy palate is concentrated and mouth filling, displaying outstanding depth and intensity
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, BBQ Short Ribs, Braised Lamb Shank, Grilled Ribeye Steak

wines.name: Reschke R-Series Pinot Noir
wines.description: Reschke R-Series Pinot Noir is a complex and vibrant cool-climate expression, crafted by a producer with a rich viticultural heritage in South Australia’s renowned Limestone Coast. This wine stands out for its elegant structure and a captivating blend of fruit and earthy undertones, reflecting Reschke’s commitment to…
wines.nose: Expressions of vibrant crisp red fruit, tart plum, red cherry with overtones of textured forest floor and subtle oak complete this complex varietal cool climate Pinot Noir
wines.palate: This Pinot Noir is a medium bodied, firmly structured wine with a round and textured palate
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, BBQ Short Ribs, Braised Lamb Shank, Grilled Ribeye Steak

wines.name: Stonehaven Limited Vineyard Release Padthaway Shiraz
wines.description: Stonehaven Limited Vineyard Release Padthaway Shiraz is a distinguished Australian Shiraz, showcasing the exceptional depth and quality that emanates from the renowned Padthaway region. This wine stands out for its velvety-rich and smooth profile, a true expression of both its unique place of origin and the varietal’s…
wines.nose: Lingering scents of dark cherry and olive, offering a very good expression of both place and variety, complemented by notes of blackberries, dark plums, truffles, chocolate, aniseed, bay leaves, and dry herbs
wines.palate: This Shiraz is a velvety-rich and smooth wine with bright red berries and pepper spice on the palate, delivering intensely flavoured dark red and black fruit characters with a well-rounded mid-palate for a lasting impression
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Plate, BBQ Short Ribs, Braised Lamb Shank, Grilled Ribeye Steak

wines.name: Stonehaven Stepping Stone Shiraz
wines.description: Stonehaven Stepping Stone Shiraz is a bold and fruit-forward Australian Shiraz, crafted to express the unique qualities of the Limestone Coast. This captivating wine offers a rich tapestry of dark berry fruits and exotic spices, making it a truly engaging experience for the palate.
wines.nose: Its lingering nose reveals dark berry fruits, violet petals and spices with subtle oak, adding toasted notes and hints of brambly sweetness, complemented by nuances of licorice and chocolate undertones
wines.palate: A bold and fruit-forward wine characterized by plentiful black fruit flavours and a full, rounded palate. With captivating exotic spices and subtle, silky tannins, it enchants the palate through to its elegant finish
wines.pairing: Aged Cheddar Platter, Grilled Lamb Chops, Hearty Mushroom Risotto, Slow-Cooked Brisket

wines.name: M.Chapoutier Temenos Cornas
wines.description: M.Chapoutier Temenos Cornas is a Cornas Syrah of rare intensity, capturing the granite terroir with bold fruit, refined spice, and a structure built for aging. It is an intense, structured, and muscular wine, offering superb concentration and classical Syrah characteristics.
wines.nose: A reductive nose reveals notes of graphite, black fruit jelly, and laurel, complemented by hints of cedar, fig leaf, espresso, smoke, and crushed rock. Expect nuances of dark berries, earth, and spices
wines.palate: Expansive on entry, with a rich mid-palate framed by velvety tannins. It delivers layers of ripe black fruit, dark cherries, plums, spice, and subtle sooty notes, showcasing a balance between freshness and power
wines.appearance: Deep black hue flecked with youthful purple highlights

wines.name: Maverick Twins Barrel Select Shiraz
wines.description: Maverick Twins Barrel Select Shiraz is a testament to Barossa Valley’s rich winemaking heritage, crafted from biodynamically-farmed estate fruits from the esteemed Ahrens’ Creek and Barossa Ridge vineyards in Vine Vale. This distinctive Shiraz, aged for 18 months in oak barrels, embodies a “light-touch” winemaking…
wines.nose: Complex, multifaceted aromas of plum, blackberry, blueberry and violet, which are gradually complemented by spice accents and toasty oak aromas
wines.palate: On the palate, it’s full-bodied and rich, with flavors of ripe blackberry, dark chocolate and spice. The tannins are firm and silky, giving the wine a long and satisfying finish

wines.name: Castagner Grappa Prosecco Ice
wines.description: Castagner Grappa Prosecco Ice is an innovative white grappa crafted from the pomace of Glera grapes, the same varietal used to produce Prosecco. This spirit is specifically designed to be enjoyed chilled, representing a modern revolution in grappa consumption. It is produced using the advanced “Pure Peel system,”…
wines.nose: A fresh and elegant nose revealing delicate fruity and floral aromas typical of Prosecco, including notes of green apple, pear, citrus, peach, apricot, and almond, enriched by spring floral hints of elderberry and mimosa
wines.palate: Soft, fine, and velvety on the palate, with a light-bodied and crisp profile. Flavors of ripe apple, lemon zest, and a touch of honey create a clean and refined experience
wines.appearance: Crystal clear and brilliant

wines.name: Monteabellón 14 Meses En Barrica Tempranillo Ribera del Duero DO
wines.description: Monteabellón 14 Meses En Barrica Tempranillo Ribera del Duero is a testament to generations of winemaking expertise, crafted by the García family in the esteemed Ribera del Duero region of Spain. This exceptional Tempranillo is born from high-altitude vineyards featuring clay-calcareous soils with limestone, yielding…
wines.nose: Intense aroma of candied fruit, sweet spices perfectly blended with quality oak for an elegant finish
wines.palate: Very flavorful on the palate, powerful and fruity, with ripe tannins

wines.name: Monteabellón 5 Meses En Barrica Tempranillo Ribera del Duero DO
wines.description: Monteabellón 5 Meses En Barrica Tempranillo Ribera del Duero is a vibrant expression of 100% Tempranillo, meticulously crafted by the esteemed family-owned Bodegas Monteabellón. This wine stands out for its characteristic fruity freshness, achieved through at least five months of aging in a balanced blend of 50%…
wines.nose: Intense aromas with well marked fruity sensations of blackberry and blueberry, perfectly integrated with the quality oak that envelops everything
wines.palate: Good structure and fruity expression on the palate, powerful and with ripe tannins

wines.name: Muriel Viña Viejas Gran Reserva Rioja DOCa
wines.description: Muriel Viña Viejas Gran Reserva Rioja DOCa is a testament to the esteemed winemaking traditions of Rioja, crafted from 100% Tempranillo grapes sourced from old vines in the heart of Rioja Alavesa and select areas of Rioja Alta. This Gran Reserva exemplifies elegance and complexity, a result of meticulous aging and a…
wines.nose: An aromatic explosion of aging notes such as vanilla, roasted coffee, and spices, complemented by very ripe fruit like raisins and caramel, with subtle hints of bottle aging including leather and tobacco
wines.palate: Its perfectly blended, smooth, and silky flavor stands out, offering a very long finish with a velvety sensation and a very pleasant aftertaste

wines.name: Muriel Vino De Elciego Rioja Reserva DOCa
wines.description: Muriel Vino De Elciego Rioja Reserva DOCa is a distinguished expression of 100% Tempranillo, meticulously crafted from selected 35-year-old vineyards in Elciego, a town renowned for its exceptional terroir within Rioja Alavesa. This Reserva embodies the Muriel Wines philosophy of blending long-held winemaking…
wines.nose: Very complex and intense nose, with fine aromas o
wines.palate: On the palate, it is balanced and elegant, standing out for its freshness and a long and intense finish that leaves a concentrated and persistent impression

wines.name: Finca La Selva Tempranillo Rioja DOCa
wines.description: Finca La Selva Tempranillo Rioja DOCa is an exceptional red wine, crafted from 100% Tempranillo grapes grown on the single ‘La Selva’ estate. Situated on a mountainside at 500 to 600 meters in Hornos de Moncalvillo within Rioja Alta, this wine benefits from a cool vineyard environment, resulting in an unmistakably…
wines.nose: It has the fresh and juicy fruit of a young wine, combined with the touch of spicy oak flavours
wines.palate: Exceptionally soft palate, pleasant and easy to drink

wines.name: Viña Amate Crianza Rioja DOCa
wines.description: Viña Amate Crianza Rioja DOCa is a classic expression of Rioja, renowned for its balance of vibrant fruit and subtle oak influence. This Crianza embodies the region’s winemaking tradition, crafted from old vines between 50 and 100 years old, grown across diverse altitudes and soil types to yield exceptional…
wines.nose: Enticing aromas of warm summer berry pudding, strawberries, blackberries and stewed plum, elegantly interwoven with wafts of vanilla cream, toasted brioche and wild herbs
wines.palate: The palate is rich and soft, revealing layers of dark fruit supported by melt-in-the-mouth tannins. Hints of coffee, hazelnut, chocolate and vanilla lead to a long, smooth finish
wines.appearance: A captivating dark cherry in colour

wines.name: Porrais Signature Douro Tinto DOC
wines.grape: Sousão, Tinta Barroca, Touriga Franca, Touriga Nacional
wines.description: Porrais Signature Douro Tinto is an exceptional red wine crafted by Casa Santos Lima, showcasing the unique character of Portugal’s historic Douro Valley. This wine reflects the structure and distinct mineral texture derived from the region’s schist soils and ancient vines, many over 100 years old, planted at an…
wines.palate: In the mouth reveals excellent structure and elegance, again with notes of ripe red fruits combined with oak notes

wines.name: José Maria da Fonseca Waterdog Red
wines.description: José Maria da Fonseca Waterdog Red is a delightful and distinctive red blend, celebrating the spirit of the Portuguese Waterdog, a loyal and intelligent breed native to the southern coast of Portugal, near where the winery originates. This wine is crafted with a meticulous blend of Castelão and Touriga Nacional…
wines.nose: Floral with roses and violets, characteristic of the Touriga Nacional grape variety, complemented by hints of sweet spices and chocolate, alongside ripe berries, blueberries, and black currant
wines.palate: Juicy and flavorful, presenting a harmonious mixture of red and black berries in a medium to full body. It is supported by firm, yet soft, tannins, offering a well-balanced palate with notes of dark fruits, spice, oak, and a touch of wood

wines.name: José Maria da Fonseca Waterdog White
wines.description: José Maria da Fonseca Waterdog White is a captivating Portuguese white wine, named after the loving, loyal, and intelligent Portuguese Waterdogs, a breed originating near the winery’s home on the southern coast of Portugal. This unique blend of Arinto and Fernão Pires offers an aromatic profile of peach and pineapple…
wines.nose: On the nose it has aromas of mango and very ripe pineapple, dried fruits, almonds and hazelnuts
wines.palate: It has a palate of ripe mango and pineapple, it is very velvety and soft. Waterdog has a long persistent mouth

wines.name: Arivat Negra Mole Algarve Tinto
wines.description: Arivat Negra Mole Algarve Tinto is an authentic expression of the Algarve, crafted from the region’s indigenous Negra Mole grape, one of Portugal’s oldest varietals, offering a unique and elegant profile. This wine embodies the richness of its origin, showcasing a delicate yet complex character that is both refreshing…
wines.nose: The nose reveals a complex aromatic profile featuring floral and cherry notes, with hints of onion skins, pepper, and wild roses
wines.palate: Good acidity, a broad, silky texture with soft tannins and a round, opulent body, yet with smoothness and depth. It culminates in a long, elegant finish
wines.appearance: Light red rosé-colored. [

wines.name: Casa Santos Lima Touriga Nacional Lisboa Tinto
wines.description: Casa Santos Lima Touriga Nacional Lisboa Tinto is a captivating expression of Portugal’s most esteemed red grape, Touriga Nacional, crafted by one of the country’s most awarded wineries, Casa Santos Lima. This wine showcases the exceptional characteristics of its varietal with an excellent concentration in color and…
wines.nose: Notes of flowers and chocolate combine perfectly with the oak, complemented by hints of ripe black and red fruits, violet, and delicate spices
wines.palate: This full-bodied wine offers a complex palate of juicy plums and dark berry fruit, with elegant and persistent tannins that provide excellent structure. While ready to drink now, its inherent qualities suggest it will become even more…

wines.name: Colossal Reserva Tinto Vinho Regional Lisboa
wines.grape: Alicante Bouschet, Syrah, Tinta Roriz, Touriga Nacional
wines.description: Colossal Reserva Tinto Vinho Regional Lisboa is a magnificent Portuguese red blend, celebrated for its full-bodied character and intense ruby color. This wine is a true Portuguese gem, offering a harmonious balance of ripe black fruit, spicy undertones, and beautifully integrated tannins, culminating in a long, full…
wines.nose: Extremely rich aromas with a predominance of red ripe fruits and some floral notes, well integrated with notes of spices coming from the ageing in French and American oak
wines.palate: In the mouth it shows great complexity with notes of plums and blackberries, well integrated with ripe tannins. The finish is rich and elegant
wines.appearance: An intense ruby colour

wines.name: Confidencial Reserva Tinto Vinho Regional Lisboa
wines.description: Confidencial Reserva Tinto Vinho Regional Lisboa is a captivating Portuguese red blend crafted by Casa Santos Lima, renowned for its unique composition of more than ten confidential grape varieties and its impressive aging potential. This wine undergoes six months of partial aging in 250-liter French and Portuguese…
wines.nose: This wine shows great diversity of complex aromas, such as red fruits and vanilla
wines.palate: Medium body, it reveals sensations of red fruit, harmoniously integrated with wood notes and fine tannins. In the aftertaste, develops smooth and rich flavours, some acidity and complexity, overcoming ripe fruit, chocolate and wood notes
wines.appearance: Dark ruby red

wines.name: Rabo de Gala Tinto Vinho Regional Lisboa Kosher

Produced by the highly awarded Casa Santos Lima, this wine embodies the…

wines.description: Colinas De Lisboa Reserva Lisboa Tinto is a robust and expressive Portuguese red, crafted from a blend of international and indigenous varietals that thrive in the diverse Lisboa region. It boasts an excellent color and aromatic exuberance, offering a delightful journey through ripe fruit and spice, culminating in a…

Inspired by the stunning landscapes of the Lisboa hills, this wine beautifully blends traditional regional grape varieties with international…

The name “Masseria” itself evokes the region’s traditional farmhouses…

wines.name: Masseria Trajone Zinfandel Puglia IGP

This wine embodies the unique terroir of the region, where the warm, sunny climate allows the Zinfandel (Primitivo) grapes to develop luscious, jammy fruit…

Crafted by the Mazzei family, who have been winemakers for over 600 years across 25 generations, this wine originates from the unique single-vineyard site of Siepi. It represents a…

In this exceptional vineyard, protected by encircling woods, Cabernet Sauvignon and Cabernet Franc grapes find ideal conditions to…

wines.palate: In the mouth, the wine is voluminous and soft, balanced by a solid tannic structure, before closing with a persistent crisp finish. It delivers refined power, with a dense and fleshy texture, and Tuscan acidity that keeps it fresh and…

wines.name: Gran Passaia Rosso Toscana IGT

This wine embodies Vallepicciola’s commitment to quality, sustainability, and enhancing the unique Tuscan terroir through a blend of…

This meticulous technique aims for the power often found in an…

wines.palate: The taste is characterized by an important structural richness, where the initial heat is balanced by the typical acidity, offering a long and satisfying development on the palate. It presents as full-bodied and smooth, with vibrant…

This wine embodies the unique qualities of the Franciacorta region, often compared to…

This sparkling wine embodies a delicate Brut style, achieved through careful secondary fermentation in a ‘cuve close’ (Charmat method)…
