This typical regional blend showcases an expressive bouquet and a beautifully balanced palate, crafted with careful…
wines.nose: An open bouquet of red berries, a scent of ripe strawberry and notes of rhubarb
wines.palate: Berry flavours on the palate, a soft body, in a beautiful balance, with pleasant tannins, slightly dry with nice aromatic persistence

wines.name: 5 Nuances – 5 Noble Grapes of France
wines.grape: Abouriou, Cabernet Franc, Cabernet Sauvignon, Malbec, Merlot
wines.description: 5 Nuances – 5 Noble Grapes of France is a captivating red wine from the South West of France, meticulously crafted by Cave de Marmandais. This unique cuvée stands out by harmoniously blending five emblematic grape varieties, including four of Bordeaux’s esteemed noble grapes (Merlot, Malbec, Cabernet Franc, and…
wines.nose: The 5 grape varieties express themselves harmoniously in this cuvée with an intense nose of black fruits, lovely ripe red fruits and hints of toasted spice
wines.palate: Beautifully rich, balanced and long, where the spices extend into a well-proportioned mouthfeel, endowed with a delicious sweetness, supported by fine and flavorful tannins. A complete and charming wine

wines.name: En Rouge et Noir Comte Tolosan IGP (100% Malbec)
wines.description: En Rouge et Noir Comte Tolosan is an expressive 100% Malbec that embodies the convivial spirit and rich winemaking traditions of France’s South West. Crafted by Les Marmandais, this red wine is a testament to cooperation and solidarity, offering a delightful and enchanting experience that is authentically “Sud-Ouest.”
wines.nose: The nose presents a lovely bouquet of small black fruits characteristic of Malbec
wines.palate: On the palate, it is complemented by notes of cherry and supple tannins

wines.name: L’Abondance Rouge Pays d’Oc IGP
wines.description: L’Abondance Rouge Pays d’Oc is a vibrant expression of the Languedoc, crafted by Cave de Roquebrun. This exceptional red wine benefits from the unique schist terroir and sunny Mediterranean microclimate of Roquebrun, allowing Atlantic grape varieties like Merlot and Cabernet Sauvignon to achieve impeccable ripeness…
wines.nose: The Atlantic grape varieties of Merlot and Cabernet Sauvignon thrive in the warmer Mediterranean climate. This guarantees impeccable ripeness, aromas of black fruits (blackcurrant and blueberry) and spices
wines.palate: The taste is intense and fruity with melted tannins and freshness

wines.name: L’Abondance Blanc Pays d’Oc IGP
wines.description: L’Abondance Blanc Pays d’Oc is an exquisite white wine from the renowned Cave de Roquebrun, crafted from a harmonious blend of Viognier, Rolle, and Chardonnay. This wine embodies the unique essence of its Languedoc origins, showcasing a vibrant fruit expression balanced with remarkable freshness and a distinctive…
wines.nose: The gourmet Viognier develops its aromas of peach and apricot, the Rolle brings its vivacity and tone on a bed of grapefruit and citron; the Chardonnay adds tension with floral notes of acacia and hawthorn
wines.palate: The taste is intense and fruity with sapidity and freshness

wines.name: Les Indomptables Pic Saint-Loup AOP
wines.description: Les Indomptables Pic Saint-Loup is a testament to the untamed spirit of its terroir and the dedicated growers who masterfully cultivate the vines despite nature’s whims. This distinguished red wine hails from the Pic Saint-Loup appellation, recognized for its elegant and refined wines, a result of its unique…
wines.nose: An intense bouquet of blackcurrant, cherry, pepper, thyme, and dark chocolate, further enriched by hints of garrigue, spices, liquorice, and violets
wines.palate: Structured and beautifully balanced, revealing luscious red fruit flavors complemented by fine, silky tannins. The palate offers a deep density and velvety texture, with well-integrated tannins ensuring a long and harmonious finish
wines.appearance: A captivating ruby red color adorned with vibrant purple highlights

wines.name: Les Indomptables Faugères AOP
wines.description: Les Indomptables Faugères is a captivating red wine that embodies the untamed spirit of its unique Faugères terroir. Known for its rich, ripe, and complex profile, this wine is a testament to the dedicated vignerons who masterfully cultivate vines in the region’s distinctive schist soils, resulting in a wine of…
wines.nose: Aromas of black fruits, garrigue, licorice, thyme and a spicy touch
wines.palate: Full-bodied and complex, flavors of licorice and blackberry, well-structured tannins

wines.name: M. Chapoutier La Bernardine Châteauneuf-du-Pape Blanc
wines.description: M. Chapoutier La Bernardine Châteauneuf-du-Pape Blanc is a rare and prestigious white wine, representing only about 7% of the Châteauneuf-du-Pape appellation’s total production, making it a true treasure for connoisseurs. Crafted by M. Chapoutier, a pioneer in biodynamic farming since 1991, this wine embodies…

wines.name: M. Chapoutier Deschants Saint-Joseph Blanc
wines.description: M. Chapoutier Deschants Saint-Joseph Blanc is a singular expression of 100% Marsanne, renowned for its ability to convey the unique granitic terroir of Saint-Joseph. This creamy, full-bodied white wine stands out with its elegant balance of stone fruits, delicate floral notes, and a honeyed richness. Crafted by M…
wines.nose: A mineral nose, with characteristic gun-flint from the granitic soil, complemented by roasted aromas and a hint of dried fruits
wines.palate: A frank and round attack on the palate, leading to a floral and honeyed finish

wines.name: Domaine Saint-Étienne Les Albizzias Côtes-du-Rhône Bio
wines.description: Domaine Saint-Étienne Les Albizzias Côtes-du-Rhône Bio is an expressive organic red wine from the renowned M. Chapoutier, a producer deeply committed to biodynamic viticulture and revealing the true character of the terroir. Sourced from vineyard plots in Montfrin, within the southern Côtes-du-Rhône, this wine…
wines.palate: The intense black fruit (blackberries, blackcurrants, cherries) and garrigue scrubland notes are a perfect foil for this wine’s silky tannins which create the lovely complexity so characteristic of the Côtes-du-Rhône

wines.name: Pere Anselme La Fiole Viognier
wines.description: Pere Anselme La Fiole Viognier is an exquisite expression of Pays d’Oc Viognier, crafted by Maison Brotte, a family-owned winery with five generations of winemaking expertise in the Rhône Valley. This wine embodies the spirit of the iconic “La Fiole” collection, renowned for its distinctive twisted bottle, a design…
wines.nose: Fresh and intense aromas of apricot, peach, and jasmine, which gracefully evolve to reveal notes of acacia honey, quince, and ripe peach with time
wines.palate: The initial impression is fresh and smooth, dominated by vibrant apricot and vineyard peach. This leads to a rounder, richer aftertaste featuring delightful dried apricot and honey notes
wines.appearance: A radiant, deep golden yellow

wines.name: Château Cap de Mourlin Saint-Émilion Grand Cru Classé AOC
wines.description: Château Cap de Mourlin Saint-Émilion Grand Cru Classé is an exceptional wine, elevated to the rank of Grand Cru Classé in 1955, renowned for its fine, complex nose subtly hinting at truffles and pepper. Located on Bordeaux’s Right Bank, this Saint-Émilion Grand Cru Classé achieves a perfect harmony between tradition…
wines.nose: This wine seduces with its complex and refined nose, where notes of ripe red and black fruits, accompanied by nuances of tobacco, undergrowth and truffle
wines.palate: On the palate, the wine presents a beautiful freshness and a silky texture. The tannins, perfectly integrated, provide a subtle structure with notes of candied fruits, cocoa and spices. The finish is elegant, marked by a beautiful…

wines.name: Château Barrail de Brisson, Saint-Émilion Grand Cru AOC (100% Merlot)
wines.description: Château Barrail de Brisson, Saint-Émilion Grand Cru is an exquisite red wine that embodies the quintessential elegance and power of its prestigious appellation. Crafted from a small, family-owned vineyard in Vignonet, this wine showcases the unique character of Saint-Émilion through meticulous organic farming…
wines.nose: A pleasant nose of stone red fruits (cherry, plum) which after short breathing evolves towards wilder and more spicy aromas
wines.palate: Powerful palate with great complexity, elegance and roundness. Lingering finish, like a typical nice wine of Saint-Emilion

wines.name: Château Paran Justice, Saint-Émilion Grand Cru AOC
wines.description: Château Paran Justice, Saint-Émilion Grand Cru is a distinguished wine from Saint-Émilion, known for its charm and excellent aging potential. Nestled in Saint-Étienne de Lisse, the estate derives its name from the 1900s unification of two neighboring producers, Château Paran and Château Justice. The vineyard boasts…
wines.nose: Delicate on the nose, yet with notes of rich black fruit and plum slide to an oak-forward and spicy profile
wines.palate: On the palate it has plenty of dense and plumy fruit; it’s juicy and attractive with a fresh core. Complete and long in the mouth with the oak well integrated on the finish

wines.name: Maison 1982 Réserve Saint Émilion Grand Cru AOC
wines.description: Maison Réserve Saint Émilion Grand Cru is a distinguished expression from the Right Bank of Bordeaux, reflecting a higher standard of quality within the Saint-Émilion appellation. Crafted by Maison 1982, part of the historic Teycheney family with roots dating back to 1837, this wine benefits from vineyards cultivated…
wines.nose: The Saint Émilion Grand Cru Maison 1982 has an intense and fruity bouquet, with notes of cherry and strawberry
wines.palate: On the palate, the wine expresses a great delicacy. The tannins are silky and very elegant. The aromatic finish is long

wines.name: Mes 5 Pépites by Bernard Magrez
wines.grape: Cabernet Franc, Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Petit Verdot
wines.description: Mes 5 Pépites by Bernard Magrez is a unique micro-blend of barrels meticulously selected by world-renowned oenologist Michel Rolland from five of Bernard Magrez’s most prestigious châteaux: Pape-Clément Grand Cru Classé, La Tour Carnet Grand Cru Classé, Les Grands Chênes, Fombrauge Grand Cru Classé, and Magrez…
wines.nose: The nose offers captivating scents of wild berries, violets, blackcurrants, blueberries, plums, and mint, beautifully complemented by rich notes of coffee, liquorice, chocolate, cedar, and distinctive cigar box nuances from barrel aging
wines.palate: A silky texture envelops the palate, revealing opulent Merlot fruit intertwined with complex tobacco notes, culminating in an elegant, minute-long finish supported by refined tannins

wines.name: Arthus D’Olivey, Pessac-Leognan AOC
wines.description: Arthus D’Olivey, Pessac-Leognan is a luxurious red Bordeaux wine, hailing from an appellation with an ancient winemaking history dating back to the Romans. This wine embodies the unique qualities of Pessac-Léognan, a region celebrated for its diverse mosaic of soils and microclimates. The terroir is distinguished by…

wines.name: Les Hauts du Tertre, Margaux AOC
wines.grape: Cabernet Franc, Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Petit Verdot
wines.description: Les Hauts du Tertre, Margaux is the elegant second wine of the esteemed Château du Tertre, a Fifth Growth Grand Cru Classé from the prestigious 1855 classification. Crafted with the same meticulous care as its elder, this wine is designed to be approachable and delightful in its youth, showcasing the quintessential…
wines.palate: The palate is dry, with a fresh entry and good acidity with ripe and elegant tannins. Tasty, persistent and with a mineral and earthy finish

wines.name: Château Laffitte Carcasset, Saint-Estèphe Cru Bourgeois
wines.description: Château Laffitte Carcasset, Saint-Estèphe Cru Bourgeois is a quintessential expression of its appellation, known for its classic Saint-Estèphe style: powerful, elegant, and exceptionally well-structured. As one of the oldest estates in Saint-Estèphe, with roots tracing back to 1759, it embodies centuries of winemaking…
wines.nose: First impression in the glass, the wine leads with concentrated blackcurrant and notes of violet florals and a cedar touch, further revealing complex layers of spices, leather, tobacco, and a hint of gravel and menthol
wines.palate: Properly structured as befits a wine from Saint-Estèphe, this also has great black fruits, ripe and already pushing forward. It is a powerful, deep, and elegant wine, showcasing a fine tannic structure that promises excellent aging…

wines.name: Château Segur de Cabanac, Saint-Estèphe AOC
wines.description: Château Segur de Cabanac, Saint-Estèphe is a fine interpretation of the Saint-Estèphe terroir, known for its powerful structure and excellent aging potential. It is a classic, deeply-colored, and well-constituted Saint-Estèphe, combining power with a complex bouquet.
wines.nose: Toasty overtones on the nose alongside rich plum, black fruit, blackberry and pepper. Over time, notes of red fruit and undergrowth develop, sometimes with hints of violets
wines.palate: A full-bodied, fresh, vibrant wine with great structure and mouthfeel on the palate. It is powerful and generous, with fine, elegant tannins and a persistent, harmonious finish

wines.name: Lola Sweet Bordeaux Blanc Moelleux AOP
wines.description: Lola Sweet Bordeaux Blanc Moelleux is an elegant and refined sweet white wine from the heart of Bordeaux, symbolizing the rich tradition of sweet white Bordeaux wines. Crafted by the renowned Vignobles Lassagne, it offers a harmonious balance of natural sweetness and fresh acidity, making it light-footed and never…
wines.nose: Lola Sweet opens with a very expressive bouquet of ripe peach, honeydew, melon, white blossom and subtle hints of citrus
wines.palate: In the mouth the wine is round and supple, with a silky texture. The natural sweetness is beautifully balanced by fresh acidity, which makes for an elegant and refreshing finish. This wine is not cloying, but rather light-footed and…

wines.name: Château de Clotte Castillon Côtes de Bordeaux AOC
wines.grape: Cabernet Franc, Cabernet Sauvignon, Malbec, Merlot
wines.description: Château de Clotte Castillon Côtes de Bordeaux is a captivating wine born from a rich heritage, with the estate dating back to 1782. This wine embodies the unique potential of the Castillon Côtes de Bordeaux appellation, renowned for its bright, fruit-forward profile and smooth tannins. It stands out for its elegant…
wines.nose: A beautiful aroma of black fruit, which, after a few years in the bottle, is enriched with a subtle touch of cigars and leather
wines.palate: On the palate, it is round and full of fruit, with refined tannins and a nice length in the finish
wines.appearance: The wine presents a dark garnet red color

wines.name: Château Cantelaudette Grande Cuvée, Graves de Vayres AOC (100% Merlot)
wines.description: Château Cantelaudette Grande Cuvée, Graves de Vayres is a testament to the Chatelier family’s legacy, representing a deep commitment to crafting expressive Merlot from the heart of Bordeaux. This wine embodies the unique gravelly soils of Graves de Vayres, delivering a profile of supple fruit and a refined structure…
wines.palate: Impression of smoothness confirmed in the mouth with a fleshy and voluptuous tannic structure, characterized by flavors of morello cherry liqueur and ripe fruits, alongside notes of cherry, red berries, plums, and a long vanilla finish

wines.name: Château Cantelaudette Rouge Réserve , Graves de Vayres AOC (100% Merlot)
wines.description: Château Cantelaudette Rouge Réserve , Graves de Vayres is an elegant and complex red wine, crafted for both roundness and harmony from the Château’s finest Merlot plots. This distinguished French wine embodies a refined, balanced, and subtly complex character, reflecting the dedication of its producer.
wines.nose: The nose reveals a gourmet bouquet with notes of black fruits, pepper and liquorice
wines.palate: On the palate, the wine reveals a perfect balance between the velvety tannins and the sweetness of aging partly carried out in barrels

wines.name: Château Les Grands Chênes, Médoc AOC
wines.description: Château Les Grands Chênes, Médoc is a distinguished “Assimilé Grand Cru,” a term signifying its exceptional quality and authentic expression of terroir, comparable to classified growths despite not being officially ranked. This prestigious property, often hailed as “The Pearl of the Médoc,” has been meticulously…
wines.nose: It displays an aromatic and expressive nose with notes of flowers, blackberry, crushed redcurrants accompanied by subtle touches of liquorice and chocolate
wines.palate: On the palate, this wine expresses hints of blackberry, small red fruits and delicate touches of violet and spices that extend into a tasty finish

wines.name: Médoc de La Tour Carnet, Médoc AOC
wines.description: Médoc de La Tour Carnet, Médoc is a distinguished expression from one of Bordeaux’s oldest continuously active wine producers, Château La Tour Carnet, with parts of its historic fortress dating back to the 11th century. This wine originates from a property uniquely characterized by its medieval architecture, complete…
wines.nose: Expressive, combining strawberry, cherry, menthol and liquorice for a lovely freshness
wines.palate: Silky and delicate, with persistent freshness and a harmonious finish

wines.name: Château Langragnat Bordeaux Supérieur AOC Limited Edition
wines.description: Château Langragnat Bordeaux Supérieur Limited Edition is a testament to meticulous winemaking, crafted from a unique selection of the finest plots and the best oak casks. This dedication ensures a wine of exceptional quality and character, setting it apart as a truly special offering from the esteemed Bordeaux region.
wines.nose: The aroma of the wine is fruity, fresh and slightly spicy due to the aging in oak barrels
wines.palate: The taste is medium to full-bodied, dry with dark red fruit that transitions to fine tones, and the finish is fresh with light tannins

wines.name: Confidentiel by Château Jaron Bordeaux AOP (100% Cabernet Franc)
wines.description: Confidentiel by Château Jaron Bordeaux is a distinctive expression of Bordeaux’s Right Bank, showcasing the elegance and vibrant character of 100% Cabernet Franc. This unique cuvée is crafted with meticulous care from a small plot, offering a wine of exceptional freshness and nuanced complexity.
wines.nose: Big aromatics of ripe red and black berries such as strawberry, dark cherry and plum, complemented by violets, green peppers and subtle earthy notes
wines.palate: The palate is rich with red berries, herbal nuances and a touch of spice and minerals, with a fruity finish with good length and a refreshing acidity

wines.name: LM de Moussas Bordeaux AOP
wines.description: LM de Moussas Bordeaux is an exquisite red wine crafted under the expert guidance of Philippe Castéja and the skilled oenologists of Maison A. de Luze, embodying the essence of Bordeaux’s renowned terroirs. This wine is celebrated for its structured yet balanced profile, showcasing beautiful freshness and the…
wines.nose: It offers fragrant aromas of cocoa and coffee, complemented by a strong blackberry flavor
wines.palate: Well-rounded with spicy notes on the palate, it preserves youthful freshness while revealing the potential of ripe tannins and blackberry flavors
wines.appearance: A captivating dark ruby-garnet hue

wines.name: Les Charmilles du Roy Bordeaux
wines.description: Les Charmilles du Roy Bordeaux is a captivating expression of Bordeaux winemaking, crafted by the historic Les Hauts de Palette, a producer with roots tracing back to 1859. This wine embodies a classic blend, offering an ample, unctuous, and delicious palate supported by silky tannins, which reinforce its amiable and…
wines.nose: Still a little discreet with a nice nose of fresh red fruits. Round and supple, evolving with a pretty floral base
wines.palate: After a very supple attack, the palate reveals itself to be ample, unctuous and delicious, supported by silky tannins, which reinforce this amiable side

wines.name: Les Caprices d’Anaïs Bordeaux Rosé AOC
wines.description: Les Caprices d’Anaïs Bordeaux Rosé is an exquisite AOC Bordeaux rosé, crafted as a pressed rosé from 100% Cabernet Franc grapes harvested at perfect maturity. This wine embodies the spirit of Bordeaux with a unique blend of freshness, lively character, and an elegant finish that leaves you longing for the next sip.
wines.nose: In the glass, this wine reveals an expressive bouquet of ripe red berries, raspberries and subtle floral notes
wines.palate: The taste is fresh, lively and perfectly balanced, with an elegant aftertaste that makes it long for the next sip

wines.name: Domaine Patrick Pestre Savigny-Les-Beaune Premier Cru Aux Serpentieres
wines.description: Domaine Patrick Pestre Savigny-Les-Beaune Premier Cru Aux Serpentieres is an exquisite 100% Pinot Noir from a prestigious Premier Cru vineyard in the heart of Burgundy’s Côte de Beaune. This wine embodies the unique terroir of the “Aux Serpentieres” climat, known for its south-facing slopes and distinctive stony soil…
wines.nose: Delicate bouquet of red berries and spices
wines.palate: The mouth is complex, fruity and generous with a long lasting finish, showcasing a graceful structure, velvety texture, and elegant tannins

wines.name: Domaine Patrick Pestre Savigny-Les-Beaune Les Petits Picotins
wines.description: Domaine Patrick Pestre Savigny-Les-Beaune Les Petits Picotins is an impeccable example of red Burgundy wine, renowned for its distinctive character and finesse. This elegant Pinot Noir embodies the unique terroir of Savigny-lès-Beaune, reflecting the producer’s commitment to organic cultivation and a deep respect for…

wines.name: Domaine Patrick Pestre Bourgone Hautes Côtes de Beaune Rouge
wines.description: Domaine Patrick Pestre Bourgogne Hautes Côtes de Beaune Rouge is an exquisite expression of Pinot Noir from the elevated slopes of Burgundy, where the semi-continental climate and unique terroir contribute to its distinctive character. This wine is crafted by Domaine Patrick Pestre, an estate established in 1992…
wines.nose: Intense aromas of fresh red berries with elegant notes of spices, often revealing hints of cherry, raspberry, and subtle pepper or licorice
wines.palate: Lively in the mouth, with a good tannic structure and an elegant, persistent finish. Expect fresh, mineral, and fruity notes, often complemented by earthy undertones

wines.name: Domaine Patrick Pestre Savigny-Les-Beaune Les Vermots
wines.description: Domaine Patrick Pestre Savigny-Les-Beaune Les Vermots is an exquisite expression of Burgundian Chardonnay, crafted by a producer dedicated to organic cultivation since its establishment in 1992. This white wine embodies the vibrant character for which Savigny-lès-Beaune is renowned, offering a harmonious balance of…
wines.nose: Delicate floral nose with citrus notes
wines.palate: In the mouth it is fresh and vivid with a good complexity

wines.name: Domaine Patrick Pestre Auxey-Duresses
wines.description: Domaine Patrick Pestre Auxey-Duresses is a captivating white Burgundy, a true hidden gem from the Côte de Beaune known for offering exceptional value and character. This wine embodies the fresh, mineral-driven elegance typical of Auxey-Duresses, a lesser-known appellation nestled between the famed villages of Volnay…
wines.nose: A delightful nose of crisp green apple, complemented by delicate floral notes. Further nuances of fresh almond and subtle mineral hints can also be detected
wines.palate: The palate is remarkably fresh and well-balanced, offering a lively and persistent finish with a pleasant, often oily body

wines.name: Domaine Patrick Pestre Bourgone Hautes Côtes de Beaune Blanc COMING SOON
wines.description: Domaine Patrick Pestre Bourgogne Hautes Côtes de Beaune Blanc is an elegant and crisp white wine, meticulously crafted from 100% Chardonnay grapes grown in the elevated vineyards of the Hautes Côtes de Beaune. This wine embodies the Domaine’s commitment to organic cultivation, resulting in a rich and aromatic…
wines.palate: Fresh in the mouth with a pronounced minerality, balanced by crisp acidity and a delightful fruity citrus finish

wines.name: La Burgondie Givry Rouge
wines.description: La Burgondie Givry Rouge is an elegant and finely structured Pinot Noir from the esteemed Givry appellation in Burgundy’s Côte Chalonnaise. This wine embodies the collective passion and expertise of La Burgondie’s cooperative winemakers, who are dedicated to sustainable practices and showcasing the unique diversity of…
wines.nose: Aromas of red and black fruits with a hint of liquorice
wines.palate: Structured and powerful in the mouth, it is elegant with silky tannins

wines.name: Domaine De Fiervaux Le Haut des Bournais Saumur Rouge AOP
wines.description: Domaine De Fiervaux Le Haut des Bournais Saumur Rouge is a vibrant expression of Saumur Cabernet Franc, crafted by a family estate with a rich history dating back to 1890. This wine embodies the unique argilo-calcaire and schistous terroir of the region, delivering a delightful balance of fresh fruit and subtle spice…
wines.nose: Light and fresh, with aromas of red fruit (blackcurrant, raspberry, wild strawberry) and violet
wines.palate: The lively attack opens on a peppery, acidic side. The palate is supple, aromatic and round with notes of red fruit

wines.name: Les Petits Princes Valençay Blanc Val De Loire AOP
wines.description: Les Petits Princes Valençay Blanc Val De Loire is a distinctive white wine from the heart of France’s Loire Valley, crafted by the esteemed family-owned Huteau Boulanger winery. This wine stands out in the Loire for its elegant blend of Sauvignon Blanc and Chardonnay, a characteristic signature of the Valençay…
wines.nose: Powerful, intense aromas of white flowers and white-fleshed fruit, followed by more smoky and mineral notes with hints of gunflint which complete the nose of this wine
wines.palate: On the palate, white-fleshed fruit such as peach and apricot combines with cassis, enhanced by notes of citrus and exotic fruit. Maturation on fine lees brings power and length, while the malolactic fermentation gives a hint of hazelnut on…

wines.name: Louis Perdrier Brut Rosé (1,500ml)
wines.description: Louis Perdrier Brut Rosé (1,500ml) is a delightful and elegant French sparkling rosé, known for its vibrant character and approachable charm. Crafted from a blend of carefully selected red grape varietals, it offers a beautifully balanced profile with bright fruit flavors and a gentle sweetness, making it a versatile…
wines.nose: On the nose, this wine sports forward red fruits scents combined with refreshing citrus aromas
wines.palate: A well-balanced wine, showing on the palate the same aromatic fruity flavours as the bouquet, with pronounced ripe raspberry candy flavors. It is a soft, lightly sweet, and gentle sparkling wine
wines.appearance: A nice rosé colour with a persistent mousse followed by numerous and fine bubbles

wines.name: Gnarly Head Shiraz
wines.description: Gnarly Head Shiraz is a vibrant, fruit-forward and full-bodied wine that marks a daring departure for Gnarly Head, venturing beyond its Californian roots to the old and gnarly vineyards of South Australia. This Shiraz embodies a bold character, showcasing the region’s ability to produce wines with exceptional quality…
wines.nose: A vibrant, fruit-forward wine with bright red berry aromas, complemented by subtle toasty oak, spicy notes, vanilla, and rich floral hints
wines.palate: Ripe plum and luscious red fruit flavors dominate the palate, enhanced by a touch of vanilla spice. This full-bodied Shiraz features integrated and soft tannins, offering a smooth mouth-feeling and a lengthy finish with lingering oak…

wines.name: Whitesands Estate Brut Cuvée
wines.description: Whitesands Estate Brut Cuvée is a beautiful example of a 100% Chardonnay sparkling wine, offering a refreshing and classic sparkling experience in a crisp, dry, frizzante style. This wine captures the essence of Australia, embodying the spirit of a prized Australian native with its own distinguishing features.
wines.nose: Aromas of pear, peach, citrus, and florals
wines.palate: A delicious palate presents flavors of fresh green apple, lemon, and lime. The bubbles are lively and creamy, balanced by a zesty acidity, leading to a crisp finish

wines.name: Andeluna Altitud Pinot Noir
wines.description: Andeluna Altitud Pinot Noir is a refined expression of high-altitude winemaking, embodying the ultimate character of its Andean origins. Crafted from vineyards situated over 1,200 meters above sea level in Tupungato, this wine is a passionate tribute to the soil, its unique altitude, the majestic Andes, and the soft…
wines.nose: Fresh red fruits and berries, like raspberry, strawberries and cherries. Intense and fresh floral notes predominate, interlaced with aromatic herbs such as mint
wines.palate: Silky, light and juicy. Balanced acidity and minerality, very true to its origins

wines.name: Malbicho Chardonnay
wines.description: Malbicho Chardonnay is an exceptional Argentine Chardonnay crafted by Malbicho, a producer embodying the spirit of a free-thinker who challenges tradition and dares to create something new. This wine stands out with its smooth, mouth-filling sensation and unique character, reflecting the distinct terroir of Mendoza.
wines.nose: The nose presents fruity notes evoking the freshness of green apple and pear, complemented by a subtle floral touch
wines.palate: The palate is fresh and fruity, with very pleasant acidity. It has a smooth and fresh mouthfeel with a complex, pleasant, and rounded finish

wines.name: Inca Malbec
wines.description: Inca Malbec is an exceptional expression of Argentina’s high-altitude viticulture, crafted in a modern style with cooler temperatures to preserve the delicate fruity character of the Malbec grape. This wine stands out for its fruit-forward profile, presenting a persistent and well-balanced experience that is both…
wines.nose: Ripe black fruits, blackberries and prunes on the nose, with notes of sweet tomato, lavender, caramel and cocoa
wines.palate: Spicy on the palate, with good structure and acidity leading to a velvety finish

wines.name: Malbicho Cabernet Sauvignon
wines.description: Malbicho Cabernet Sauvignon is an exceptional expression of Argentine winemaking, crafted by a producer that embodies the spirit of the free-thinker, daring to challenge tradition. Sourced from the high-altitude vineyards of Mendoza’s Uco Valley, nestled in the Andes Mountains, this wine benefits from a unique terroir…
wines.nose: The nose reveals black fruits, hints of pepper, and light notes of eucalyptus, with a soft toasted note and vanilla on the finish
wines.palate: The palate is medium-bodied and ripe with firm tannins, leading to an elegant finish

wines.name: Malbicho Malbec
wines.description: Malbicho Malbec is an expressive and unique Argentine Malbec, embodying the spirit of its name, which in local slang refers to someone who defies rules and challenges tradition. This estate-bottled wine, with 50% aged in French oak, offers a distinctive character that sets it apart.
wines.nose: A great Argentinean Malbec offering aromas of red fruits and plums with violets and subtle, toasty vanilla notes
wines.palate: Medium-bodied in the mouth, the style is soft, juicy and well-balanced with delicious red and dark berries fruits to the fore
wines.pairing: BBQ Ribs, Blue Cheese Burger, Burgers, Mushroom Pasta

wines.name: Schild Estate Ben Schild Barossa Shiraz
wines.description: Schild Estate Ben Schild Barossa Shiraz is a profound and expressive tribute to the family’s patriarch, Ben Schild, embodying generations of Barossa Valley winemaking expertise. Sourced from a dedicated single vineyard overlooking Lyndoch, this Shiraz showcases the bold, rich character and unique terroir for which the…
wines.nose: Starts with engaging aromas of blackberry, dark chocolate and allspice
wines.palate: The sumptuous palate is bright and vibrant with tremendous juicy ripe fruits on display. The slightly chewy and chalky tannins sit perfectly, meanwhile the mix of oak has been precisely chosen. Excellent wine
wines.pairing: mushroom risotto or aged cheeses., Perfect with roasted meats

wines.name: Berlucchi ’61 Franciacorta Extra Brut DOCG (375ml)
wines.description: Berlucchi ’61 Franciacorta Extra Brut (375ml) is a pioneering Italian sparkling wine, a true classic that exemplifies the elegance and sophistication of Franciacorta. Crafted using the traditional “metodo classico,” it offers a dry, crisp, and refined expression, making it a benchmark for quality in Italian bubbles.
wines.nose: Crisp, rich, and elegant, with notes of apple, pear, and a pleasing citrus hint, complemented by white wild flower, bread crust, brioche, and hazelnut nuances
wines.palate: Displays exceptional freshness and zesty acidity with a velvet texture and fine balance. The palate reveals creamy white peach, Golden Delicious apple, lemon drop, and a mineral-driven finish
wines.appearance: Straw-yellow with greenish highlights, presenting a soft mousse and a fine, lingering bead

wines.name: Château Joanin Bécot Castillon Côtes de Bordeaux AOC
wines.description: Château Joanin Bécot Castillon Côtes de Bordeaux is a testament to the potential of its unique clay-limestone terroir, offering exceptional quality and value from the Côtes de Castillon region. Acquired by the renowned Bécot family, also proprietors of Saint-Émilion’s prestigious Château Beau-Séjour Bécot, this wine…
wines.nose: A seductive bouquet of red and black fruits with a vibrant freshness, complemented by enticing hints of mulberry, blueberry, black currant, and blackberry. Underlying notes of licorice, loam, and blackberry jam add complexity
wines.palate: A truly gourmet experience on the palate, offering abundant roundness and a delightful sweetness. The tannins are remarkably fine, velvety, and elegantly integrated, contributing to a harmonious blend of power and finesse with a…
wines.pairing: hard cheeses such as Vieux Comté and desserts made with dark chocolate., Ideal with grilled red meats

wines.name: Château Artigues, Pauillac AOC
wines.description: Château Artigues, Pauillac is a distinguished Cru Bourgeois from the heart of the Médoc, offering the quintessential Pauillac character at an accessible price point due to its proximity to some of the region’s most famous classified estates. This wine is crafted with a commitment to sustainability, holding High…
wines.pairing: A great pairing with rich meaty dishes, baked mushrooms with herbs., game, grilled steaks

wines.name: Château Carbonnieux, Grand Cru Classé de Graves, Pessac-Leognan AOC
wines.grape: Cabernet Franc, Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Petit Verdot
wines.description: Château Carbonnieux, Grand Cru Classé de Graves, Pessac-Leognan is a distinguished wine from an estate with a rich history spanning over seven centuries, renowned for its commitment to excellence in both red and white wine production. This Grand Cru Classé is situated on a superb gravel hill in the heart of…
wines.nose: The nose is very fruity, we easily guess cherry, blackcurrant, and blackberry
wines.palate: This fruity freshness which is also present on the palate stimulates and lengthens the fine and velvety tannins. The finish is highlighted by shades of cloves and eucalyptus. The wine is well-balanced and silky
wines.pairing: and medium-aged cheeses. Try it on rich and tasty fish dishes such as tuna, It goes well with first and second courses based on meat, salmon and swordfish., such as roasts and…

wines.name: 1908 Appassionante Bianco Veneto IGT (Garganega, Sauvignon Blanc)
wines.description: Appassionante Bianco Veneto is a vibrant white blend that puts a fresh spin on classic Venetian style. This wine is a tribute to the Cielo family’s century-long winemaking tradition and a joint venture with the Cantine dei Colli Berici. The name “Cielo e Terra,” meaning “Sky and Land,” beautifully symbolizes the…
wines.nose: Notes of citrus, melon and apricots, almond and acacia flowers, with exciting nuances of exotic fruits
wines.palate: Savoury and light, with every sip this white tickles the palate with its juicy freshness and a long mineral finish, with hints of fresh fruit and white flowers
wines.pairing: Appassionante Bianco pleases everyone’s preferences, ascolana-style stuffed olives, brunches and picnics to informal dinners. Enjoying it alongside rustic spinach pie, fried fish

wines.name: Jean Pabiot “Kiméride” Pouilly-Fumé
wines.description: Jean Pabiot “Kiméride” Pouilly-Fumé is a prestigious expression of Sauvignon Blanc, meticulously crafted as a special parcel selection from the estate’s oldest vines, ranging from 43 to 67 years old. This exceptional cuvée is produced only in the finest vintages, showcasing remarkable richness, concentration, and…
wines.nose: An inviting nose with captivating accents of white fruits and citrus fruits, complemented by a discreet exotic tone
wines.palate: On the palate, it delivers a very expressive attack and a remarkable aromatic intensity, beautifully balanced with vibrant freshness. The impressive length ensures a memorable finish
wines.appearance: Beautiful pale gold color
wines.pairing: Best enjoyed as aperitif. It goes wonderfully with shellfish, blanquette of veal and soft cheeses., etc.), fish (in sauce

wines.name: Esteban Martin Garnacha-Tempranillo-Syrah
wines.description: Esteban Martin Garnacha-Tempranillo-Syrah is a harmonious and expressive red blend from the esteemed Cariñena region of Spain, crafted with a deep commitment to environmental sustainability and organic practices. This wine beautifully showcases the complementary characteristics of its three varietals, offering a…
wines.nose: An enticing bouquet of red fruits such as cherry, complemented by delicate floral aromas and subtle hints of spices. Further notes of ripe red berries, plums, and even a touch of caramel and chocolate can be discerned
wines.palate: Young and fresh on the palate, presenting a light to medium body with abundant fruit and nuanced spicy undertones. It features soft, well-integrated tannins, medium acidity, and a pleasant, refreshing finish
wines.appearance: A medium brilliant ruby hue, inviting and luminous in the glass
wines.pairing: Ideal for light to medium-structured dishes, more intense white meats, roasted or cooked red meats, spices or fresh cheeses.

wines.name: Maia Prosecco Doc Extra Dry Bio
wines.description: Maia Prosecco Doc Extra Dry Bio is an authentic expression of Italian winemaking tradition, crafted with grapes grown according to organic farming principles. This certified organic Prosecco offers a fresh and fruity profile, distinguished by elegant floral notes and a delicate effervescence, embodying both elegance…
wines.nose: On the nose, it presents as slightly aromatic, intense, and elegant, with captivating floral and fruity notes of golden apple, often complemented by hints of acacia flowers
wines.palate: The palate is fresh, harmonious, and persistent, revealing delightful notes of white fruit. A clean acidity balances its extra dry character, culminating in a fine and delicate perlage
wines.appearance: A brilliant straw yellow color, often with subtle greenish nuances, indicative of its freshness and vitality
wines.pairing: Ideal as an aperitif and with light dishes based on vegetables, raw fish or shellfish.

wines.name: Petillant de Listel Litchi-Pamplemousse (flavoured lychee-grapefruit sparkling)
wines.description: Petillant de Listel Litchi-Pamplemousse (flavoured lychee-grapefruit sparkling) is a delightful sparkling grape wine from the South of France, celebrated for its vibrant natural lychee and grapefruit flavors. Crafted through partial fermentation of fresh grape must, this unique beverage boasts a low alcohol content of…
wines.nose: Beautiful lychee and grapefruit aromas
wines.palate: Fine bubbles persistence with gently sweet aftertaste
wines.pairing: aperitif and especially dessert…)., Characterized by the flattering expression of lychee and grapefruit, its low alcohol content and the total absence of any chemical additives…

wines.name: Petillant de Listel Framboise (flavoured raspberry sparkling)
wines.description: Petillant de Listel Framboise (flavoured raspberry sparkling) is a vibrant and refreshing sparkling beverage, expertly crafted from grape must and natural raspberry flavor. Characterized by its delightful low alcohol content of 3.5% ABV, this drink offers a lighter option without compromising on its captivating taste…
wines.nose: Bursts with beautiful raspberry and elderberry aromas, complemented by fresh, aromatic raspberry notes, subtle hints of red currant, citrus, and floral undertones
wines.palate: Light, crisp, and gently sweet on the palate, featuring a vibrant raspberry flavor that dances with fine, persistent bubbles. A touch of acidity balances the sweetness, leading to a clean, fruity finish with a pleasant aftertaste of…
wines.pairing: aperitif and especially dessert…)., Characterized by the flattering expression of raspberry, its low alcohol content and the total absence of any chemical additives, meetings

wines.name: Petillant de Listel Peche (flavoured peach sparkling)
wines.description: Petillant de Listel Peche (flavoured peach sparkling) is a delightful and refreshing low-alcohol sparkling beverage, with just 3.5% ABV, crafted from partially fermented grape must and natural peach flavor, offering a lighthearted and fruity experience.
wines.nose: Beautiful peach and floral aromas
wines.palate: Fine bubbles persist on the palate, delivering a gently sweet aftertaste with vibrant peach flavor and a refreshing crispness

wines.name: Luma Chequén Gran Reserva Cabernet Sauvignon
wines.description: Luma Chequén Gran Reserva Cabernet Sauvignon is a distinguished red wine hailing from the Maule Valley, crafted from carefully selected Cabernet Sauvignon grapes, hand-harvested from mature vines, and aged in French oak barrels to enhance its complexity and structure. It is a revelation of elegance, complexity, and…
wines.nose: The nose reveals blackberries and jammy fruit aromas with touches of cassis, tobacco, and chocolate. Complementing this are notes of dried herbs, earthiness, and subtle hints of vanilla and spice from oak aging
wines.palate: A restrained and youthful style, the palate is completed by leafy herbal notes with flavors of plum and blackcurrant. It is full-bodied and well-structured, with firm yet refined tannins and vibrant acidity, where flavors of dark berries…
wines.pairing: Ideal for red meat, spaghetti and pork chops.

wines.name: Vicente Gandia Patacona Verdejo
wines.description: Vicente Gandia Patacona Verdejo is a vibrant and refreshing Spanish white wine, crafted by a century-old winery renowned for its commitment to quality and innovation. This 100% Verdejo wine captures the essence of the Valencian terroir, offering a delightful balance of fruit-forward flavors and crisp acidity.
wines.nose: It stands out for its intense flavor of tropical aromas, such as pineapple and mango, complemented by subtle notes of white flower
wines.palate: In the mouth it is fruity, with a very well integrated acidity, long on the palate and an intense aftertaste. The tropical fruit notes carry through, balanced by a zesty, well-integrated acidity that enhances its refreshing profile
wines.pairing: leek and herbs., Paella, salads or vegetarian dishes with asparagus, spinach

wines.name: M. Chapoutier Le Pavillon Ermitage
wines.description: M. Chapoutier Le Pavillon Ermitage is an iconic, limited-production luxury cuvée from the Hermitage hill, renowned for its remarkable concentration and depth. Sourced exclusively from a single vineyard of very old Syrah vines, some approaching a century in age, this wine embodies the M. Chapoutier ethos of allowing…
wines.nose: Rich in nuances on the nose, a fruity part dominates the bouquet, with raspberry and blackberry followed by smoky, balsamic and ferrous notes. Hints of tarry, walnut, and liquorice can also be discerned
wines.palate: Complex and powerful attack, velvety and balanced, culminating in a long finish with notes of liquorice, tobacco and cocoa. It presents as powerful and rich yet remarkably elegant, with a silky texture
wines.pairing: game (hare stew, The ideal partner for red meats (rib of beef), venison) and mature goat cheeses., wild boar

wines.name: Luma Chequén Gran Reserva Red Blend (Cab.Sauv; Syrah; P.Verdot)
wines.description: Luma Chequén Gran Reserva Red Blend is a revelation of elegance, complexity, and sumptuous flavor concentration, reflecting Invina’s commitment to showcasing the diverse terroir of the Maule Valley. This handmade wine is crafted from carefully selected lots across Invina’s extensive vineyards, particularly from the…
wines.palate: A spicy complex wine with rich red fruit, offering flavors of cherries, dried prunes, and licorice overlaid on spicy oak notes. It also presents ripe juicy black fruit character with hints of tobacco, balsamic leather, and anis, supported…
wines.pairing: Excellent with red meats, pig with creamy sauces and semi-mature cheeses.

wines.name: 1924 Double Gold Buttery Chardonnay
wines.description: Double Gold Buttery Chardonnay is a masterpiece of Californian viticulture, renowned for its rich and creamy character that tantalizes the senses. Crafted with meticulous care, this exceptional Chardonnay showcases a complex flavor profile that emphasizes the natural diversity of the grape, further enhanced by a…
wines.palate: Rich and creamy flavors of vanilla, honey, and butterscotch
wines.pairing: Enjoy this sophisticated sipper with oven roasted pork spare ribs alongside savory baked apples, seafood risotto or smoked salmon.

wines.name: Jean Pabiot “La Merisière” Sancerre
wines.description: Jean Pabiot “La Merisière” Sancerre is a quintessential expression of Sauvignon Blanc, revered for its distinctive combination of freshness, minerality, and aromatic precision. It stands as a benchmark for the varietal, offering a more refined and less tropical profile than many New World counterparts, truly capturing…
wines.nose: The nose opens elegantly with notes of ripe fruit and citrus
wines.palate: A delicious, full-bodied, fresh mouthfeel that expresses the olfactory aromas well with a very pleasant finish
wines.pairing: especially goat’s cheese., fish and certain cheeses, Seafood, The white Sancerre “La Merisière” can be served on its own. It goes deliciously with starters

wines.name: iLauri “Equi” Chardonnay Colline Pescaresi IGP
wines.description: iLauri “Equi” Chardonnay Colline Pescaresi is a testament to I Lauri’s philosophy of producing authentic, pleasure-driven wines with a sustainable, artisanal approach. This unoaked Chardonnay, named “Equi” as a declaration of love and a plea for justice, showcases the remarkable adaptability and quality of Chardonnay…
wines.nose: With fresh aromas and purity, it expresses a bouquet of ripe apple and tropical notes, often complemented by hints of lemon
wines.palate: Fresh fruit flavors blend harmoniously with an appealing, crisp, and captivating acidity that lingers on the palate
wines.pairing: All types of seafood are the natural pairing for this wine., It also makes a great aperitif wine to sip on a warm summer’s night.

wines.name: Château Talaris Bordeaux AOC
wines.description: Château Talaris Bordeaux AOC is a classic red wine from the renowned Bordeaux region of France, celebrated for its harmonious balance of fruit, structure, and velvety tannins. This exquisite wine is produced by a family estate, established in 1936, which is committed to sustainable practices, being certified High…
wines.nose: The nose reveals intense aromas of ripe red berries such as wild strawberry and raspberry, beautifully complemented by minty and dark chocolate notes when swirled. Hints of black currant, plum, cherry, tobacco, and leather may also emerge…
wines.palate: Fruit-driven and well-balanced on the palate, offering a medium-bodied experience with balanced tannins and acidity. The fruit flavors persist, leading to a long aftertaste with velvety tannins and potential hints of chocolate or cedar
wines.appearance: Presents a deep ruby red hue

wines.name: Sasyr Sangiovese Syrah Toscana IGT
wines.description: Sasyr Sangiovese Syrah Toscana IGT 2020 is a vibrant Italian red wine that blends the traditional Sangiovese grape with the bold Syrah grape, providing a balanced and harmonious flavor profile.
wines.nose: Expressive aromas of red cherries, blackberries, and plums, intertwined with subtle notes of spices and a touch of vanilla
wines.palate: Medium-bodied with a smooth and velvety texture. The palate reveals flavors of ripe red fruits, black pepper, and a hint of chocolate, with well-integrated tannins and a lingering finish
wines.appearance: A deep ruby red color with hints of purple at the rim

wines.name: First Press Cabernet Sauvignon Napa Valley
wines.description: First Press Cabernet Sauvignon Napa Valley is a quintessential representation of Napa Valley’s best with a rich, robust profile and fine tannic structure that embodies the elegance of this renowned region.
wines.nose: The nose is filled with aromas of blackberry, black currant, and dark cherry, complemented by hints of cedar, tobacco, and vanilla from oak aging
wines.palate: Full-bodied on the palate, with flavors of ripe black fruit like blackberry and black plum, layered with nuances of mocha, anise, and toasted oak. Firm tannins provide structure, leading to a long, lingering finish

wines.name: First Press Chardonnay Napa Valley
wines.description: First Press Chardonnay Napa Valley is a classic Chardonnay that reflects the varietal’s traditional qualities while also highlighting the unique terroir of Napa Valley.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose with hints of green apple, pear, and tropical fruits, complemented by notes of vanilla and subtle oak
wines.palate: Medium-bodied with flavors of crisp apple, pear, and a touch of citrus. The oak influence adds layers of vanilla and a hint of butter
wines.appearance: A brilliant straw yellow color

wines.name: Three Finger Jack Rum Barrel Aged Red Blend
wines.description: Three Finger Jack Rum Barrel Aged Red Blend is a robust red wine that uniquely incorporates the nuances of rum barrel aging, adding layers of complexity and richness.
wines.nose: Intense aromas of dark fruit, such as blackberry and plum, with underlying notes of vanilla, spice, and a touch of molasses from the rum barrels
wines.palate: Full-bodied and lush on the palate, with flavors of ripe blackberries, dark cherries, and hints of chocolate and espresso. The rum barrels impart additional notes of caramel and spice, adding depth and a smooth finish
wines.appearance: Deep, dark ruby color with a hint of crimson around the edges

wines.name: Three Finger Jack Old Vine Zinfandel
wines.description: Three Finger Jack Old Vine Zinfandel is a robust and flavorful red wine that captures the essence of old vine Zinfandel with layers of complexity and richness.
wines.nose: Intense nose featuring ripe blackberries, plums, and cherries, enhanced by hints of black pepper, spice, and vanilla
wines.palate: Full-bodied and well-structured on the palate, with flavors of black fruit, dark chocolate, and a touch of smoky oak. The wine is balanced with supple tannins and a long, smooth finish
wines.appearance: A deep ruby red color with purple hues

wines.name: Three Finger Jack East Side Ridge Cabernet Sauvignon
wines.description: Three Finger Jack East Side Ridge Cabernet Sauvignon is a robust red wine known for its rich flavors and full-bodied profile, sourced from the vineyards of California’s East Side Ridge.
wines.nose: The nose reveals concentrated aromas of black cherry, cassis, and plum with hints of vanilla, tobacco, and subtle oak
wines.palate: On the palate, it exhibits bold flavors of ripe blackberries, dark chocolate, and espresso, balanced by velvety tannins and a long, smooth finish
wines.appearance: Deep, dark ruby red

wines.name: Three Finger Jack Gold Mine Hills Chardonnay
wines.description: Three Finger Jack Gold Mine Hills Chardonnay is a well-crafted white wine that showcases the rich and full-bodied nature of classic Chardonnay with a touch of Californian flair.
wines.nose: A bouquet of ripe pear, apple, and tropical fruit aromas accented by vanilla and caramel notes
wines.palate: Rich and smooth on the palate with flavors of baked apple, pineapple, and a hint of butterscotch. The wine’s texture is enhanced by subtle notes of oak and spice
wines.appearance: A luminous golden hue
wines.pairing: Creamy Pastas, Grilled Seafood, Rich Cheeses, Roasted Chicken

wines.name: 1924 Double Black Bourbon Barrel Aged Cabernet Sauvignon
wines.description: 1924 Double Black Bourbon Barrel Aged Cabernet Sauvignon is a bold red wine that combines the robust character of Cabernet Sauvignon with the deep, smoky influences of bourbon barrel aging.
wines.nose: Aromas of black cherry, blackberry, and cassis, with notes of vanilla, caramel, and a hint of smoky bourbon
wines.palate: Full-bodied and rich on the palate, with flavors of dark berries, black currant, and hints of chocolate. The bourbon barrel aging adds layers of spiced oak, caramel, and a touch of smoke, creating a complex and inviting profile
wines.appearance: Deep, inky purple color with garnet highlights

wines.name: 1924 Port Barrel Aged Pinot Noir
wines.description: 1924 Port Barrel Aged Pinot Noir is a unique red wine that combines the elegance of Pinot Noir with the rich, sweet influences of Port barrel aging.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose with layers of ripe red berries, cherry, and plum, complemented by notes of vanilla, caramel, and a touch of port-like sweetness
wines.palate: Full-bodied and smooth on the palate, with flavors of dark cherries, raspberries, and chocolate. The influence of the Port barrels adds depth with notes of sweet spice, cocoa, and a subtle hint of dried fruit
wines.appearance: A deep ruby red color with hints of garnet and violet

wines.name: 1924 Double Black Zinfandel Blend
wines.description: 1924 Double Black Red Wine Blend is a robust red wine that showcases a dark fruit profile and a harmonious blend of varietals for a rich, intense flavor experience.
wines.nose: Rich blackberry and plum aromas with hints of mocha, vanilla, and subtle smoky notes
wines.palate: Full-bodied with concentrated flavors of dark fruits like blackberry and black cherry, interwoven with layers of spice, dark chocolate, and toasted oak
wines.appearance: Deep, inky purple color

wines.name: 1924 Double Black Cabernet Sauvignon
wines.description: 1924 Double Black Cabernet Sauvignon is a bold red wine known for its depth and complexity enhanced by an extended aging process that deepens its flavors.
wines.nose: Rich aromas of blackcurrant, blackberry, and dark cherry with hints of vanilla, cedar, and tobacco
wines.palate: Full-bodied and intense with flavors of ripe black fruits, dark chocolate, and espresso, complemented by well-integrated tannins and a long, smooth finish
wines.appearance: A deep, dark ruby color

wines.name: Gnarly Head Authentic Black (Petite Sirah-based blend)
wines.description: Gnarly Head Authentic Black 2018 is a robust red wine that embodies the bold and jammy characteristics of a classic Petite Sirah-based blend.
wines.nose: Aromas of blackberry, plum, and black cherry, with underlying notes of dark chocolate, mocha, and a touch of oak
wines.palate: Full-bodied on the palate with lush flavors of ripe blackberries, blueberries, and dark cherries. Hints of vanilla, caramel, and a subtle spice from oak aging add complexity and depth
wines.appearance: Deep, dark purple color that hints at the wine’s intensity and richness

wines.name: Gnarly Head Pinot Noir
wines.description: Gnarly Head Pinot Noir is a captivating red wine that highlights the enticing and complex nature of Pinot Noir with its rich fruit flavors and balanced acidity.
wines.nose: Fragrant nose with aromas of ripe cherry raspberry and plum complemented by subtle hints of spice and earthiness
wines.palate: Medium-bodied on the palate with flavors of juicy red berries and a touch of oak. The finish is smooth with balanced tannins and refreshing acidity
wines.appearance: A vibrant ruby red color with excellent clarity

wines.name: Finca La Emperatriz Tinto Rioja DOCa
wines.description: Finca La Emperatriz Tinto Rioja DOCa is a classic red wine from the renowned Rioja region of Spain, exemplifying the balanced and refined style the area is known for.
wines.nose: An inviting nose with red berries, plum, and subtle spice, combined with notes of vanilla and a touch of oak
wines.palate: Medium-bodied with balanced acidity and tannins, featuring flavors of cherry, raspberry, and a hint of leather, with a smooth and lingering finish
wines.appearance: A deep ruby red color with hints of violet

wines.name: El Jardin de La Emperatriz Crianza Rioja DOCa
wines.grape: Garnacha, Graciano, Maturana Tinta, Tempranillo, Viura
wines.description: El Jardin de La Emperatriz Crianza Rioja DOCa is a classic Rioja wine that embodies traditional winemaking techniques with a modern twist, offering a well-balanced profile.
wines.nose: Intense aromas of red and black berries, with hints of vanilla, tobacco, and sweet spices derived from aging in oak
wines.palate: Medium-bodied with a smooth texture, featuring flavors of ripe cherries, plums, and a touch of balsamic, complemented by well-integrated tannins and a long, harmonious finish
wines.appearance: A deep ruby-red color with bright reflections

wines.name: El Pedal Tempranillo Rioja Alta DOCa
wines.description: El Pedal Tempranillo Rioja Alta DOCa is a vibrant red wine that beautifully represents the Tempranillo varietal from the prestigious Rioja Alta region.
wines.nose: Lively nose with aromas of ripe red berries, cherry, and plum, complemented by subtle notes of vanilla, spice, and leather
wines.palate: Medium-bodied on the palate, with smooth tannins and flavors of fresh red fruit, complemented by hints of oak, tobacco, and a touch of earthiness
wines.appearance: A deep ruby red color with bright reflections

wines.name: El Pedal Viura Rioja Alta DOCa COMING SOON
wines.description: El Pedal Viura Rioja Alta DOCa is a vibrant white wine that encapsulates the essence of the Rioja Alta region with its fresh and lively profile.
wines.nose: Rich aromatic profile featuring notes of citrus fruits, green apple, and white flowers, with subtle hints of herbs
wines.palate: Light-bodied and crisp on the palate, with flavors of lemon zest, pear, and a touch of fresh herbs, providing a refreshing and clean finish
wines.appearance: A pale straw yellow color with greenish hues

wines.name: Monte Araya Tempranillo Rioja DOCa
wines.description: Monte Araya Tempranillo Rioja DOCa is a sophisticated red wine exemplifying the rich tradition of Rioja winemaking with a harmonious balance of fruit and oak influence.
wines.nose: Aromatic bouquet with violets, ripe red berries, and a touch of vanilla from oak aging
wines.palate: Medium to full-bodied on the palate with flavors of cherry, plum, and subtle spice. Smooth tannins and well-integrated oak contribute to its lengthy finish
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red color with violet tinges

wines.name: Merum Priorati Inici Viticultura Extrema Priorat DOQ
wines.grape: Cabernet Sauvignon, Cariñena, Garnacha Negra, Shiraz
wines.description: Merum Priorati Inici Viticultura Extrema Priorat DOQ 2019 is a robust red wine from the Priorat region known for its powerful and intense character.
wines.nose: Aromatic profile featuring ripe blackberries, cherries, and plums, intertwined with notes of spicy black pepper, licorice, and a touch of smoky minerality
wines.palate: Full-bodied and bold with concentrated flavors of dark fruits, complemented by hints of cocoa, vanilla, and earthy undertones, finishing with well-integrated tannins and a long, persistent finish
wines.appearance: Deep ruby color with a hint of purple on the rim

wines.name: Esteban Martin Garnacha-Cabernet Sauvignon 12M
wines.description: Esteban Martin Garnacha-Cabernet Sauvignon 12M is a robust red wine that expertly blends the rich fruitiness of Garnacha with the structure and complexity of Cabernet Sauvignon.
wines.nose: Pronounced aromas of dark fruit such as blackberries and cherries, complemented by subtle hints of spices, vanilla, and oak
wines.palate: Full-bodied and well-structured on the palate, with flavors of ripe blackberries, dark cherries, and a touch of pepper. The oak aging adds complexity with notes of vanilla and subtle tannins
wines.appearance: A deep, dark ruby color with brilliant clarity

wines.name: Esteban Martin Ulula Garnacha-Syrah
wines.description: Esteban Martin Ulula Garnacha-Syrah is a delightful red wine that harmonizes the boldness of Garnacha with the robust character of Syrah.
wines.nose: Intense aromas of ripe red berries, black cherries, and a hint of peppery spice, complemented by subtle notes of violets and licorice
wines.palate: Medium-bodied on the palate with flavors of juicy raspberries, blackberries, and plums. There are undertones of black pepper, sweet spices, and a touch of smokiness
wines.appearance: Exhibits a deep ruby-red color with vibrant purple hues

wines.name: Esteban Martin Chardonnay-Macabeo BACK IN STOCK
wines.description: Esteban Martin Chardonnay-Macabeo is a refreshing white blend that brings together the bright and zesty features of Chardonnay with the floral and fruity nuances of Macabeo.
wines.nose: An enticing bouquet of citrus fruits green apple and white flowers with subtle hints of tropical fruit
wines.palate: Medium-bodied with a crisp and vibrant palate featuring flavors of lemon lime green apple and a touch of peach. The finish is clean and refreshing with a slight minerality
wines.appearance: Pale straw yellow with greenish hues

wines.name: Bodegas Vegalfaro Vino de Pago de Los Balagueses Syrah
wines.description: Bodegas Vegalfaro Vino de Pago de Los Balagueses Syrah is a notable red wine with bold characteristics and a rich heritage.
wines.nose: Intense aromas of blackberries, blueberries, and black pepper intertwined with hints of violets and earthy undertones
wines.palate: Full-bodied with firm tannins and flavors of dark fruits, black currant, and a hint of spice. The palate experience includes subtle notes of oak and a lingering finish
wines.appearance: A deep, dark purple color with a robust appearance

wines.name: Bodegas Vegalfaro Caprasia Bobal Ánfora
wines.description: Bodegas Vegalfaro Caprasia Bobal nfora is a captivating wine that reflects the essence of the Bobal grape, aged in clay amphorae to enhance its authentic character.
wines.nose: Expressive nose featuring red fruits like cherries and raspberries, with subtle earthy notes and a touch of spice
wines.palate: Medium to full-bodied on the palate, with a harmonious balance of fruit and acidity. Flavors of ripe berries, with undertones of licorice and a mineral finish
wines.appearance: A vibrant ruby red color with hints of violet

wines.name: Bodegas Vegalfaro Rebel.lia
wines.description: Bodegas Vegalfaro Rebel.lia 2021 is a captivating red blend that illustrates the potential of combining traditional Spanish varietals for a complex and well-balanced wine.
wines.nose: Aromas of ripe red fruits like cherry and raspberry, intertwined with subtle hints of spice, and earthy undertones
wines.palate: On the palate, it is full-bodied with rounded tannins, revealing flavors of juicy blackberries, plums, and a touch of licorice. The finish is long with a delicate hint of oak
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red with a bright purple rim

wines.name: Pazo Cilleiro Albariño Rias Baixas
wines.description: Pazo Cilleiro Albario Rias Baixas is a refreshing white wine from the Rias Baixas region of Spain known for its high-quality Albario grapes.
wines.nose: An aromatic nose with intense notes of citrus fruits like lemon and lime, along with hints of green apple, peach, and white flowers
wines.palate: Crisp and vibrant on the palate, with flavors of zesty citrus, green apple, and a touch of mineral undertones. Well-balanced acidity adds to its refreshing profile
wines.appearance: A pale straw yellow color with greenish reflections

wines.name: Pere Ventura Tresor Anniversary Gran Reserva Brut Cava DO
wines.description: Pere Ventura Tresor Anniversary Gran Reserva Brut Cava DO is a sophisticated sparkling wine that blends tradition and modernity to celebrate special moments with elegance.
wines.nose: Bright and fresh with aromas of green apple, citrus, white flowers, and a subtle hint of bakery notes from extended aging
wines.palate: Crisp and refreshing on the palate with flavors of green apple, citrus, and almond, supported by a creamy texture and a long, elegant finish
wines.appearance: Pale straw yellow with fine, persistent bubbles

wines.name: Pere Ventura Mas Pere Reserva Brut Cava DO
wines.description: Pere Ventura Mas Pere Reserva Brut Cava DO is a refined sparkling wine from Spain, celebrated for its elegance and vibrant character.
wines.nose: Fresh and aromatic nose with notes of green apple, pear, and citrus, complemented by hints of toast and almonds
wines.palate: Crisp and refreshing on the palate, with flavors of apple, lemon zest, and a touch of brioche. The minerality adds to the wine’s complexity and clean finish
wines.appearance: Pale yellow color with fine, persistent bubbles, presenting a brilliant and inviting appearance

wines.name: Pere Ventura Mas Pere Selecció Brut Cava DO
wines.description: Pere Ventura Mas Pere Selecci Brut Cava DO is a refined sparkling wine produced in the Cava DO region, offering an elegant and refreshing experience typical of high-quality Cava.
wines.nose: Fresh and inviting nose with aromas of green apple, citrus fruits, and a hint of white flowers and toasted bread
wines.palate: Light-bodied and crisp on the palate, with flavors of green pear, lemon zest, and a subtle toastiness, balanced by lively acidity and a clean, refreshing finish
wines.appearance: A pale yellow color with fine, persistent bubbles

wines.name: Quinta Do Portal 6 Barrels Tawny Reserve Porto
wines.grape: Tinta Roriz, Touriga Franca, Touriga Nacional
wines.description: Quinta Do Portal 6 Barrels Tawny Reserve Porto is a rich and complex Portuguese fortified wine aged in oak barrels to develop its nuanced and distinctive flavors.
wines.nose: Aromas of dried fruits like figs and apricots mixed with hints of caramel, nuts, and spice
wines.palate: Smooth and rich on the palate with flavors of toffee, dried fruits, and a touch of vanilla. The oak aging imparts notes of roasted nuts and spices, leading to a long, satisfying finish
wines.appearance: A deep mahogany with amber highlights

wines.name: Quinta Do Portal 29 Grapes Reserve Porto
wines.description: Quinta Do Portal 29 Grapes Reserve Porto is a refined port wine crafted using a blend of 29 different grape varietals, epitomizing the rich and diverse viticultural heritage of the Douro Valley.
wines.nose: A bouquet of ripe dark fruits such as blackberry, plum, and cherry, complemented by nuanced notes of cocoa, nuts, and spices
wines.palate: Luxuriously full-bodied on the palate with flavors of sweet black fruits, chocolate, and a hint of nutmeg. The fortified nature of the wine provides a velvety texture and a lingering finish
wines.appearance: Deep ruby color with garnet hues, showcasing its richness and maturity
wines.pairing: Cheese, Chocolate Desserts, Nuts, Spicy Food

wines.name: Quinta Do Portal Fine Ruby Porto
wines.grape: Tinta Barroca, Tinta Roriz, Touriga Franca, Touriga Nacional
wines.description: Quinta Do Portal Fine Ruby Porto is a classic fortified wine from the Douro Valley of Portugal, known for its deep color, rich flavors, and sweet, dense profile.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose with vibrant notes of red fruits like cherry and raspberry, complemented by subtle hints of spice and chocolate
wines.palate: Sweet and full-bodied on the palate, showcasing rich flavors of ripe red berries, plum, and a touch of dark chocolate. A well-balanced wine with smooth tannins and a lingering, complex finish
wines.appearance: A deep ruby red color
wines.pairing: Cheese, Chocolate Desserts, Red Meat, Spicy Food

wines.name: Quinta Do Portal Fine Tawny Porto
wines.grape: Tinta Barroca, Tinta Roriz, Touriga Franca, Touriga Nacional
wines.description: Quinta Do Portal Fine Tawny Porto is a well-balanced fortified wine that offers a delightful blend of complexity and smoothness.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose with notes of dried fruits, nuts, and caramel, intertwined with hints of vanilla and oak
wines.palate: Medium-bodied and smooth on the palate, with flavors of figs, raisins, and nuts. A touch of spice and a long, velvety finish add to its complexity
wines.appearance: A rich amber color with hues of brick red

wines.name: Soalheiro Granit Alvarinho
wines.description: Soalheiro Granit Alvarinho is a refined white wine that highlights the purity and minerality of the Alvarinho grape, offering a crisp and vibrant expression distinct to the terroir.
wines.nose: Fresh and aromatic with notes of citrus, green apple, and a mineral undertone that reflects its granite soil origins
wines.palate: Light-bodied yet concentrated on the palate with flavors of lime, pear, and a hint of salinity. The wine’s zesty acidity and minerality add a refreshing quality
wines.appearance: A pale straw yellow color with greenish reflections

wines.name: Soalheiro Alvarinho
wines.description: Soalheiro Alvarinho is a classic example of an aromatic white wine made from the Alvarinho grape variety known for its vibrant and fresh profile.
wines.nose: Intense and fruity nose with aromas of citrus fruits, tropical notes, and fresh flowers, combined with a subtle minerality
wines.palate: Medium-bodied with a crisp acidity, the palate is dominated by flavors of lime, green apple, and passion fruit, complemented by a refreshing mineral finish
wines.appearance: A bright pale yellow color with greenish tints

wines.name: Soalheiro Allo Loureiro-Alvarinho LIMITED STOCK
wines.description: Soalheiro Allo Loureiro-Alvarinho is a vibrant white wine that captures the essence of the Vinho Verde region in Portugal through its refreshing flavors and aromatic profile.

wines.palate: Light-bodied and crisp on the palate, with flavors of green apple, peach, and citrus. The wine’s bright acidity and minerality add to its refreshing character

wines.name: Tohu Whenua Awa Single Vineyard Pinot Noir

wines.appearance: A vibrant ruby red color with subtle garnet edges

wines.name: Tohu Awatere Valley Pinot Noir
wines.description: Tohu Awatere Valley Pinot Noir 2019 is a refined red wine that showcases the unique terroir of the Awatere Valley in New Zealand’s Marlborough region.
wines.nose: A vibrant nose featuring red berries, cherry, and subtle hints of spice and earthiness

wines.name: Tohu Awatere Valley Pinot Gris

wines.appearance: A pale straw yellow color with a hint of green

wines.name: Tohu Awatere Valley Sauvignon Blanc

wines.name: Petal & Stem Pinot Gris COMING SOON

wines.palate: Light-bodied and smooth on the palate, with flavors of red berries, plum, and subtle notes of vanilla and oak. The well-integrated tannins and balanced acidity add to its complexity

wines.name: La Calla Nero d’Avola Sicilia DOC

wines.palate: Full-bodied and well-structured on the palate with flavors of dark fruit vanilla and a touch of oak. The wine displays firm tannins and a long smooth finish

wines.name: La Guardiense “Janare” Aglianico Sannio DOP

wines.name: La Guardiense “Janare” Falanghina Sannio DOP

wines.name: Mottura Stilio Primitivo di Manduria DOC

wines.name: Mottura Rosone Negroamaro del Salento IGT

wines.palate: Full-bodied and well-structured on the palate, it offers flavors of ripe blackberries, cherries, and black pepper with smooth tannins and a long, satisfying finish

wines.name: Capo Zafferano Primitivo di Manduria DOC

wines.appearance: Deep ruby red color with subtle garnet reflections

wines.name: Capo Zafferano Rosso Appassimento Puglia IGT
wines.description: Capo Zafferano Roséso Appassimento Puglia IGT 2021 is a bold red wine known for its intense flavors and rich profile owing to the appassimento method where grapes are partially dried before fermentation.

wines.appearance: Deep ruby red with garnet reflections

wines.name: Capo Zafferano Primitivo Puglia IGT
wines.description: Capo Zafferano Primitivo Puglia IGT 2021 is a robust Italian red wine known for its rich and intense profile typical of the Primitivo grape variety.

wines.description: PietraPura Mandus Primitivo di Manduria DOP is a robust red wine that embodies the richness and intensity characteristic of the Primitivo grape.

wines.appearance: A deep ruby red color with violet reflections

wines.name: PietraPura Primitivo Hyria Puglia IGP

wines.nose: Aromas of ripe red fruits, black cherries, and plums with subtle hints of spices and herbs
wines.palate: Full-bodied and well-structured on the palate, with flavors of dark fruit, licorice, and a touch of vanilla. Balanced acidity and smooth tannins lead to a long, satisfying finish
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red color with violet reflections

wines.name: Famiglia Cielo Primasole Primitivo Puglia IGT

wines.palate: Full-bodied with a rich, velvety texture. Flavors of dark fruits, such as plum and blackberry, with undertones of pepper and dark chocolate, lead to a lingering finish

wines.name: Pirovano Collezione Nero D’Avola Sicilia DOC
wines.description: Pirovano Collezione Nero D’Avola Sicilia DOC is a distinguished red wine that highlights the rich character and vibrant qualities of the Nero d’Avola grape, Sicily’s flagship varietal. This wine offers a balanced structure with well-integrated tannins and a surprisingly fresh finish, making it a truly special…
wines.nose: Very intense and complex, with pronounced hints of dark cherry, plum, and blackberry, intertwined with notes of undergrowth, spicy nuances, licorice, and a subtle touch of cocoa

wines.name: Poggio Dragone Sangiovese-Merlot Terre di Chieti IGP

wines.palate: Medium-bodied with balanced acidity, presenting flavors of blackberry, cherry, and a touch of vanilla. Smooth tannins and a lingering finish
wines.appearance: A deep ruby-red color with subtle garnet reflections

wines.name: iLauri Pinciaie Montepulciano d’Abruzzo Riserva DOC

wines.name: I Lauri Avalos Pecorino Abruzzo DOC

wines.name: iLauri “Bajo” Montepulciano d’Abruzzo DOC

wines.appearance: A deep ruby red color

wines.name: iLauri “Salto” Sangiovese Terre di Chieti IGT

wines.name: iLauri “Neola” Passerina Abruzzo

wines.name: Colle Corviano Montepulciano d’Abruzzo DOC

wines.appearance: Deep ruby red color, exhibiting the wines intensity and richness

wines.name: Colle Corviano Pinot Grigio Colline Pescaresi IGP
wines.description: Colle Corviano Pinot Grigio Colline Pescaresi IGP is a refreshing white wine that embodies the crisp and clean characteristics of Pinot Grigio. It stands out as a proper expression of the varietal, offering a pure, lifted, and bright profile with great fruit density. This wine delivers a perfect balance of crisp…

wines.palate: Light-bodied and crisp on the palate, with refreshing flavors of lemon, lime, green apple, and peach. A vibrant acidity beautifully balances the fruitiness, leading to a clean, dry, and lightly salty finish. It presents a round, lightly…
wines.appearance: Pale straw with light green hues

wines.name: Cantina Tollo Gufo Chardonnay COMING SOON

wines.palate: Full-bodied on the palate, with flavors of plum, black cherry, and a touch of chocolate. Well-structured with smooth tannins and a lingering finish
