wines.name: Le Preare Valpolicella DOC
wines.description: Le Preare Valpolicella DOC 2022 is a captivating red wine from Italy’s renowned Valpolicella region, known for its elegant and approachable style.
wines.nose: Inviting nose with aromas of red cherries, plums, and a touch of black pepper and floral notes
wines.palate: Medium-bodied with a harmonious balance of fresh fruit flavors, including cherry and raspberry, complemented by a subtle spice and soft tannins. The palate is smooth with a refreshing finish
wines.appearance: Bright ruby red color with vivid reflections

wines.name: Gran Bericanto Riserva Colli Berici DOC (in wooden box of 6)
wines.description: Gran Bericanto Riserva Colli Berici DOC 2019 is a sophisticated red wine that reflects the distinct terroir of the Colli Berici region in Italy.
wines.nose: Intense bouquet of dark berries, blackcurrant, and plum, interwoven with hints of spice, tobacco, and vanilla
wines.palate: Full-bodied with a balanced structure, featuring flavors of ripe blackberries, dark cherries, and a touch of chocolate. Silky tannins and a long, lingering finish
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red with garnet hues

wines.name: Gran Bericanto Riserva Colli Berici DOC
wines.grape: Cabernet, Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Tai Rosso
wines.description: Gran Bericanto Riserva Colli Berici DOC 2019 is a distinguished red wine that represents the classic flavors and depth associated with the Colli Berici region.
wines.nose: Intense aromas of ripe red berries, dark cherries, and plums, complemented by hints of spice, vanilla, and oak
wines.palate: Full-bodied with a well-structured palate. Flavors of blackcurrant, blackberry, and dark chocolate dominate, with subtle notes of oak and tobacco adding depth and complexity
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red with garnet reflections

wines.name: Bericanto Pinot Noir Vicenza DOC
wines.description: Bericanto Pinot Noir Vicenza DOC is a delicate red wine that reflects the elegance and finesse typical of Pinot Noir varietals from the Vicenza region.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose with layers of red cherries, strawberries, and subtle earthy notes complemented by hints of rosée petals and a touch of spice
wines.palate: Light-bodied and smooth on the palate, with flavors of red berries, delicate tannins, and a balanced acidity that adds freshness. There are underlying notes of forest floor and gentle smokiness adding complexity
wines.appearance: A light ruby red color, with a brilliant clarity

wines.name: 1908 Nero di Gio Rosso d’Italia (Montepulciano, Negroamaro, Merlot)
wines.grape: Blend of the most appreciated native grapes of Italy
wines.description: 1908 Nero di Gio Roséso d’Italia is a robust red wine from Italy, known for its deep flavors and rich heritage.
wines.nose: Intense nose with notes of ripe blackberries, dark cherries, and hints of plum, complemented by subtle spicy undertones and a touch of earthy minerality
wines.palate: Full-bodied and well-structured on the palate, with flavors of ripe dark fruits, black pepper, and a hint of cocoa. Fine tannins and well-integrated oak provide complexity and a long, smooth finish
wines.appearance: A deep ruby red color

wines.name: 1908 Appassionante Rosso Veneto IGT (Merlot, Corvina)
wines.description: 1908 Appassionante Roséso Veneto IGT is a robust red wine that highlights the unique and concentrated flavors achieved through the appassimento method, a traditional Italian winemaking technique that involves partially drying the grapes before fermentation.
wines.nose: Intense and aromatic nose featuring aromas of dried cherries, figs, and plums, with hints of chocolate, tobacco, and a touch of spice
wines.palate: Full-bodied and rich on the palate, with flavors of ripe red fruits, dark chocolate, and a hint of vanilla. The wine’s smooth tannins and balanced acidity create a long and satisfying finish
wines.appearance: A deep ruby red color with garnet reflections

wines.name: Le Monde Pinot Bianco Friuli DOC
wines.description: Le Monde Pinot Bianco Friuli DOC is a refreshing white wine from the Friuli region of Italy, known for its crisp and clean profile.
wines.nose: Delicate nose with notes of green apple, pear, and subtle floral undertones
wines.palate: Medium-bodied with flavors of citrus, green apple, and a hint of almond. The palate is balanced with a refreshing acidity
wines.appearance: Pale straw yellow color

wines.name: Le Monde Pinot Grigio Friuli DOC
wines.description: Le Monde Pinot Grigio “Ramato” Friuli DOC is a distinctive white wine that showcases the coppery hue and expressive flavors derived from extended skin contact during the winemaking process.
wines.nose: Aromatic with notes of wild strawberry, red cherry, and a hint of spice
wines.palate: Light-bodied with flavors of ripe red berries, stone fruits, and a subtle minerality. The wine is well-balanced with a refreshing acidity
wines.appearance: A striking coppery-pink hue

wines.name: St. Michael-Eppan Pinot Noir Alto Adige DOC
wines.description: St. Michael-Eppan Pinot Noir Alto Adige DOC epitomizes the quintessential cool-climate Pinot Noir with its delicate balance and sophisticated structure, reflecting the unique terroir of Alto Adige.
wines.nose: Enticing aromas of red cherry, raspberry, and a hint of cranberry, complemented by delicate floral notes and a touch of spice
wines.palate: Light-bodied with a silky texture, the palate reveals flavors of fresh red berries, subtle earthiness, and a harmonious acidity. The finish is elegant, with lingering notes of red fruit and a hint of minerality
wines.appearance: A vivid ruby red color that sparkles in the glass

wines.name: St. Michael-Eppan Gewürztraminer Alto Adige DOC
wines.description: St. Michael-Eppan Gewrztraminer Alto Adige DOC 2021 is an expressive white wine that showcases the full potential of Gewrztraminer grapes grown in the Alto Adige region.
wines.nose: Highly aromatic nose with layers of lychee, rosée petals, and hints of citrus and exotic fruits
wines.palate: Light-bodied and elegantly balanced on the palate, offering rich flavors of lychee, mango, and apricot, with a touch of spice and a crisp, refreshing finish
wines.appearance: A vibrant pale yellow color with greenish reflections

wines.name: St. Michael-Eppan Weissburgunder Pinot Bianco Alto Adige DOC
wines.description: St. Michael-Eppan Weissburgunder Pinot Bianco Alto Adige DOC embodies the crisp, fresh essence of the Alto Adige region, showcasing the versatility of the Pinot Bianco varietal.
wines.nose: Inviting aromas of apple, pear, and citrus fruits, complemented by delicate floral notes and a hint of minerality
wines.palate: Light-bodied and refreshing, with a well-balanced acidity. The palate reveals flavors of green apple, lemon zest, and a touch of apricot, leading to a clean, crisp finish
wines.appearance: Bright straw yellow with greenish reflections

wines.name: St. Michael-Eppan Chardonnay Alto Adige DOC
wines.description: St. Michael-Eppan Chardonnay Alto Adige DOC 2021 is a sophisticated white wine that exemplifies the purity and complexity of Chardonnay from the Alto Adige region.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose with layers of green apple, peach, and a hint of citrus, interwoven with delicate floral notes and a touch of minerality
wines.palate: Full-bodied and well-structured on the palate, with flavors of crisp apple, pear, and a touch of vanilla. Notes of oak and a creamy texture add depth and complexity
wines.appearance: A brilliant straw yellow color with greenish reflections

wines.name: St. Michael-Eppan Pinot Grigio Alto Adige DOC
wines.description: St. Michael-Eppan Pinot Grigio Alto Adige DOC is a delightful white wine that captures the essence of Alto Adige’s terroir.
wines.nose: Fresh and fruity nose with notes of green apple, pear, and citrus, complemented by subtle floral undertones
wines.palate: Light-bodied and crisp on the palate with refreshing acidity. Flavors of apple and pear are well-balanced by a hint of lemon zest and mineral notes
wines.appearance: A pale straw-yellow color with greenish highlights

wines.name: St. Michael-Eppan Müller Thurgau Alto Adige DOC
wines.description: St. Michael-Eppan Mller Thurgau Alto Adige DOC is a fresh and zesty white wine that reflects the crisp and aromatic qualities of the Mller Thurgau varietal.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose with notes of green apple, white peach, and hints of citrus, underscored by floral overtones
wines.palate: Light-bodied and refreshing on the palate, featuring flavors of lime, green apple, and subtle mineral notes. The wine has a crisp acidity and a clean finish
wines.appearance: A pale straw yellow color with greenish reflections

wines.name: Lvnae Vermentino Colli di Luni Bianco DOC “Black Label”
wines.description: Lvnae Vermentino Colli di Luni Bianco DOC “Black Label” is an exceptional white wine crafted from carefully selected Vermentino grapes grown in the Colli di Luni region.
wines.nose: Entrancing floral and citrus notes on the nose, combined with subtle undertones of Mediterranean herbs
wines.palate: Medium-bodied and fresh on the palate, offering flavors of citrus fruits, white peach, and a delicate minerality. Balanced acidity and a lingering finish create an enjoyable and memorable experience
wines.appearance: A bright and luminous straw yellow color

wines.name: Lvnae Vermentino Colli di Luni Bianco DOC “Grey Label”
wines.description: Lvnae Vermentino Colli di Luni Bianco DOC “Grey Label” 2021 is a refreshing white wine that highlights the quintessential qualities of Vermentino from the Colli di Luni region.
wines.nose: Delicate and aromatic with notes of citrus blossoms, green apple, and hints of Mediterranean herbs
wines.palate: Medium-bodied and crisp on the palate, offering flavors of lemon zest, pear, and a touch of minerality. The wine has a refreshing acidity that balances the fruitiness perfectly
wines.appearance: Pale straw yellow color with greenish hues

wines.name: Viberti Bricco Delle Viole Barolo Riserva DOCG
wines.description: Viberti Bricco Delle Viole Barolo Riserva DOCG is an esteemed wine from the Barolo region, showcasing the classic characteristics of Nebbiolo grapes.
wines.nose: The nose offers a captivating bouquet of red cherries, rosée petals, and earthy truffle, with hints of tar and tobacco
wines.palate: Full-bodied and intense on the palate, with flavors of dark cherries, red fruit, and licorice. The tannins are well-structured, providing a long, elegant finish
wines.appearance: Deep garnet red with orange hues as it ages

wines.name: Viberti Buon Padre Barolo DOCG (Blend of 10 top Barolo sites)
wines.description: Viberti Buon Padre Barolo DOCG is a prestigious red wine derived from a blend of Nebbiolo grapes sourced from 10 top Barolo sites embodying the epitome of Barolo’s characteristic elegance and complexity.
wines.nose: Intense and complex nose featuring aromas of cherry, rosée, and tar accompanied by subtle hints of licorice and tobacco
wines.palate: Full-bodied with robust tannins and balanced acidity. Flavors of ripe cherries, plums, and earthy truffles blend seamlessly with notes of leather and spices
wines.appearance: A striking garnet red color with slight orange hues indicating maturation potential

wines.name: Viberti Pubblicano Dolcetto Dogliani DOCG
wines.description: Viberti Pubblicano Dolcetto Dogliani DOCG is a classic Italian red wine that showcases the vibrant and fruity character of the Dolcetto grape varietal.
wines.nose: An enticing nose of red cherries, plums, and blackberries, with subtle hints of violets and a touch of earthiness
wines.palate: Medium-bodied and well-balanced on the palate, offering flavors of ripe red fruits, blackberries, and a hint of almonds. The wine is smooth with fresh acidity and soft tannins
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red color with violet reflections

wines.name: Viberti Nebbiolo Langhe DOC
wines.description: Viberti Nebbiolo Langhe DOC is a captivating red wine that embodies the elegance and complexity of the Nebbiolo grape.
wines.nose: Delicate aromas of rosée petals, cherries, and a touch of truffle, all layered with subtle earthy notes and hints of spice
wines.palate: On the palate, it offers firm tannins and bright acidity, with flavors of red cherries, raspberries, and a hint of licorice, leading to a long and satisfying finish
wines.appearance: A stunning garnet red color with brick-red hues

wines.name: Viberti La Gemella Barbera d’Alba DOC
wines.description: Viberti La Gemella Barbera d’Alba DOC 2021 showcases the traditional characteristics of the Barbera grape from the Alba region.
wines.nose: Aromas of red cherries, plums, and raspberries with hints of spice and violet
wines.palate: Medium-bodied with fresh acidity and soft tannins. Flavors of red berries, sour cherries, and a touch of vanilla linger on the palate
wines.appearance: A vibrant ruby red color with violet hues

wines.name: Bosio Boschi dei Signori Barolo DOCG
wines.description: Bosio Boschi dei Signori Barolo DOCG 2019 is a distinguished red wine hailing from the renowned Barolo region in Italy, celebrated for its powerful yet elegant expression of the Nebbiolo grape.
wines.nose: Complex and aromatic nose featuring notes of dried rosée petals, red cherries, licorice, and earthy undertones
wines.palate: Full-bodied and well-structured on the palate, with firm tannins and flavors of dark cherries, truffle, leather, and tobacco. The wine evolves beautifully with decanting, revealing subtle nuances of spice and mineral
wines.appearance: Deep garnet color with brick-red hints

wines.name: Bosio Boschi dei Signori Barbaresco DOCG
wines.description: Bosio Boschi dei Signori Barbaresco DOCG 2020 is a distinguished red wine that showcases the elegance and complexity typical of Barbaresco from the renowned Bosio family vineyards.
wines.nose: Intense and expressive nose with notes of red cherry, rosée petal, and licorice, complemented by hints of spices and earthy undertones
wines.palate: Full-bodied and structured on the palate, with flavors of ripe red fruit, truffles, and anise. Tannins are firm yet polished, leading to a long and elegant finish
wines.appearance: A brilliant garnet red color with ruby highlights

wines.name: Bosio Piemonte Barbera DOC
wines.description: Bosio Piemonte Barbera DOC 2021 is a vibrant red wine that showcases the character and charm of the Barbera grape from the Piemonte region.
wines.nose: Intense and inviting aromas of cherries and red berries, with hints of plum and a touch of spice
wines.palate: Medium-bodied with a bright acidity. Flavors of ripe red fruits, particularly cherry and raspberry, complemented by subtle hints of spice and earthiness
wines.appearance: A deep ruby red color with violet hues

wines.name: Bosio Langhe Arneis DOC
wines.description: Bosio Langhe Arneis DOC is a refreshing white wine that stands out for its crisp acidity and subtle complexity.
wines.nose: Inviting nose with aromas of white flowers, green apple, and citrus fruits, accompanied by hints of almond
wines.palate: Light-bodied with crisp acidity, featuring flavors of pear, apple, and citrus. Subtle almond notes add to the complexity
wines.appearance: Pale straw yellow with greenish reflections

wines.name: Bosio Moscato d’Asti DOCG
wines.description: Bosio Moscato d’Asti DOCG 2022 is known for its sweet, fresh, and crisp profile with a gentle effervescence that sets it apart from other wines.
wines.nose: The nose offers intense aromas of white peach, apricot, and orange blossom intertwined with subtle hints of honeysuckle
wines.palate: Light and vivacious on the palate, presenting flavors of ripe peach, pear, and a touch of honey, balanced by refreshing acidity and a delicate sweetness
wines.appearance: A pale, straw-yellow color with slight bubbles indicative of its gentle sparkling nature

wines.name: Broglia Gavi “La Meirana” del Comune di Gavi DOCG
wines.description: Broglia Gavi ‘La Meirana’ del Comune di Gavi DOCG 2022 is an elegant white wine from the Gavi region of Italy known for its fresh and crisp character.
wines.nose: Delicate and fragrant nose with aromas of green apple, pear, white flowers, and a hint of citrus zest
wines.palate: Light-bodied and refreshing on the palate, with flavors of green apple, lemon, and a subtle minerality. The crisp acidity provides a clean and vibrant finish
wines.appearance: A pale straw-yellow color with greenish reflections

wines.name: Broglia Gavi “il Doge” DOCG LIMITED STOCK
wines.description: Broglia Gavi ‘il Doge’ DOCG 2022 is a light and vibrant white wine that showcases the essence of the Cortese grape with its refreshing and zesty character.
wines.nose: Fresh and aromatic nose with notes of citrus fruits like lemon and lime, intertwined with hints of green apple and white flowers
wines.palate: Light-bodied and zesty on the palate, with flavors of green apple, pear, and citrus fruits. A noticeable acidity adds to the freshness, with a minerally finish that lingers
wines.appearance: Pale straw yellow with greenish reflections

wines.name: Bella Storia Merlot BIO
wines.description: Bella Storia Merlot Organic is a delightful red wine that embodies the essence of organic winemaking from the esteemed 2021 vintage.
wines.nose: Inviting aromas of blackberry, cherry, and plum, complemented by hints of cocoa, vanilla, and a touch of herbaceous notes
wines.palate: Medium-bodied with smooth tannins, offering flavors of ripe red fruits, dark chocolate, and subtle spices, balanced by a pleasant acidity
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red with purple highlights

wines.name: Bella Storia Chardonnay BIO
wines.description: Bella Storia Chardonnay Organic is a vibrant and harmonious unoaked white wine, offering a delightful Italian interpretation of the world-renowned Chardonnay grape. This special wine is part of a charity project by Cielo e Terra, supporting the Murialdo World NGO, embodying a philosophy of “do good and do it well” by…
wines.nose: A fresh and slightly fruity bouquet, boasting inviting notes of flowers, ripe peaches, green apple, pear, and tropical fruits
wines.palate: The palate is enchantingly smooth, velvety, and round, delivering a fresh and balanced profile with light fruity notes. It is lively and soft, with bright acidity and a gentle, creamy finish

wines.name: Berlucchi ’61 Franciacorta Extra Brut DOCG
wines.description: Berlucchi ’61 Franciacorta Extra Brut DOCG is a sophisticated sparkling wine that showcases the elegance and finesse of the Franciacorta region in Italy.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose with hints of citrus, white flowers, and a touch of yeast and brioche
wines.palate: Crisp and refreshing on the palate, with flavors of green apple, lemon zest, and almond. The fine bubbles add a creamy texture and the finish is clean and mineral-driven
wines.appearance: Bright straw-yellow color with fine and persistent bubbles

wines.name: Ruggeri Giustino B. Millesimato Prosecco Superiore, Extra Dry DOCG
wines.description: Ruggeri Giustino B. Millesimato Proséecco Superiore Extra Dry DOCG 2021 is a refined sparkling wine that embodies the elegance and tradition of Proséecco Superiore.
wines.nose: Fresh and floral nose with notes of white peach, apple, and citrus, complemented by hints of acacia and brioche
wines.palate: Light and refreshing on the palate, with flavors of green apple, pear, and a touch of honey, balanced by a lively acidity and smooth finish
wines.appearance: Bright straw-yellow color with persistent perlage

wines.name: Ruggeri Argeo Prosecco Brut Treviso DOC
wines.description: Ruggeri Argeo Proséecco Brut Treviso DOC is an elegant sparkling wine from the Treviso area of Italy known for its refreshing and vibrant character.
wines.nose: Fresh and fruity nose with notes of green apple pear and a hint of citrus blossom
wines.palate: Light-bodied with a crisp and clean palate marked by flavors of green apple white peach and a touch of almond with a balanced acidity and a dry finish
wines.appearance: A pale straw yellow color with a fine and persistent perlage

wines.name: Bella Storia Spumante Extra Dry Organic
wines.description: Bella Storia Spumante Extra Dry Organic is an elegant sparkling wine that beautifully combines organic viticulture with lively and refreshing characteristics, epitomizing the charm of organic winemaking. This appealing Italian sparkling wine is known for its brilliant balance of sweetness and acidity, offering a…
wines.nose: Offers a fresh and floral bouquet, slightly aromatic, boasting fragrant notes of green apple, peach, and citrus fruit, complemented by delicate floral undertones. Hints of pear, melon, and even subtle tropical notes can also be detected
wines.palate: Sparkling and refreshing on the palate, with vibrant fruity and aromatic notes. It is light-bodied and crisp, featuring flavors of apple, lemon, and a touch of almond, while the extra dry style ensures a balanced acidity and subtle…
wines.appearance: Presents a bright yellow hue

wines.name: Chiarli Il Mio Rosso Amabile Red Lambrusco dell’Emilia IGT LIMITED STOCK
wines.description: Chiarli Il Mio Roséso Amabile Red Lambrusco dell’Emilia IGT is a light-bodied and semi-sweet red wine from the Emilia-Romagna region of Italy made from the Lambrusco grape variety.
wines.nose: Fruity nose with aromas of red berries, cherries, and a hint of floral notes
wines.palate: Light-bodied and slightly sweet on the palate, with flavors of ripe strawberries, raspberries, and a touch of sweetness balanced by a refreshing acidity
wines.appearance: A bright ruby red color with a slight fizz

wines.name: Chiarli Il Mio Bianco Amabile White Lambrusco dell’Emilia IGT
wines.description: Chiarli Il Mio Bianco Amabile White Lambrusco dell’Emilia IGT is a delightful semi-sweet sparkling white wine that offers a refreshing and delicate drinking experience typical of the Lambrusco varietal.

wines.palate: Light-bodied and effervescent on the palate, with flavors of apricot, pear, and honey. The sparkling nature of the wine adds a lively touch, making it perfect for casual occasions
wines.appearance: A pale straw yellow color with fine and persistent bubbles

wines.name: Montelliana 57 Asolo Prosecco Superiore DOCG Extra Dry
wines.description: Montelliana 57 Asolo Proséecco Superiore DOCG Extra Dry is a refined sparkling wine that epitomizes the elegance and quality of Asolo Proséecco, made from top-quality Glera grapes.

wines.palate: Light-bodied and crisp on the palate, showcasing flavors of apple, peach, and citrus with a delicate touch of sweetness balanced by vibrant acidity
wines.appearance: A bright straw yellow color with a fine and persistent bead

wines.name: Montelliana Prosecco Extra Dry, Treviso DOC (1500ml)
wines.description: Montelliana Proséecco Extra Dry Treviso DOC (1500ml) is a refreshing and effervescent sparkling wine that embodies the essence of the Proséecco region.

wines.palate: Light-bodied and crisp on the palate with flavors of green apple citrus and a touch of honey. The fine bubbles add to its refreshing character
wines.appearance: Pale straw yellow with fine persistent bubbles

wines.name: Montelliana Prosecco Extra Dry, Treviso DOC
wines.description: Montelliana Proséecco Extra Dry Treviso DOC is a delightful sparkling wine that exemplifies the characteristic freshness and vibrancy of Proséecco from the renowned Treviso region.
wines.nose: Fresh and fragrant with notes of white flowers green apple and a hint of citrus
wines.palate: Light-bodied and crisp on the palate with flavors of green apple pear and a subtle touch of almond
wines.appearance: Pale straw yellow with a persistent and delicate perlage

wines.name: Montelliana Prosecco Extra Dry, Treviso DOC (375ml)
wines.description: Montelliana Proséecco Extra Dry Treviso DOC is a delightful sparkling wine that showcases the elegance and freshness typical of Proséecco from the Treviso region.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose with notes of green apple, pear, citrus, and white flowers
wines.palate: Light-bodied with a crisp and lively palate. Flavors of green apple, peach, and lemon are complemented by a hint of sweetness and a clean finish
wines.appearance: Pale straw yellow with fine and persistent bubbles

wines.name: Montelliana Mont Blanc Cuvée Extra Dry COMING SOON
wines.description: Montelliana Mont Blanc Cuvée Extra Dry is a delightful and prestigious sparkling wine that beautifully balances fruity flavors with refreshing acidity. Crafted using the natural Charmat fermentation method, it offers a versatile profile, making it an excellent choice as an aperitif or a superb accompaniment throughout…
wines.nose: An aromatic nose reveals hints of acacia flowers, green apple, and peach, alongside a typically fruity bouquet with tones of pear and citrus

wines.appearance: Exhibits a pale straw-yellow colour with alluring greenish highlights, complemented by a fine and persistent perlage

wines.name: Montelliana Moscato Vino Spumante Cuvée Dolce

wines.appearance: A light straw-yellow color with a fine and persistent mousse

wines.name: Val D’Oca Rive S. Stefano Valdobbiadene Prosecco Superiore DOCG Extra Brut
wines.description: Val D’Oca Rive S. Stefano Valdobbiadene Proséecco Superiore DOCG Extra Brut is a sophisticated sparkling wine that exemplifies the elegance and finesse of high-quality Proséecco from the Valdobbiadene region.
wines.nose: Delicate and elegant aromas of green apple, pear, and white flowers with subtle hints of citrus
wines.palate: Crisp and refreshing on the palate with flavors of green apple, citrus, and a touch of minerality. The extra brut style provides a dry and elegant finish

wines.name: Val D’Oca Vino Spumante Millesimato Gold Edition Extra Dry
wines.grape: Blanc De Noir, Blend Of Blanc De Blanc, Glera

wines.nose: Intense and aromatic nose with notes of green apple, pear, and a hint of white flowers. Subtle undertones of yeast and fresh bread contribute to its complexity
wines.palate: Crisp and refreshing on the palate with flavors of ripe apple, citrus fruits, and a touch of honey. The off-dry nature of the wine balances its acidity perfectly, offering a harmonious and lingering finish
wines.appearance: A light straw yellow color with a fine and persistent perlage

wines.name: Astoria Fashion Victim Cuvée Spumante Brut
wines.description: Astoria Fashion Victim Cuve Spumante Brut is a delightful sparkling wine that promises a refreshing and vibrant experience.
wines.nose: Aromatic and fragrant nose with notes of green apple, pear, and white flowers, alongside hints of citrus and a touch of yeast
wines.palate: Light-bodied and crisp on the palate, showcasing flavors of fresh apple, lemon zest, and a hint of almond on the finish. The fine bubbles enhance the wine’s refreshing character
wines.appearance: Pale straw yellow with fine and persistent bubbles

wines.name: Astoria Galie Prosecco Extra Dry
wines.description: Astoria Galie Proséecco Extra Dry is an elegant sparkling wine that showcases the vibrant and fresh characteristics typical of Proséecco.
wines.nose: Fragrant nose featuring notes of apple, pear, and citrus, complemented by floral undertones and a hint of almond
wines.palate: Light-bodied and refreshing on the palate, with flavors of green apple, peach, and lemon zest. The finish is crisp and balanced with a touch of sweetness
wines.appearance: A pale straw yellow color with fine and persistent bubbles

wines.name: Astoria Yu Sushi Sparkling Brut
wines.grape: Typical Grapes Of The Treviso Area
wines.description: Astoria Yu Sushi Sparkling Brut is an exquisite sparkling wine designed to complement a range of flavors but is particularly oriented towards enhancing the experience of sushi and other similar dishes.
wines.nose: Fresh and fruity bouquet, with notes of green apple, pear, and citrus, underscored by subtle hints of white flowers
wines.palate: Light-bodied and refreshing on the palate, featuring crisp acidity and flavors of lemon, green apple, and a hint of minerality
wines.appearance: Pale straw yellow with fine, persistent bubbles

wines.description: Astoria Butterfly Prosecco Extra Dry is a zesty and fresh sparkling wine that embodies a perfect blend of tradition and innovation, showcasing the excellence of the Treviso region. Produced using the Charmat method, it ensures a fruit-driven profile with invigorating minerals, standing out for its finesse and elegance.
wines.nose: Intense and fragrant, with delightful notes of green apple, pear, peach, melon, citrus, and white flower, complemented by subtle floral nuances and a slight hint of yeast
wines.palate: Soft, full-bodied, and harmonious on the palate, offering a fruit-driven profile with invigorating minerals and stone fruits. Its freshness is beautifully balanced by a pleasant creaminess and vibrant acidity, leading to a clean…

wines.name: Astoria Fashion Victim Moscato Spumante
wines.description: Astoria Fashion Victim Moscato Spumante is a vibrant sparkling wine that showcases the delightful sweetness and effervescence of Moscato.
wines.nose: Fragrant nose with notes of orange blossom, peach, and apricot, accented by a subtle hint of honeysuckle
wines.palate: Light-bodied and refreshing on the palate, with flavors of ripe peach, citrus, and honey. The sweetness is balanced by a hint of acidity, making it lively and enjoyable
wines.appearance: Pale golden color with fine bubbles

wines.name: Disznókő Tokaji 1413 Szamorodni Edes (500 ml)
wines.description: Disznk Tokaji 1413 Szamorodni Edes is a luxurious dessert wine that captures the essence of the Tokaj region with its blend of noble rot-affected grapes and the rich heritage of Hungarian winemaking.
wines.nose: Perfumed nose with layers of dried apricot, honey, and exotic spices, intertwined with floral notes and a hint of botrytis
wines.palate: Sweet and luscious on the palate, with flavors of ripe stone fruit, orange marmalade, and vanilla. The wine’s sweetness is balanced by a refreshing acidity, providing a clean, long finish
wines.appearance: A brilliant amber-gold color
wines.pairing: Cheese, Desserts, Foie Gras, Spicy Food

wines.name: Disznókő Tokaji Late Harvest Kësõi Szüret (500 ml)
wines.description: Disznk Tokaji Late Harvest Ksi Szret 2018 is a delightful sweet wine from the renowned Tokaji region of Hungary.
wines.nose: An enticing bouquet of fresh white flowers, honey, and ripened citrus fruits, with subtle notes of apricot and quince
wines.palate: Lusciously sweet on the palate, with flavors of honeyed peaches, dried apricots, and a hint of orange zest. The sweetness is balanced by a refreshing acidity, making it an exquisite dessert wine
wines.appearance: A shimmering golden hue that reflects its sweetness and richness

wines.name: Cantina Zaccagnini “Tralcetto” Cerasuolo d’Abruzzo DOC
wines.description: Cantina Zaccagnini “Tralcetto” Cerasuolo d’Abruzzo DOC is a refreshing and vibrant rosé wine from the Abruzzo region of Italy known for its crisp acidity and bright fruit flavors.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose with layers of red berries strawberry cherry and subtle floral notes
wines.palate: Light-bodied and refreshing on the palate with flavors of ripe red fruits like raspberry and watermelon complemented by a zesty acidity and a clean finish
wines.appearance: A delicate pink hue with hints of salmon

wines.name: Cantina Zaccagnini “Tralcetto” Rosé Terre di Chieti IGT
wines.description: Cantina Zaccagnini “Tralcetto” Rosé Terre di Chieti IGT 2021 is a vibrant rosé wine that reflects the character of the Montepulciano grape with a refreshing and lively expression.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose with notes of fresh strawberries, red cherries, and a hint of rosée petals, complemented by subtle citrus undertones
wines.palate: Light-bodied on the palate, with flavors of juicy red berries, watermelon, and a touch of minerality. The wine is crisp and well-balanced, making it an excellent choice for summer sipping
wines.appearance: A delicate and brilliant pink color

wines.name: Tenuta Ulisse Premium Rosé
wines.description: Tenuta Ulisse Premium Rosé 2022 is an elegant and fresh rosé wine that embodies the vibrant spirit of the Mediterranean with its aromatic bouquet and refined profile.
wines.nose: The nose is fragrant with notes of wild strawberry, raspberry, and rosée petals, complemented by subtle hints of citrus and a touch of minerality
wines.palate: Light-bodied and refreshing on the palate with flavors of red berries, watermelon, and a crisp finish. The acidity is well-balanced, enhancing the wines zest and vibrancy
wines.appearance: A delicate pale pink color with shimmering reflections

wines.name: Ruggeri Argeo Prosecco Rosé Brut Millesimato DOC
wines.description: Ruggeri Argeo Proséecco Rosé Brut Millesimato DOC is an elegant rosé wine that combines the refreshing qualities of Proséecco with the delicate aromas and flavors typical of Pinot Noir.
wines.nose: Aromas of red berries, particularly strawberry and raspberry, complemented by subtle floral notes and a hint of citrus zest
wines.palate: Light-bodied and crisp on the palate, with flavors of fresh red fruit, gentle minerality, and a refreshing finish
wines.appearance: A delicate pink hue with fine and persistent bubbles

wines.name: Chiarli Il Mio Rosato Amabile Rosé Lambrusco dell’Emilia IGT
wines.description: Chiarli Il Mio Roséato Amabile Rosé Lambrusco dell’Emilia IGT is a delightful rosé wine that captures the charm of the Lambrusco varietal with a touch of sweetness and a vibrant character.
wines.nose: Fruity and floral aromas with notes of strawberry, cherry, and rosée petals, accompanied by a hint of citrus
wines.palate: Light-bodied and slightly sweet on the palate, with flavors of red berries, apples, and a slight minerality. Balanced acidity provides a refreshing finish
wines.appearance: A bright pink hue with a fine effervescence

wines.name: Val D’Oca Prosecco Rosé Millesimato Extra Dry DOC
wines.description: Val D’Oca Proséecco Rosé Millesimato Extra Dry DOC is a delightful sparkling wine that merges the crisp qualities of Proséecco with the vibrant hues of a Rosé, creating a charming and versatile option for various occasions.
wines.nose: Fresh and fruity aromas, including hints of red berries and floral undertones
wines.palate: Light and refreshing on the palate, with flavors of strawberry, raspberry, and a hint of citrus. The off-dry style offers a slight sweetness balanced by crisp acidity
wines.appearance: A delicate pink color with fine bubbles

wines.name: Astoria Fashion Victim Rosé Spumante Extra Dry
wines.description: Astoria Fashion Victim Rosé Spumante Extra Dry is an Extra Dry rosé sparkling wine born from aromatic grapes grown in the sunny Val de Brun estate in Trentino Alto Adige. Crafted with short maceration and low-temperature fermentation, this wine presents a balanced, delicate, and very elegant profile, embodying a…
wines.nose: A gentle and suggestive bouquet, with hints of fresh fruits, white flowers, and notes of strawberry, ripe raspberry, and red berry fruit
wines.palate: Dry, savory, lively, and delicately aromatic, offering a full-bodied, harmonious, and nicely balanced palate with an elegant, dry finish
wines.appearance: Delicate pink with bright transparencies, featuring pale pink with ruby highlights and a fine, persistent perlage

wines.name: Astoria Butterfly Prosecco Rosé Extra Dry
wines.description: Astoria Butterfly Proséecco Rosé Extra Dry is a captivating sparkling wine that combines the freshness of Glera with the delicate nuances of Pinot Noir to create a delightful Proséecco Rosé.
wines.nose: Fragrant bouquet of wild strawberries, raspberries, and rosées, intertwined with light citrus notes
wines.palate: Light-bodied and effervescent on the palate, with flavors of red berries, pomegranate, and a hint of crisp apple. The off-dry finish adds a subtle sweetness without overwhelming the palate
wines.appearance: A beautiful, pale pink color with fine and persistent bubbles

wines.name: Reichsgraf von Kesselstatt Sommerpalais Riesling (off-dry) COMING SOON
wines.description: Reichsgraf von Kesselstatt Sommerpalais Riesling (off-dry) is a tantalizing white wine that offers the classic attributes of Riesling with a delightful off-dry finish, perfect for a variety of palates.
wines.nose: Fresh and aromatic nose with notes of green apple, lime, and white flowers, complemented by hints of wet stone and mineral undertones
wines.palate: Medium-bodied with a balanced sweetness. Flavors of crisp green apple, apricot, and honey intertwine with a zesty acidity, leaving a clean and refreshing finish
wines.appearance: A clear, pale yellow color

wines.name: Graf Johann IV Riesling Trocken (dry) COMING SOON
wines.description: Graf Johann IV Riesling Trocken (dry) showcases the classic characteristics of a dry Riesling, reflecting the terroir and meticulous winemaking of the region.
wines.nose: An aromatic bouquet of green apple, citrus zest, and white flowers complemented by mineral notes and subtle petrol undertones
wines.palate: Crisp and refreshing with flavors of lime, green apple, and a touch of apricot. Balanced acidity brings a lively and clean finish
wines.appearance: Pale straw yellow with hints of green

wines.name: Graf Johann IV Riesling Halb-Trocken (off-dry)
wines.description: 1924 Scotch Barrel Aged Chardonnay is an intriguing white wine that offers a unique twist on traditional Chardonnay by incorporating the rich influence of Scotch whisky barrel aging.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose with layers of ripe apple, pear, and tropical fruits, intertwined with hints of vanilla, caramel, and a touch of smokiness from the Scotch barrels
wines.palate: Full-bodied and creamy on the palate, with flavors of baked apple, pineapple, and butterscotch. The influence of the Scotch barrels adds complexity with notes of toasted oak, spice, and a subtle hint of peat
wines.appearance: A brilliant golden yellow color

wines.name: Figuière Première Côtes de Provence Rosé AOP
wines.description: Figuire Premire 30th Anniversary Edition Ctes de Provence Rosé AOP is a distinguished rosé wine that celebrates three decades of winemaking excellence from the Figuire estate in the prestigious Ctes de Provence region.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose with notes of fresh strawberries, raspberries, and floral undertones
wines.palate: Light-bodied and refreshing on the palate, with flavors of red berries, citrus, and a hint of minerality. The wine exhibits a well-balanced acidity and a crisp finish
wines.appearance: Pale pink color with a delicate hue

wines.name: Figuière Signature Magali Rosé, Côtes de Provence AOP
wines.description: Figuire Signature Magali Rosé, Ctes de Provence AOP is a refreshing rosé wine that captures the essence of Provence with its vibrant and aromatic profile.
wines.nose: Fresh and aromatic with notes of red berries, citrus fruits, and a touch of floral hints
wines.palate: Light-bodied and crisp on the palate with flavors of strawberry, raspberry, and a zesty citrus finish. The wine offers a perfect balance of fruitiness and acidity
wines.appearance: A beautiful pale pink color imparting a sense of lightness and elegance
wines.pairing: Cheese, Grilled Fish, Lean Fish, Pasta

wines.name: Château des Ferrages Mon Plaisir Sainte Victoire Côtes de Provence Rosé
wines.description: Chteau des Ferrages Mon Plaisir Sainte Victoire Ctes de Provence Rosé 2022 is a refreshing and elegant rosé wine that captures the essence of Provence with its delicate balance of fruit and floral notes.
wines.nose: A fragrant bouquet of red berries, white flowers, and hints of citrus, creating a lively and aromatic profile
wines.palate: Light-bodied and crisp on the palate, with flavors of strawberry, raspberry, and a touch of melon. The minerality and fresh acidity provide a clean, refreshing finish
wines.appearance: A pale salmon pink color, inviting and vibrant

wines.name: Château des Ferrages Roumery Côtes de Provence Rosé COMING SOON
wines.description: 2022 Chteau des Ferrages Roumery Ctes de Provence Rosé is a delightful rosé wine that captures the essence of the Provence region with its refreshing and vibrant profile.
wines.nose: An aromatic bouquet of fresh strawberries, raspberries, and red currants intertwined with hints of rosée petals and citrus zest
wines.palate: Crisp and refreshing on the palate, with flavors of wild berries, white peach, and a subtle hint of herbal notes. Well-balanced acidity adds to the wine’s liveliness and elegance
wines.appearance: A delicate, pale pink color

wines.name: Le Bijou de Sophie Valrose Rosé Coteaux de Béziers IGP COMING SOON
wines.description: Le Bijou de Sophie Valrosée Rosé Coteaux de Bziers IGP 2022 is a delightful rosé wine from the south of France, showcasing a careful blend of Grenache/Garnacha, Cinsault, and Syrah/Shiraz varietals.
wines.nose: Fresh and aromatic nose with notes of wild strawberries, raspberries, and a hint of white flowers
wines.palate: Light-bodied and crisp on the palate, with flavors of juicy red berries, citrus zest, and a mild herbal undertone
wines.appearance: A delicate pink hue with subtle salmon reflections

wines.name: Cuvée Jolie Terre de Providence Rosé Pays D’Oc IGP
wines.description: Cuvée Jolie Terre de Providence Rosé Pays D’Oc IGP is a refreshing and elegant rosé, crafted by Bijou, a leading producer dedicated to quality and sustainability in the South of France. This wine embodies the vibrant spirit of the Pays D’Oc region, known for its expressive rosés, and is inspired by Picasso’s love for…
wines.nose: The nose offers delicious aromas of bright red berries, floral honeysuckle, and vibrant citrus notes, with a subtle hint of minerality
wines.palate: Light-bodied and crisp on the palate, it delivers refreshing flavors of strawberry and watermelon, complemented by a touch of minerality. Its well-balanced, crisp acidity leads to a long, delicate finish
wines.appearance: A captivating and delicate pale pink colour, reflecting its Provençal-style elegance

wines.name: Plaimont Rosé d’Enfer Saint Mont AOC
wines.description: Plaimont Rosé d’Enfer Saint Mont AOC is a delightful rosé wine that captures the essence of the Saint Mont terroir, offering a refreshing and vibrant experience.
wines.nose: A fragrant bouquet of red berries, peach, and citrus, complemented by subtle floral notes
wines.palate: Light-bodied and crisp on the palate, with flavors of strawberry, raspberry, and a hint of grapefruit, leading to a refreshing and clean finish
wines.appearance: A delicate, pale pink color with bright, shimmering reflections

wines.name: Les Producteurs Réunis Cuvée Dissenay Chardonnay
wines.description: Les Producteurs Runis Cuve Dissenay Chardonnay 2022 is a distinctive white wine that offers a balanced expression of traditional Chardonnay with a touch of oak influence for added depth and complexity.
wines.nose: Elegant nose featuring aromas of citrus, green apple, and white peach, complemented by delicate notes of vanilla and toasted oak
wines.palate: Full-bodied and smooth on the palate, presenting flavors of ripe citrus, apple, and pear, along with hints of buttery oak and a touch of minerality
wines.appearance: Pale straw yellow color with subtle green hues

wines.name: Beaurempart Grande Réserve Rouge Pays d’Oc IGP
wines.description: Beaurempart Grande Rserve Rouge Pays d’Oc IGP is a robust red wine blend that showcases the unique characteristics of Merlot, Cabernet Sauvignon, and Syrah/Shiraz varietals from the Pays d’Oc region.
wines.nose: An inviting bouquet of dark berries, black cherries, and plums mingled with notes of spices, herbs, and subtle oak
wines.palate: Full-bodied with rich layers of black fruits, hints of chocolate, and a touch of pepper. Well-structured tannins and a balanced finish with nuances of toasted oak
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red color with purple hues

wines.name: Beaurempart Grande Réserve Blanc Côtes de Gascogne IGP
wines.description: Beaurempart Grande Rserve Blanc Ctes de Gascogne IGP is an expressive white wine from the Ctes de Gascogne region that showcases the bright and refreshing qualities of its varietals.
wines.nose: Fresh and aromatic nose with notes of citrus, passionfruit, and white flowers, along with hints of green apple and a touch of minerality
wines.palate: Light-bodied and vibrant on the palate, featuring crisp acidity and flavors of grapefruit, lime, and tropical fruits balanced by a refreshing minerality
wines.appearance: Pale yellow with greenish tints

wines.name: Sous les Voûtes Comte Tolosan IGP (Merlot-Cabernet)
wines.description: Sous les Votes Comte Tolosan IGP 2022 is a uniquely styled wine that embodies the regional charm and diversity of the Comte Tolosan area.
wines.nose: Exhibits delicate aromatic notes of white flowers, citrus fruits, and a subtle hint of minerality
wines.palate: Medium-bodied with a balanced palate, featuring flavors of green apple, lemon zest, and a touch of herbaceousness, complemented by a clean, crisp finish
wines.appearance: Displays a bright and clean appearance, often golden yellow, indicative of a well-crafted wine

wines.name: Claire Patelin Sauvignon Blanc Colombard
wines.description: Claire Patelin Sauvignon Blanc Colombard is a refreshing white wine that highlights the vibrant characteristics of both Sauvignon Blanc and Colombard grapes, delivering a crisp and aromatic experience.
wines.nose: A fragrant bouquet with notes of citrus, green apple, and tropical fruits, accompanied by a subtle floral touch
wines.palate: Light-bodied and zesty on the palate, with flavors of lemon, lime, and green apple. The crisp acidity adds a refreshing finish
wines.appearance: A clear, pale straw-yellow color

wines.name: Aubert & Mathieu Gaspard Terrasses du Larzac AOP
wines.description: Aubert & Mathieu Gaspard Terrasses du Larzac AOP is a robust and expressive red wine from the Terrasses du Larzac appellation in the Languedoc region of France.
wines.nose: A complex bouquet with aromas of blackberries, plums, and cherries, intertwined with notes of pepper, herbs, and a hint of smokiness
wines.palate: Full-bodied with a rich and layered palate. Flavors of dark fruits are complemented by spicy undertones and a touch of earthiness. Well-integrated tannins and a long, persistent finish
wines.appearance: A deep ruby color with purple hues

wines.name: Aubert & Mathieu Hautes Pistes Syrah Pays d’Oc
wines.description: Aubert & Mathieu Hautes Pistes Syrah Pays d’Oc is a captivating red wine that highlights the rich and expressive qualities of Syrah grown in the Pays d’Oc region.
wines.nose: An aromatic bouquet featuring blackberry, black cherry, and plum with underlying notes of pepper, smoke, and herbs
wines.palate: Full-bodied and well-structured, with flavors of dark berries, licorice, and subtle earthy undertones. A spicy finish with a touch of oak enhances its complexity
wines.appearance: A deep, dark ruby color with violet reflections

wines.name: Aubert & Mathieu Hautes Pistes Pinot Noir Pays d’Oc
wines.description: Aubert & Mathieu Hautes Pistes Pinot Noir Pays d’Oc is a bright and elegant red wine from the Languedoc region of France.
wines.nose: An aromatic nose featuring fresh red fruits such as cherry and raspberry, with subtle floral notes and a hint of earthiness
wines.palate: On the palate, it is light-bodied and delicate, with flavors of red berries, a touch of spice, and a smooth, elegant finish
wines.appearance: A vibrant light ruby color

wines.name: Aubert & Mathieu Marie Antoinette Corbières AOP
wines.description: Aubert & Mathieu Marie Antoinette Corbires AOP is a distinguished red wine from the Corbires appellation in southern France, embodying the rich traditions and terroir of the region.
wines.nose: Aromas of dark berries, plum, and black cherry, interlaced with notes of pepper, spice, and a touch of oak
wines.palate: Full-bodied with supple tannins, flavors of ripe black fruits, licorice, and hints of leather and tobacco, with a long, persistent finish
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red with violet hues

wines.name: Aubert & Mathieu Eugénie Minervois AOP COMING SOON
wines.description: Aubert & Mathieu Eugnie Minervois AOP 2020 is a compelling red wine from the Minervois region known for its robust flavor profile and elegant balance.
wines.nose: Inviting nose featuring red fruits like raspberry and cherry, complemented by notes of black pepper, lavender, and a hint of wet stones
wines.palate: Full-bodied with rich flavors of ripe red berries, plums, and a touch of black olive. The tannins are smooth and well-integrated, with a lingering finish that hints at earthy undertones and spices
wines.appearance: A deep ruby color with violet hues

wines.name: Aubert & Mathieu Hautes Pistes Chardonnay Pays d’Oc
wines.description: 1924 Scotch Barrel Aged Chardonnay is an intriguing white wine that offers a unique twist on traditional Chardonnay by incorporating the rich influence of Scotch whisky barrel aging.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose with layers of ripe apple, pear, and tropical fruits, intertwined with hints of vanilla, caramel, and a touch of smokiness from the Scotch barrels
wines.palate: Full-bodied and creamy on the palate, with flavors of baked apple, pineapple, and butterscotch. The influence of the Scotch barrels adds complexity with notes of toasted oak, spice, and a subtle hint of peat
wines.appearance: A brilliant golden yellow color

wines.name: Aubert & Mathieu Kate Sauvignon Blanc
wines.description: Aubert & Mathieu Kate Sauvignon Blanc is a vibrant white wine that embodies the classic characteristics of Sauvignon Blanc with a focus on freshness and aromatic complexity.
wines.nose: Intensely aromatic nose with notes of citrus fruits especially lime and grapefruit along with hints of green apple and freshly cut grass
wines.palate: Light-bodied with crisp acidity the palate reveals flavors of lemon lime and passion fruit with a touch of minerality adding depth to the wine
wines.appearance: A pale straw yellow color with greenish highlights

wines.name: M. Chapoutier Bila-Haut Côtes du Roussillon Villages Red
wines.description: M. Chapoutier Bila-Haut Ctes du Roussillon Villages Red is a robust red wine that showcases the traditional Rhne blend of Grenache, Syrah, and Mourvdre, with a focus on rich flavor and complexity.
wines.nose: An expressive nose featuring dark fruits like blackberry and black cherry, along with hints of spice, leather, and a touch of earthiness
wines.palate: Full-bodied on the palate, providing a rich texture with flavors of ripe blackberries, plum, and a mix of spices. There are also subtle notes of cocoa and a mineral finish that adds complexity
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red color with a vibrant hue

wines.name: M. Chapoutier Bila-Haut Côtes du Roussillon White
wines.description: 1924 Scotch Barrel Aged Chardonnay is an intriguing white wine that offers a unique twist on traditional Chardonnay by incorporating the rich influence of Scotch whisky barrel aging.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose with layers of ripe apple, pear, and tropical fruits, intertwined with hints of vanilla, caramel, and a touch of smokiness from the Scotch barrels
wines.palate: Full-bodied and creamy on the palate, with flavors of baked apple, pineapple, and butterscotch. The influence of the Scotch barrels adds complexity with notes of toasted oak, spice, and a subtle hint of peat
wines.appearance: A brilliant golden yellow color

wines.name: Marius by Michel Chapoutier Syrah-Grenache
wines.description: Marius by Michel Chapoutier Syrah-Grenache 2022 is a harmonious red blend that highlights the robust nature of Syrah and the fruity softness of Grenache.
wines.nose: Intense nose with aromas of dark berries, black currant, and hints of spice and pepper
wines.palate: Medium to full-bodied on the palate, showcasing flavors of ripe blackberry, plum, and subtle notes of licorice and earthy undertones. The oak aging adds a layer of vanilla and subtle smokiness
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red with purple undertones

wines.name: Marius by Michel Chapoutier Rosé
wines.description: Marius by Michel Chapoutier Rosé is a delightful rosé wine that embodies the fresh and vibrant spirit of southern France, crafted with utmost precision and care by the renowned winemaker Michel Chapoutier.
wines.nose: Fresh and inviting nose with notes of red berries, citrus, and delicate floral hints
wines.palate: Light-bodied and refreshing on the palate, with flavors of strawberry, raspberry, and a hint of lemon zest. The wine has a crisp acidity and a clean finish
wines.appearance: A beautiful pale pink color

wines.name: Marius by Michel Chapoutier Viognier
wines.description: Marius by Michel Chapoutier Viognier is a vibrant white wine that beautifully showcases the elegance and expressiveness of the Viognier grape. This dry, fresh, and clean wine is persistently aromatic and refreshing, capturing the bountiful orchard fruit notes and lilting floral tones that make Viognier so captivating…
wines.nose: The nose reveals enticing aromas of white fruits, particularly juicy pear, and delicate blossoms. Further layers include notes of peach, apricot, honeysuckle, and a touch of citrus, with hints of chamomile, geranium, saffron, and ginger…
wines.palate: Suave, gourmand, and exceptionally well-balanced, the palate offers a great freshness and persistence. It is medium-bodied with a silky texture, presenting flavors of ripe peach, pear, and apricot, harmonized by refreshing acidity and a…
wines.appearance: Pale yellow colour with gold tints

wines.name: Marius by Michel Chapoutier Vermentino
wines.description: Marius by Michel Chapoutier Vermentino is an inviting white wine, crafted to introduce enthusiasts to authentic French wines that truly express their Southern France origins. This wine embodies the warmth of the Languedoc-Roussillon terroirs, offering an expressive, approachable, and elegant experience designed for…
wines.nose: Very open, revealing vibrant citrus aromas, notably grapefruit, lime, and stone fruit, complemented by notes of ripe fruit and peach
wines.palate: An ample, rich, and fruity attack leads to a refreshing palate with good acidity and flavors of ripe fruit. It offers delightful citrus notes and a touch of minerality, culminating in a pleasant, dry finish with good length

wines.name: M. Chapoutier La Mordorée Côte-Rôtie LIMITED STOCK
wines.description: M. Chapoutier La Mordore Cte-Rtie is a distinguished red wine from the Cte-Rtie appellation, known for its powerful yet elegant profile.
wines.nose: Expressive nose with aromas of dark berries, black pepper, and violets, intertwined with hints of smoked meat and earthy undertones
wines.palate: Full-bodied and well-structured on the palate, featuring flavors of blackberry, plum, and blackcurrant. The oak aging imparts notes of vanilla, spice, and a touch of toasted oak, adding depth and complexity
wines.appearance: Deep ruby color with violet hues

wines.name: M. Chapoutier Les Greffieux Ermitage
wines.description: M. Chapoutier Les Greffieux Ermitage is a sophisticated red wine from the esteemed Hermitage appellation in the Rhne Valley, recognized for its elegant and powerful profile.
wines.nose: Complex bouquet of black fruits such as blackberry and blackcurrant, intertwined with hints of spices, licorice, and a subtle touch of earthy truffle
wines.palate: Full-bodied, rich, and complex on the palate with layers of black fruit, pepper, and earthy notes. Well-structured tannins provide a balanced and enduring finish
wines.appearance: Dense, deep red with purple highlights, indicating its intensity and concentration

wines.name: M. Chapoutier Monier de la Sizeranne Hermitage
wines.description: M.Chapoutier Monier de la Sizeranne Hermitage 2017 is a distinguished red wine from the Hermitage appellation in the Rhne Valley known for its rich, complex flavor and adherence to traditional winemaking techniques.
wines.nose: A complex nose featuring dark berries, black currants, and spices, accompanied by subtle hints of violets, leather, and a touch of smoky earthiness
wines.palate: Full-bodied and velvety on the palate, with flavors of ripe blackberries, plums, and a suggestion of licorice. The wine exhibits well-integrated tannins and a long, harmonious finish
wines.appearance: A deep garnet color with purple hues indicating youth and vibrancy
wines.pairing: Duck, Goose, Grilled Meat, Hard Cheeses

wines.name: M. Chapoutier Les Bécasses Côte-Rôtie
wines.description: M. Chapoutier Les Bcasses Cte-Rtie is a distinguished red wine that exemplifies the elegance and complexity of Cte-Rtie wines from the Northern Rhne region.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose featuring black fruits such as blackberry and plum, complimented by floral notes of violet and a touch of spice including black pepper and clove
wines.palate: Full-bodied with rich and refined tannins, offering flavors of dark berries, black olives, and a hint of smoked meat. The palate is complex, with additional layers of licorice and earthy undertones
wines.appearance: A deep ruby color with garnet highlights

wines.name: M. Chapoutier La Bernardine Châteauneuf-du-Pape Rouge
wines.description: M. Chapoutier La Bernardine Chteauneuf-du-Pape is an exemplary red wine from the renowned Chteauneuf-du-Pape region, known for its rich and complex flavor profile.
wines.nose: Aromas of dark cherry, plum, and blackberry, complemented by hints of spice, licorice, and earthy undertones
wines.palate: Full-bodied and robust on the palate, with flavors of ripe red and black fruits, followed by notes of black pepper, herbs, and a touch of oak
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red color with a garnet hue

wines.name: M. Chapoutier Invitare Condrieu
wines.description: M. Chapoutier Invitare Condrieu 2022 is an exceptional white wine that highlights the elegance and richness of the Viognier grape.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose with layers of apricot, peach, and delicate floral notes, complemented by hints of honey and subtle spices
wines.palate: Full-bodied and lush on the palate, with flavors of ripe apricot, peach, and citrus fruits. The wine offers a silky texture with a long, elegant finish and a touch of minerality
wines.appearance: A bright, golden yellow color with crystal clarity

wines.name: M. Chapoutier Les Jocasses Gigondas
wines.description: M. Chapoutier Les Jocasses Gigondas is a robust red wine that showcases the traditional blend of Grenache, Syrah, and Mourvdre, typical of the Gigondas region.
wines.nose: Aromas of dark berries, plums, and hints of black pepper, complemented by nuanced notes of herbs and spices
wines.palate: Rich and full-bodied on the palate with flavors of ripe blackberries, cherries, and subtle hints of chocolate and espresso. The tannins are well-integrated and the finish is lingering with a touch of spice
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red with violet highlights

wines.name: M. Chapoutier Avarum Vacqueyras
wines.description: M. Chapoutier Avarum Vacqueyras is a robust red wine that reflects the rich soils and climate of the Rhne Valley.
wines.nose: Intense aromas of black cherry and plum with hints of black pepper, licorice, and subtle earthy notes
wines.palate: Full-bodied and rich on the palate with flavors of dark berries, spice, and a touch of leather. The tannins are smooth and well-integrated
wines.appearance: Deep ruby color with violet reflections

wines.name: M. Chapoutier Deschants Saint-Joseph Rouge
wines.description: M. Chapoutier Deschants Saint-Joseph is a distinguished red wine from the Saint-Joseph appellation, showcasing the elegance and complexity of Syrah.
wines.nose: A pronounced nose with layers of black currant, blackberry, and violet, intertwined with hints of pepper, leather, and smoky nuances
wines.palate: Full-bodied and well-structured on the palate, with flavors of ripe dark fruits such as blackberries and plums. Subtle notes of spice and earthiness add complexity, along with a touch of minerality from the terroir
wines.appearance: A deep ruby red color with hints of purple

wines.name: M. Chapoutier Petite Ruche Crozes-Hermitage Rouge
wines.description: M. Chapoutier Petite Ruche Crozes-Hermitage Rouge is a refined red wine from the esteemed Crozes-Hermitage appellation showcasing the purity and depth of Syrah.
wines.nose: Inviting nose with vibrant aromas of dark berries, black olives, and subtle spices complemented by earthy undertones
wines.palate: The palate is generous and well-structured offering flavors of ripe blackberries, plums, and a hint of pepper. Smooth tannins and a long, elegant finish add complexity and balance
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red color with purple highlights

wines.name: M. Chapoutier Adunatio Côtes-du-Rhône Bio
wines.description: M. Chapoutier Adunatio Ctes-du-Rhne Bio showcases the best of Rhne varietals and organic winemaking, highlighting both tradition and modern, environmentally-friendly practices.
wines.nose: An expressive bouquet of red and black fruits such as raspberry and blackberry, intermixed with notes of spices, licorice, and a hint of leather
wines.palate: Medium-bodied with a smooth texture and well-integrated tannins. Flavors of ripe cherry, plum, and wild herbs, followed by a subtle smokiness and spice on the finish
wines.appearance: Ruby red color with purple hues

wines.name: M. Chapoutier Belleruche Côtes-du-Rhône Rouge
wines.description: M. Chapoutier Belleruche Ctes-du-Rhne Rouge is a distinguished red wine that captures the essence of the Ctes-du-Rhne region with its classic blend of varietals offering a well-rounded and versatile profile.
wines.nose: Inviting nose with aromas of fresh red berries black cherries and hints of spices and herbs, characteristic of the Rhone blend
wines.palate: Medium-bodied on the palate with flavors of ripe raspberries and black currants complemented by subtle notes of pepper, earth, and a hint of licorice
wines.appearance: A deep ruby color with purple highlights

wines.name: M. Chapoutier La Ciboise Costières de Nîmes
wines.description: M. Chapoutier La Ciboise Costires de Nmes is a refined red wine from the Rhne Valley that reflects the rich terroirs of the region.
wines.nose: Aromatic notes of red berries, black currants, and plums, with underlying hints of spices and herbs
wines.palate: Medium-bodied on the palate, featuring flavors of ripe red fruits, black cherry, and a touch of pepper, complemented by well-integrated oak and smooth tannins
wines.appearance: A deep ruby red color with hints of purple on the rim

wines.name: M. Chapoutier Petite Ruche Crozes-Hermitage Blanc
wines.description: M. Chapoutier Petite Ruche Crozes-Hermitage Blanc 2022 is a refined white wine from the Crozes-Hermitage AOC in France’s Rhne Valley that captures the essence of its terroir.
wines.nose: Aromatic notes of white peach, apricot, and citrus blossoms, complemented by delicate hints of honeysuckle and almond
wines.palate: Medium-bodied with a silky texture, offering flavors of ripe stone fruits, citrus zest, and a touch of minerality. The palate is well-balanced with a refreshing acidity
wines.appearance: A pale, golden yellow color with brilliant clarity

wines.name: M. Chapoutier Belleruche Côtes-du-Rhône Blanc
wines.grape: Bourboulenc, Clairette, Grenache blanc, Roussanne, Viognier
wines.description: M. Chapoutier Belleruche Ctes-du-Rhne Blanc 2022 offers a delightful expression of the Ctes-du-Rhne terroir with a harmonious blend of several varietals.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose with notes of white flowers, citrus, and stone fruits accompanied by subtle hints of honey and minerality
wines.palate: Medium-bodied with a crisp and refreshing palate. Flavors of peach, apricot, and lemon zest are complemented by a touch of almond and a slight minerality, providing a well-rounded and persistent finish
wines.appearance: Pale yellow with green reflections indicating freshness and vibrancy

wines.name: Carmes De Rieussec, Sauternes AOC (375ml)
wines.description: Carmes De Rieussec, Sauternes AOC (375ml) is a notable sweet wine produced in the Sauternes region, offering an elegant and rich experience.
wines.nose: A luxurious aromatic profile with notes of apricot, peach, and honey, complemented by hints of citrus and floral essences
wines.palate: Lusciously sweet on the palate with flavors of ripe stone fruits, honey, and a touch of spice. The balanced acidity provides a refreshing finish
wines.appearance: A bright golden color, indicative of its sweetness and concentration

wines.name: Haut Charmes, Sauternes AOC (375ml)
wines.description: Haut Charmes Sauternes AOC (375ml) is a remarkable white wine from the Sauternes region, renowned for producing sweet, luscious wines with remarkable depth and complexity.
wines.nose: An enticing bouquet of ripe apricot, honey, and exotic fruits, accentuated by delicate floral notes and a hint of vanilla
wines.palate: Luxuriously sweet and balanced on the palate, featuring flavors of peach, mango, and honey, with a refreshing acidity that adds brightness and balance
wines.appearance: A radiant golden hue with brilliant highlights

wines.name: Château Larcis Ducasse, Saint-Émilion Grand Cru Classé AOC
wines.description: Chteau Larcis Ducasse, Saint-milion Grand Cru Class AOC is a distinguished red wine from the renowned Saint-milion region, known for its rich legacy and exceptional terroir.
wines.nose: Aromas of blackberries, plums, and cherries, intertwined with hints of violet, leather, and earthy undertones
wines.palate: Full-bodied with well-integrated tannins, offering flavors of ripe dark berries, cocoa, and a touch of spice. The finish is long and smooth with a lingering complexity
wines.appearance: Deep ruby color with garnet hues

wines.name: Petit Figeac, Saint-Émilion Grand Cru Classé AOC
wines.description: Petit Figeac, Saint-milion Grand Cru Class AOC is a distinguished red wine from Bordeaux’s Right Bank, known for its elegance and complexity.
wines.nose: The nose reveals layers of dark berries, plum, and black cherry, accented by hints of cedar, tobacco, and a touch of vanilla
wines.palate: Full-bodied with a rich, velvety texture. The palate is greeted with flavors of ripe blackcurrant, blackberry, and plum, complemented by notes of dark chocolate, earthy undertones, and finely integrated oak
wines.appearance: A deep ruby red color with garnet reflections

wines.name: Château Faugères, Saint-Émilion Grand Cru Classé AOC
wines.description: Chteau Faugres, Saint-milion Grand Cru AOC is a distinguished red wine from the prestigious Saint-milion region of Bordeaux, reflecting the rich terroir and tradition of this renowned wine-producing area.
wines.nose: A complex bouquet featuring aromas of blackberries, plums, and dark cherries, with hints of tobacco, cedar, and earthy undertones
wines.palate: Full-bodied and rich on the palate, with flavors of ripe dark fruit, complemented by notes of spices, licorice, and velvety tannins. The finish is long and balanced with a touch of minerality
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red with garnet hues

wines.name: Château Quinault L’Enclos Saint-Émilion Grand Cru Grand Cru Classé AOC
wines.description: Chteau Quinault L’Enclos Saint-milion Grand Cru Grand Cru Class AOC is an esteemed red wine from the renowned Saint-milion appellation known for its rich and complex flavors.
wines.nose: A profound aromatic bouquet of ripe red fruits, blackberries, and plums, enhanced by hints of oak, vanilla, and spice
wines.palate: Full-bodied and well-structured with a harmonious blend of dark fruit flavors, subtle oak influence, and velvety tannins. Nuances of chocolate, tobacco, and a touch of minerality add depth and complexity
wines.appearance: A deep ruby color with garnet reflections

wines.name: Château Grand Corbin, Saint-Émilion Grand Cru Classé AOC
wines.description: Chteau Grand Corbin, Saint-milion Grand Cru Class AOC 2018 is a refined red wine from Bordeaux that exemplifies the prestige of Saint-milion’s Grand Cru Class designation.
wines.nose: Aromatic bouquet with notes of dark fruits, such as blackcurrant and plum, complemented by hints of spice, cedar, and earthy undertones
wines.palate: Full-bodied and well-structured on the palate, with flavors of blackberry, cherry, and cassis. Subtle oak influence brings out nuances of vanilla, clove, and a touch of smoke
wines.appearance: Deep ruby color with hints of purple at the rim

wines.name: Château La Fleur Cravignac, Saint-Émilion Grand Cru AOC
wines.grape: Cabernet Franc, Cabernet Sauvignon, Malbec, Merlot, Petit Verdot
wines.description: Chteau La Fleur Cravignac, Saint-milion Grand Cru Class AOC is a premium red wine that exemplifies the elegance and complexity of Bordeaux’s renowned Saint-milion region, crafted with care to reflect the terroir and meticulous winemaking practices.
wines.nose: Rich and complex nose featuring aromas of blackberries, black cherries, and plums, interwoven with hints of spices, cedar, and a touch of earthiness
wines.palate: Medium to full-bodied with a well-balanced structure. Flavors of ripe dark fruits, subtle oak, and fine tannins lead to a long, elegant finish
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red color with a brilliant clarity

wines.name: Château du Barry, Saint-Émilion Grand Cru AOC
wines.description: Chteau du Barry, Saint-milion Grand Cru AOC is a distinguished Bordeaux red wine that exemplifies the esteemed tradition of the Saint-milion appellation.
wines.nose: Aromas of ripe blackberry and plum, with hints of tobacco, vanilla, and earthy undertones
wines.palate: Full-bodied and structured on the palate, exhibiting flavors of dark cherry, blackcurrant, and spice. The oak aging imparts notes of mocha, cedar, and a touch of licorice
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red with garnet reflections

wines.name: Château Vieux Pourret, Saint-Émilion Grand Cru AOC
wines.description: Chteau Vieux Pourret, Saint-milion Grand Cru AOC is a distinguished red wine that embodies the rich tradition and quality of the Saint-milion Grand Cru appellation from the 2020 vintage.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose featuring ripe black fruits such as blackberries and plums, complemented by notes of vanilla, tobacco, and hints of cedar
wines.palate: Full-bodied on the palate with well-integrated tannins. Flavors of dark cherries and plums dominate followed by spicy undertones and a touch of oak influence
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red color with purple hues

wines.name: Château Benitey, Saint-Émilion Grand Cru AOC (in wooden box of 6)
wines.description: Chteau Benitey, Saint-milion Grand Cru AOC is a prestigious red wine from one of the most renowned wine regions in Bordeaux offering a classic expression of the Saint-milion terroir.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose with layers of dark fruits such as blackberry, plum, and cherry, intertwined with hints of vanilla, tobacco, and a touch of earthy minerality
wines.palate: Full-bodied and well-structured on the palate, with flavors of ripe blackberries, cherries, and plums. The tannins are firm yet smooth, providing a balanced complexity with notes of chocolate, espresso, and a subtle hint of oak
wines.appearance: A deep ruby red color

wines.name: Château Tour de Capet, Saint-Émilion Grand Cru AOC (100% Merlot)(in wooden box of 6)
wines.description: Chteau Tour de Capet, Saint-milion Grand Cru AOC (in wooden box of 6) is an exquisite red wine that represents the elegance and complexity of the Saint-milion Grand Cru appellation.
wines.nose: Pronounced aromas of black cherries, plums, and cassis intertwined with notes of cedar, tobacco, and subtle spices
wines.palate: Full-bodied with velvety tannins, featuring flavors of ripe blackberries and dark chocolate, complemented by nuances of vanilla and toasted oak
wines.appearance: Deep ruby color with hints of purple

wines.name: Château Franc Lartigue, Saint-Émilion Grand Cru AOC
wines.description: Chteau Franc Lartigue, Saint-milion Grand Cru AOC is a prestigious red wine that showcases the unique terroir of the Saint-milion region with a blend of classic Bordeaux varietals.
wines.nose: Rich nose featuring aromas of ripe blackberries, plums, and dark cherries with subtle hints of tobacco, leather, and earthiness
wines.palate: Full-bodied and well-balanced on the palate with flavors of dark fruits, cocoa, and spice. Smooth tannins and a long, elegant finish with notes of vanilla and oak
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red color with hints of garnet

wines.name: Château Nenin, Pomerol AOC
wines.description: Chteau Nenin, Pomerol AOC 2011 is a refined Bordeaux wine from the esteemed Pomerol appellation known for its exceptional quality and distinct character.
wines.nose: Intense aroma of ripe plums and blackberries complemented by notes of cocoa, cedar, and subtle earthy undertones
wines.palate: Full-bodied and elegant on the palate with flavors of dark fruit, chocolate, and a touch of minerality. Well-integrated tannins provide structure and a long, smooth finish
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red color with purple reflections

wines.name: Château Larrivet Haut-Brion, Grand Vin de Bordeaux, Pessac-Leognan AOC
wines.description: Chteau Larrivet Haut-Brion, Grand Vin de Bordeaux, Pessac-Leognan AOC 2018 combines the best attributes of traditional Bordeaux varietals, resulting in a classic and complex wine.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose featuring dark fruits like blackberry and black currant, complemented by hints of tobacco, cedar, and a touch of graphite
wines.palate: Full-bodied on the palate with layers of black fruits, plum, and a slight herbal quality. The oak aging adds complexity with notes of vanilla, spice, and subtle earthiness
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red color with purplish tinges

wines.name: Margaux by Tertre, Grand Vin de Bordeaux, Margaux AOC
wines.grape: Cabernet Franc, Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Petit Verdot
wines.description: Margaux by Tertre, Grand Vin de Bordeaux, Margaux AOC 2021 is an elegant red wine that embodies the classic charm and finesse of Bordeaux’s Margaux appellation.
wines.nose: Sophisticated nose with layers of blackcurrant, plum, and hints of violet, complemented by nuances of cedar, tobacco, and earthy undertones
wines.palate: The palate is well-structured and full-bodied, with rich flavors of dark fruits like blackberry and cherry, balanced by well-integrated oak notes of vanilla and spice. Firm tannins provide a long, smooth finish
wines.appearance: Deep ruby color with garnet reflections

wines.name: Château Leoville Barton, Saint-Julien Grand Cru Classé AOC
wines.description: Chteau Leoville Barton, Saint-Julien Grand Cru Class AOC 2017 is a prestigious red wine known for its exceptional balance and classic Bordeaux style.
wines.nose: Elegant bouquet of blackcurrant, plum, and notes of cedar, with subtle hints of mint and pencil shavings
wines.palate: Full-bodied with refined tannins, offering flavors of dark berries, cassis, and a touch of spice. The palate is complex with layers of tobacco, leather, and earthy undertones
wines.appearance: Deep ruby color with garnet reflections

wines.name: Clos du Marquis, Saint-Julien AOC
wines.description: Clos du Marquis, Saint-Julien AOC 2011 is a distinguished red wine that showcases the elegance and complexity typical of wines from the Saint-Julien appellation in Bordeaux, France.
wines.nose: A compelling nose featuring aromas of blackcurrant, plum, and cherry, accented by notes of cedar, tobacco, and subtle spices
wines.palate: Full-bodied and well-structured on the palate, with rich flavors of dark fruits such as blackberry and currant. Hints of vanilla, licorice, and earthy undertones add to the complexity, with well-integrated tannins providing a balanced…
wines.appearance: A deep ruby red color with garnet reflections

wines.name: Château Lalande-Borie, Saint-Julien AOC
wines.description: Chteau Lalande-Borie, Saint-Julien AOC is an elegant red wine originating from the esteemed Saint-Julien appellation, which is known for producing some of the most distinguished wines in Bordeaux.
wines.nose: Inviting nose with aromas of black currant, blackberry, and plum, accompanied by subtle hints of cedar, tobacco, and a touch of spice
wines.palate: Full-bodied on the palate, offering flavors of ripe dark fruits like black cherry and cassis. Well-integrated tannins provide structure, while nuances of oak, earth, and a hint of vanilla contribute to its complexity
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red color, reflecting the wine’s richness and depth

wines.name: Château Pibran, Pauillac AOC
wines.description: Chteau Pibran, Pauillac AOC 2016 is a classic red wine from the Pauillac appellation in Bordeaux, known for its robust structure and rich, complex profile.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose featuring layers of blackcurrant, dark cherries, and plum, interwoven with notes of cedar, tobacco, and a hint of spice
wines.palate: Full-bodied and well-structured, with flavors of ripe blackberries, cassis, and dark chocolate. The palate also reveals hints of leather, graphite, and a touch of oak
wines.appearance: Deep ruby color with purple highlights

wines.name: Pauillac by Pichon-Longueville, Pauillac AOC
wines.description: Pauillac by Pichon-Longueville, Pauillac AOC is a sophisticated red wine that epitomizes the elegance and complexity for which the Pauillac region of Bordeaux is renowned.
wines.nose: Aromatic bouquet with notes of blackcurrant, plum, and cedar, complemented by hints of tobacco, leather, and earthy undertones
wines.palate: Full-bodied on the palate with structured tannins. Flavors of dark fruit, blackcurrant, and cassis dominate, with layers of mocha, spice, and a touch of vanilla from oak aging
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red with hints of garnet at the rim

wines.name: Château Cos Labory, Saint-Estèphe Grand Cru Classé AOC
wines.description: Chteau Cos Labory, Saint-Estphe Grand Cru Class AOC is a prestigious red wine from the Bordeaux region, known for its rich, complex profile and elegant structure.
wines.nose: An inviting bouquet of blackcurrants, blackberries, and plums, complemented by notes of cedar, tobacco, and a hint of earthy minerality
wines.palate: Full-bodied with well-integrated tannins. Flavors of dark fruits such as blackcurrant and blackberry are enriched by layers of oak, spice, and a touch of vanilla. A long, persistent finish with hints of mocha and dried herbs
wines.appearance: Deep ruby color with purple hues

wines.name: La Mémoire de La Tour Carnet, Haut Médoc AOC by Bernard Magrez
wines.description: La Mmoire de La Tour Carnet, Haut Mdoc AOC by Bernard Magrez is a distinguished red wine from the Haut-Mdoc appellation, known for its complexity and balance.
wines.nose: An inviting bouquet of blackcurrant, raspberry, and plum, complemented by notes of cedar, tobacco, and subtle graphite
wines.palate: Full-bodied with firm yet polished tannins, offering layers of dark berries, chocolate, and hints of black pepper with a long, balanced finish
wines.appearance: Ruby red with a garnet rim, indicating both youth and potential for aging

wines.name: Château Paret, Castillon Côtes de Bordeaux AOC
wines.description: Château Paret, Castillon Côtes de Bordeaux AOC is a well-crafted red wine from the esteemed Bordeaux region, showcasing the elegance and complexity typical of the area. This amazingly dense, dark, and posh-tasting claret offers a remarkable combination of smooth, soft tannins and inherent strength. Its unique…
wines.nose: The nose reveals fragrant notes of ripe raspberry and strawberry, often accented by black cherry and subtle red fruit nuances
wines.palate: Smooth and medium-bodied on the palate, it is full of ripe fruit, offering a silky texture and a well-rounded body. Wine expert Matthew Jukes notes its “cassis-steeped” flavour
wines.appearance: A dense, dark ruby colour that hints at its depth and richness

wines.name: Le Big Boss Cabernet Sauvignon Lussac-Saint-Émilion AOC
