wines.description: Le Big Boss Cabernet Sauvignon Lussac-Saint-milion AOC is a captivating red wine highlighting the classical richness and structure of Cabernet Sauvignon within the esteemed Lussac-Saint-milion appellation.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose with intense layers of blackcurrant, plum, and cassis, intertwined with nuances of cedar, tobacco, and a touch of spice
wines.palate: Full-bodied and robust on the palate, with flavors of ripe black fruits, dark chocolate, and a hint of herbs. Tannins are firm yet velvety, providing a strong structure and long-lasting finish
wines.appearance: A deep ruby red color with garnet reflections

wines.name: Château Montaiguillon, Montagne-Saint-Émilion AOC
wines.description: Chteau Montaiguillon, Montagne-Saint-milion AOC is a notable red wine from the Montagne-Saint-milion appellation, offering a blend of traditional Bordeaux varietals that exhibit a harmonious balance and depth.
wines.nose: Aromas of ripe red fruits such as cherry and plum, complemented by notes of tobacco, cedar, and a subtle hint of spices
wines.palate: The palate reveals well-rounded tannins with flavors of black cherry, plum, and a touch of sweet tobacco. The finish is smooth with lingering notes of oak and spice
wines.appearance: A deep ruby red color with garnet reflections

wines.name: Château Macquin Saint-Georges-Saint-Émilion AOC
wines.description: Chteau Macquin Saint-Georges-Saint-milion AOC is a distinguished red wine from the Saint-Georges-Saint-milion appellation in Bordeaux France known for its rich Merlot varietal and elegant complexity.
wines.nose: Inviting nose with aromas of dark fruits such as blackberry and plum intertwined with hints of chocolate, tobacco, and subtle oak nuances
wines.palate: Full-bodied and well-structured on the palate offering flavors of ripe blackberries, black cherries, and a touch of vanilla. Supple tannins and a lingering finish of spice and toasted oak add complexity
wines.appearance: A deep ruby red color with garnet highlights

wines.name: Château Haut Veyrac Les Sense du Lisse Saint-Émilion AOP
wines.description: Chteau Haut Veyrac Les Sense du Lisse Saint-milion AOP is an elegant and refined red wine that captures the essence of the Saint-milion terroir.
wines.nose: Complex nose featuring dark fruits like black cherry and plum, alongside herbal notes, cedar, and a hint of vanilla from oak aging
wines.palate: Full-bodied on the palate with well-integrated tannins, offering flavors of ripe blackberry, cassis, and a touch of dark chocolate. The oak influence adds layers of spice and subtle notes of tobacco
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red color with a touch of garnet on the rim

wines.name: Château Divine Bêtise, Montagne-Saint-Émilion AOC
wines.description: Chteau Divine Btise, Montagne-Saint-milion AOC is an elegant red wine that epitomizes the classic style of the Right Bank Bordeaux.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose with layers of ripe blackberries, plum, and currant intertwined with hints of cedar, tobacco, and a touch of vanilla
wines.palate: Full-bodied on the palate, offering flavors of black cherry, blackberry, and dark chocolate. The oaky notes add complexity with hints of toasted wood and spice
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red color with garnet hues

wines.name: Luccianus Cabernet Franc Amphore Lussac-Saint-Émilion AOC
wines.description: Luccianus Cabernet Franc Amphore Lussac-Saint-milion AOC is a distinguished red wine that embodies the traditional winemaking techniques of the Saint-milion region while showcasing the unique character of Cabernet Franc.
wines.nose: An enticing nose with aromas of red and black berries, green pepper, and subtle earthy notes
wines.palate: Medium-bodied with a smooth texture featuring flavors of raspberry, black currant, and hints of spice. The wine exhibits a balanced acidity and soft tannins
wines.appearance: A deep ruby red color with garnet reflections

wines.name: Château Maltus, Lalande de Pomerol AOC
wines.description: 2019 Chteau Maltus, Lalande de Pomerol AOC is an exquisite red wine from the Lalande de Pomerol appellation, known for its exceptional Merlot.
wines.nose: Complex nose with rich notes of ripe plum, black cherry, and cassis, complemented by hints of tobacco, cedar, and earth
wines.palate: Full-bodied with a smooth, velvety texture. Flavors of dark berries, plum, and chocolate are balanced by subtle oak and a hint of spice. The tannins are well-integrated, providing structure and a long, elegant finish
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red with dark purple highlights

wines.name: Château La Petite Duchesse Lalande de Pomerol AOP
wines.description: Chteau La Petite Duchesse Lalande de Pomerol AOP is a refined red wine representing the prestigious terroir of Lalande de Pomerol, offering a harmonious blend of rich fruit and elegant structure.
wines.nose: Aromas of ripe blackberry, plum, and black cherry, complemented by subtle notes of cedar, tobacco, and spice
wines.palate: Full-bodied and smooth on the palate, with flavors of dark berries, chocolate, and hints of earthy undertones. Balanced tannins and a long, elegant finish
wines.appearance: Deep ruby color with rich intensity

wines.name: Château Beausejour, Fronsac AOC
wines.description: Chteau Beausejour, Fronsac AOC is a robust red wine from the Fronsac appellation in Bordeaux, known for its complex blend and aging potential.
wines.nose: Bold aromas of blackcurrant, plums, and cherries, complemented by hints of cedar, tobacco, and spices
wines.palate: Rich and velvety on the palate, showcasing flavors of dark fruits, chocolate, and subtle oak notes. Well-integrated tannins provide structure, leading to a long, elegant finish
wines.appearance: A deep, ruby red hue with garnet reflections

wines.name: Château Haut-Vigneau, Pessac-Leognan Rouge AOC
wines.description: Chteau Haut-Vigneau, Pessac-Leognan Rouge AOC is a distinguished red wine from the renowned Pessac-Lognan appellation in Bordeaux, showcasing the classic Bordeaux blend of Cabernet Sauvignon and Merlot.
wines.nose: Aromatic bouquet of blackcurrant, plum, and a hint of tobacco with undertones of oak and vanilla
wines.palate: Full-bodied and balanced on the palate with flavors of dark berries, cassis, and a touch of spice, leading to a long, complex finish with velvety tannins
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red color

wines.name: L’Âme de Pape Clément Rouge, Graves AOP by Bernard Magrez
wines.description: L’me de Pape Clment Rouge, Graves AOP by Bernard Magrez is a prestigious red wine that captures the essence of the Graves appellation with a harmonious blend of classic Bordeaux varietals.
wines.nose: A complex bouquet with dark berries, plum, and blackcurrant, mingling with hints of cedar, tobacco, and subtle earthy notes
wines.palate: Full-bodied and well-structured on the palate, with layers of black fruit, plum, and cassis complemented by fine-grained tannins and nuances of oak, spice, and minerality
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red with garnet highlights

wines.name: L’Âme de Pape Clément Blanc, Graves AOP by Bernard Magrez
wines.description: L’me de Pape Clment Blanc, Graves AOP by Bernard Magrez is an exceptional white wine hailing from the prestigious Graves appellation in Bordeaux blending the freshness of Sauvignon Blanc with the richness of Smillon.
wines.nose: Aromatic with notes of citrus zest white peaches and a hint of tropical fruits complemented by subtle vanilla and toast from oak aging
wines.palate: Full-bodied and well-rounded featuring vibrant flavors of grapefruit lemon and melon intertwined with creamy oak and a touch of minerality
wines.appearance: A luminous pale yellow with green reflections

wines.name: Château Soussans, Margaux AOC
wines.description: Chteau Soussans, Margaux AOC is a prestigious red wine from the Margaux appellation in Bordeaux known for its elegance and complexity.
wines.nose: Rich nose of blackcurrant, plum, and blackberry with undertones of cedar, tobacco, and a hint of violet
wines.palate: Full-bodied with polished tannins and flavors of ripe black fruits, cacao, and a touch of spice. The oak aging adds notes of vanilla and a subtle smokiness
wines.appearance: Deep ruby color with a garnet rim indicative of its aging potential

wines.name: Château Cap Léon Veyrin, Cru Bourgeois Supérieur, Listrac-Médoc AOC
wines.description: Chteau Cap Lon Veyrin Cru Bourgeois Listrac-Mdoc AOC 2016 is a distinguished red wine from the Moulis-en-Mdoc appellation in Bordeaux France renowned for its traditional blend and structure.
wines.nose: Intense aromas of blackcurrant plum and cherry layered with notes of cedar tobacco and a touch of earthy minerality
wines.palate: Full-bodied with firm tannins leading to flavors of dark fruits like blackberry and black cherry complemented by undertones of spice leather and a hint of oak
wines.appearance: Deep ruby color with hints of garnet at the rim

wines.name: Château Fontesteau, Cru Bourgeois, Haut Médoc AOC
wines.description: Chteau Fontesteau Cru Bourgeois Haut Mdoc AOC is a distinguished red wine from the Haut-Mdoc appellation that showcases the richness and complexity of Bordeaux blends.
wines.nose: A complex bouquet of blackcurrant, blackberry, and plum, complemented by notes of cedar, tobacco, and spices
wines.palate: Full-bodied with a firm structure, the palate reveals layers of dark berry fruits, subtle oak, and well-integrated tannins. Hints of vanilla and earthy notes add depth
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red with garnet highlights

wines.name: Château Sorbey Haut Médoc AOC
wines.description: Chteau Sorbey Haut Mdoc AOC is a classic Bordeaux red wine that highlights the rich terroir of the Haut Mdoc appellation, promising a refined and balanced tasting experience.
wines.nose: A complex bouquet of blackcurrant, plum, and black cherry, accented by notes of cedar, tobacco, and earthy undertones
wines.palate: Full-bodied and well-structured with refined tannins. Flavors of dark fruits like blackberry and cassis dominate, complemented by hints of oak, chocolate, and a touch of spice
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red color with a hint of purple at the rim

wines.name: Château La Verriere Bordeaux Supérieur Rouge AOC
wines.description: Chteau La Verriere Bordeaux Suprieur Rouge AOC is a distinguished red wine from the Bordeaux region known for its rich history and tradition of producing exceptional wines.
wines.nose: Inviting nose with layers of dark berries, plum, and cherries, complemented by hints of vanilla and spice
wines.palate: Full-bodied and well-structured, with flavors of blackcurrant, blackberry, and subtle oak notes. The wine has a velvety texture with balanced acidity and fine tannins
wines.appearance: A deep ruby red color

wines.name: Château Malbec, Bordeaux AOC
wines.description: Chteau Malbec Bordeaux AOC 2019 is a classic red Bordeaux blend that combines the structure of Cabernet Sauvignon with the lush fruitiness of Merlot and the spice of Malbec.
wines.nose: A complex nose of blackcurrant, cherry, and plum, intertwined with hints of cedar, tobacco, and a touch of spice
wines.palate: Medium to full-bodied on the palate with well-integrated tannins and flavors of dark berries, black cherry, and subtle oak. The finish is long with hints of mocha and spice
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red with a hint of purple at the rim

wines.name: Château Les Songes Bordeaux AOC by Bernard Magrez
wines.description: Chteau Les Songes Bordeaux AOC by Bernard Magrez is a refined red wine that exemplifies the elegance and complexity of Bordeaux wines.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose with layers of blackberry, cassis, and plum, complemented by hints of cedar, tobacco, and a touch of spice
wines.palate: Medium-bodied on the palate, with flavors of blackcurrant, cherry, and a hint of dark chocolate. The wine’s tannins are well-integrated, adding to its complexity and structure
wines.appearance: A deep ruby color with garnet reflections

wines.name: Château du Tastet Cuvée Laroque Bordeaux AOP
wines.description: Chteau du Tastet Cuve Laroque Bordeaux AOP 2021 is a classic Bordeaux wine that showcases the elegance and complexity of this renowned wine region.
wines.nose: An aromatic nose with notes of red and black fruits like cherry, blackberry, and plum, complemented by nuances of cedar, tobacco, and a hint of spice
wines.palate: Medium-bodied with well-integrated tannins, it offers flavors of ripe berries, blackcurrant, and a touch of earthiness. The finish is smooth with hints of oak and a subtle minerality
wines.appearance: A deep ruby red color that hints at the wine’s richness and depth

wines.name: Comte de Gironde Bordeaux Supérieur AOC
wines.description: Comte de Gironde Bordeaux Suprieur AOC is a classic red wine from the Bordeaux region known for its rich blend and superior quality.
wines.nose: Expressive nose with layers of blackcurrant, blackberry, and plum, complemented by hints of vanilla, cedar, and tobacco from oak aging
wines.palate: Full-bodied with well-structured tannins and a balanced acidity. Flavors of dark berries, black cherries, and spices with a long, smooth finish
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red color

wines.name: Château Thomas Laurent Bordeaux AOC
wines.description: Chteau Thomas Laurent Bordeaux AOC is a classic red wine from the Bordeaux region, offering a harmonious blend of varietals and traditional winemaking techniques.
wines.nose: Aromas of dark berries, blackcurrant, and plum, complemented by notes of tobacco, leather, and a hint of oak
wines.palate: Full-bodied with rich flavors of blackcurrant, blackberry, and plum. The palate is well-structured with firm tannins and a long, oaky finish
wines.appearance: A deep ruby red color with garnet highlights

wines.name: Château des Arnauds Bordeaux AOC (100% Merlot)
wines.description: Chteau des Arnauds Bordeaux AOC is a classic Bordeaux wine that embodies the rich heritage and sophisticated blend for which the region is known.
wines.nose: Aromatic bouquet with dark berries, black currant, and hints of spice and cedar
wines.palate: Full-bodied on the palate with flavors of ripe blackberry, plum, and an undertone of earthy minerals, complemented by silky tannins and a long, smooth finish
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red color with brilliant clarity

wines.name: Le Petit Leon Bordeaux AOC
wines.description: Le Petit Leon Bordeaux AOC is a refined red wine that embodies the elegance and complexity typical of the Bordeaux region.
wines.nose: A complex bouquet of blackberries, cherries, and plums, intertwined with earthy notes of cedar, tobacco, and a touch of leather
wines.palate: Medium-bodied on the palate, featuring a harmonious balance of dark fruit flavors, firm tannins, and subtle oak influences. Notes of blackcurrant, raspberry, and a hint of vanilla provide a smooth and lingering finish
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red color with a hint of garnet on the rim

wines.name: #Different Sauvignon Blanc in amphora Bordeaux AOC
wines.description: #Different Sauvignon Blanc in amphora Bordeaux AOC 2022 is an expressive white wine that offers a refreshing and unique take on traditional Sauvignon Blanc with the added complexity of amphora aging.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose featuring layers of citrus fruits, green apple, and white flowers, accompanied by subtle hints of stone minerals and slight herbaceous notes from the amphora aging
wines.palate: Off-dry and bright on the palate, showcasing flavors of lime, grapefruit, and green melon. Amphora aging brings depth with nuanced earthiness and a lingering mineral finish
wines.appearance: A pale straw-yellow color with greenish tinges

wines.name: Ambre de Maltus Bordeaux Blanc AOC
wines.description: Ambre de Maltus Bordeaux Blanc AOC is a fresh and elegant white wine that showcases the classic Bordeaux Blanc blend with a modern twist.
wines.nose: Aromas of citrus fruits, white flowers, and green apple, with subtle notes of minerals and fresh herbs
wines.palate: Light-bodied on the palate, with crisp acidity and flavors of lemon, grapefruit, and a hint of gooseberry. The finish is clean and refreshing with a touch of minerality
wines.appearance: A pale straw-yellow color with greenish highlights

wines.name: Le Blanc de Château des Landes Bordeaux Blanc
wines.description: Le Blanc de Chteau des Landes Bordeaux Blanc 2022 is a fresh and vibrant white wine that perfectly captures the essence of Bordeaux Blanc with a focus on balance and aromatic complexity.
wines.nose: A fragrant nose with notes of citrus fruits, green apple, and a hint of florality, complemented by subtle grassy undertones
wines.palate: Light-bodied and crisp on the palate, with flavors of lemon, lime, and grapefruit, followed by a refreshing acidity and a clean, mineral finish
wines.appearance: A pale straw yellow with greenish highlights

wines.name: Château La Verriere Bordeaux Sauvignon Blanc AOC
wines.description: Chteau La Verriere Bordeaux Sauvignon Blanc AOC 2022 is a refreshing white wine that epitomizes the vibrant and zesty nature of Sauvignon Blanc from the Bordeaux region.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose with notes of citrus fruits like lemon and grapefruit complemented by hints of green apple, gooseberry, and a touch of fresh herbs
wines.palate: Crisp and light-bodied on the palate with flavors of citrus, green apple, and a slight minerality. The bright acidity provides a clean and refreshing finish
wines.appearance: A pale straw color with greenish tints

wines.name: Blason de Bourgogne Saint-Véran AOC
wines.description: Blason de Bourgogne Saint-Vran AOC is a refined white wine that embodies the quintessential characteristics of the Chardonnay grape hailing from the Saint-Vran appellation in the Burgundy region of France.
wines.nose: Fresh and aromatic nose with notes of green apple, citrus, and white flowers, complemented by subtle hints of butter and vanilla from oak aging
wines.palate: Medium-bodied and well-balanced on the palate, with flavors of apple, pear, and citrus fruits. The oak influence adds complexity with nuances of toast and a creamy texture
wines.appearance: A bright, pale gold color with greenish tints

wines.name: Domaine Steinmaier Givry 1er Cru Rouge
wines.description: Domaine Steinmaier Givry 1er Cru Rouge 2019 is a sophisticated red wine from the Burgundy region, recognized for its elegance and aromatic profile.
wines.nose: Intense aromas of red berries such as cherry and raspberry, alongside floral notes of rosée and violet, with hints of earth and spice
wines.palate: Medium-bodied with well-balanced acidity and silky tannins. Flavors of red fruits, particularly strawberries and cranberries, are complemented by nuances of mushroom, forest floor, and a touch of spice
wines.appearance: A bright ruby-red color with subtle garnet hues

wines.name: La Burgondie Mercurey Rouge
wines.description: La Burgondie Mercurey Rouge is an elegant red wine from Burgundy, France, known for its complex and refined character.
wines.nose: Aromas of ripe cherries, blackberries, and subtle floral notes with hints of earthiness and spice
wines.palate: Full-bodied and well-balanced with flavors of red and black fruit, gentle tannins, and a smooth finish. Notes of vanilla and oak add complexity
wines.appearance: Vivid ruby red color

wines.name: La Burgondie Bourgogne Côte Chalonnaise Pinot Noir COMING SOON
wines.description: La Burgondie Bourgogne Cte Chalonnaise Pinot Noir is an elegant red wine that showcases the classic charm and finesse typical of a Cte Chalonnaise Pinot Noir.
wines.nose: Delicate nose with aromas of red berries such as cherry and raspberry combined with subtle earthy and spicy notes
wines.palate: Light-bodied on the palate with flavors of fresh red fruits like strawberry and cranberry complemented by hints of spice and a touch of minerality. The wine has a silky texture and fine tannins
wines.appearance: A translucent ruby red color

wines.name: La Burgondie Bourgogne Côte Chalonnaise Chardonnay
wines.description: La Burgondie Bourgogne Cte Chalonnaise Chardonnay is an elegant white wine that shines with classic Chardonnay characteristics from the Burgundy region.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose with hints of green apple, citrus zest, and white flowers, accompanied by subtle notes of toasted almond and minerality
wines.palate: Light-bodied and crisp on the palate, with flavors of lemon, green apple, and a touch of mineral freshness. The wine has a well-balanced acidity that adds to its refreshing finish
wines.appearance: A bright, pale yellow color

wines.name: Patriarche Endless Summer Pinot Noir
wines.description: Patriarche Endless Summer Pinot Noir is a vibrant red wine known for its light and refreshing profile, making it an ideal choice for warm weather and leisurely occasions.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose featuring red berries, cherries, and subtle floral notes with hints of earth and spice
wines.palate: Light-bodied and crisp on the palate, with flavors of fresh strawberries, raspberries, and a touch of cranberry. Balanced acidity and soft tannins lead to a smooth finish
wines.appearance: Light ruby red color with a bright clarity

wines.name: Château de la Chaize Morgon
wines.description: Chteau de la Chaize Morgon 2022 is a captivating red wine from the Beaujolais region known for its light-bodied nature and bright fruit flavors.
wines.nose: Enticing aromas of red berries, particularly cherry and raspberry, with subtle floral notes and a touch of earthiness
wines.palate: On the palate, it is light-bodied with flavors of fresh red fruit, such as strawberry and red currant, complemented by a lively acidity and soft tannins. The finish is smooth with a slight mineral edge
wines.appearance: A radiant ruby-red color with hints of purple at the rim

wines.name: Château de la Chaize Brouilly
wines.description: Chteau de la Chaize Brouilly is an elegant red wine that captures the essence of the Gamay grape from the Brouilly appellation in Beaujolais. It is known for its vibrant fruit flavors and refreshing acidity.
wines.nose: Aromas of red cherry, raspberry, and strawberry with subtle floral notes of violet
wines.palate: Light-bodied and fresh on the palate, with flavors of juicy red berries, a touch of spice, and a hint of minerality. The wine has a crisp acidity that makes it highly drinkable
wines.appearance: Bright ruby red color

wines.name: Trenel Fleurie Cru du Beaujolais COMING SOON
wines.description: Trenel Fleurie Cru du Beaujolais is an expressive red wine that exemplifies the charm and finesse of the Fleurie appellation in the Beaujolais region.
wines.nose: Fresh and aromatic with notes of red berries, particularly raspberry and cherry, alongside floral hints of violet and a slight peppery nuance
wines.palate: Light-bodied and smooth on the palate, featuring flavors of juicy red fruits, subtle spice, and a touch of minerality. The wine has a refreshing acidity and soft tannins, making it very approachable
wines.appearance: A vibrant ruby red color with purple hues

wines.name: Trenel L’Esprit de Marius Sangouard Juliénas Cru du Beaujolais
wines.description: Trenel L’Esprit de Marius Sangouard Julinas Cru du Beaujolais is a captivating red wine that brings out the spirit and tradition of the Beaujolais appellation.
wines.nose: Expressive nose with aromas of red berries, cherries, and a hint of floral notes combined with subtle spices
wines.palate: Medium-bodied with a balanced structure, showcasing flavors of ripe red fruits, cloves, and a touch of earthiness. Smooth tannins and a long, elegant finish
wines.appearance: A vibrant ruby-red color

wines.name: Trenel Cuvée Rochebonne Beaujolais
wines.description: Trenel Cuve Rochebonne Beaujolais is a delightful red wine that epitomizes the fresh and vibrant character of the Beaujolais region.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose with notes of red berries, cherries, and violets along with a hint of spice
wines.palate: Light-bodied and fresh on the palate with flavors of strawberry, raspberry, and mild tannins providing a smooth finish
wines.appearance: A brilliant ruby red color

wines.name: Château de Maligny Chablis 1er Cru “Montmains”
wines.description: Chteau de Maligny Chablis 1er Cru “Montmains” 2022 is an elegant white wine hailing from one of the most respected Premier Cru vineyards in Chablis, known for producing refined and mineral-driven wines.
wines.nose: Fresh and aromatic nose featuring notes of green apple, lemon zest, and white flowers, with an underlying minerality
wines.palate: Light-bodied and crisp on the palate, with flavors of green apple, citrus, and wet stone. The wine’s acidity is well-balanced, providing a fresh and vibrant finish
wines.appearance: A pale straw-yellow color with greenish tints

wines.name: Château de Maligny Chablis 1er Cru “Fourchaume”
wines.description: Chteau de Maligny Chablis 1er Cru “Fourchaume” 2022 is a distinguished white wine from the renowned Chablis region in Burgundy offering a vivid expression of its terroir and premium viticulture.
wines.nose: The nose is vibrant with citrus fruits green apple and a hint of minerality complemented by subtle notes of white flowers and toasted almonds
wines.palate: Crisp and fresh on the palate with flavors of lemon lime and green apple intertwined with a pronounced flinty minerality. The oak aging adds nuances of vanilla and a delicate creaminess without overwhelming the wine’s natural acidity
wines.appearance: A pale straw yellow color with greenish reflections

wines.name: Château de Maligny Chablis Marche du Roi
wines.description: Chteau de Maligny Chablis Marche du Roi 2022 is a refined white wine from the Chablis region of France, characterized by its fresh minerality and crisp acidity.
wines.nose: Fresh and aromatic with notes of green apple, citrus, and wet stone
wines.palate: Light-bodied and crisp on the palate, featuring flavors of lemon, green apple, and a hint of salinity. The wines minerality adds an extra layer of complexity
wines.appearance: Pale yellow with green reflections

wines.name: Château de Maligny Petit Chablis
wines.description: Chteau de Maligny Petit Chablis 2022 is a crisp and refreshing white wine that exemplifies the classic characteristics of Petit Chablis wines produced in the Chablis region of France.
wines.nose: Lively nose with aromas of green apple citrus zest and subtle floral notes complemented by a hint of wet stone minerality
wines.palate: Light to medium-bodied with a crisp and refreshing palate. Flavors of lemon green apple and a touch of saline minerality are prominent giving way to a clean and vibrant finish
wines.appearance: Pale straw yellow with greenish hues

wines.name: Domaine Daniel Dampt & Fils Chablis Premier Cru Les Lys
wines.description: Domaine Daniel Dampt & Fils Chablis Premier Cru Les Lys is a classic representation of Chablis that showcases the elegance and minerality of Chardonnay from this esteemed French region.
wines.nose: Fresh and inviting with notes of green apple lemon zest and a subtle minerality
wines.palate: Light-bodied and crisp with flavors of citrus green apple and wet stone. The wine displays a vibrant acidity balanced by a smooth mineral finish
wines.appearance: Pale lemon-yellow with a hint of green

wines.name: Domaine Daniel Dampt & Fils Chablis AOC
wines.description: Domaine Daniel Dampt & Fils Chablis AOC exemplifies classic Chablis with its crisp and minerally characteristics, grown in the renowned Burgundy region of France.
wines.nose: Elegant and subtle nose with hints of green apple, citrus, and flinty minerality typical of Chablis
wines.palate: Light-bodied with a refreshing acidity, flavors of green apple, lemon, and a touch of oyster shell, finishing with a clean minerality
wines.appearance: A pale, straw-yellow color with greenish reflections

wines.name: Louis Robin Chablis AOC
wines.description: Louis Robin Chablis AOC 2022 is a refined white wine that epitomizes the elegance and minerality characteristic of the Chablis region, made from 100% Chardonnay grapes.
wines.nose: Fresh and vibrant nose with aromas of green apple, citrus, and white flowers. Subtle notes of flint and wet stone add to its complexity
wines.palate: Crisp and clean on the palate, with flavors of lemon, green apple, and pear. The pronounced minerality and bracing acidity provide balance and a long-lasting finish
wines.appearance: Pale straw yellow with hints of green

wines.name: Pfaff Tradition Pinot Noir Alsace AOC
wines.description: Pfaff Tradition Pinot Noir Alsace AOC 2019 is an exquisite red wine that exemplifies the elegance and finesse of Pinot Noir from the Alsace region.
wines.nose: Delicate and expressive nose with red fruit aromas like cherry and raspberry, complemented by subtle earthy notes and a hint of spice
wines.palate: Light-bodied and smooth on the palate with flavors of fresh red berries, delicate tannins, and well-balanced acidity. The finish is refreshing with a touch of minerality
wines.appearance: A clear, bright ruby red color

wines.name: Pfaff Tradition Gewürztraminer Alsace AOC (off-dry)
wines.description: Pfaff Tradition Gewrztraminer Alsace AOC (off-dry) captures the essence of Alsace with its off-dry yet fragrant profile, making it an iconic representation of this varietal.
wines.nose: Intense and aromatic nose with notes of lychee, rosée petals, and exotic spices, reflecting the typical profile of Gewrztraminer
wines.palate: Medium-bodied with a luscious, slightly off-dry palate. Flavors of tropical fruits, lychee, and a hint of sweetness are beautifully balanced by a refreshing acidity
wines.appearance: A brilliant golden yellow hue

wines.name: Pfaff Tradition Riesling Alsace AOC
wines.description: Pfaff Tradition Riesling Alsace AOC 2021 is a classic Alsace Riesling that showcases the region’s ability to produce vibrant and expressive wines.
wines.nose: Intensely aromatic with notes of citrus fruits, green apple, and floral hints of honeysuckle and jasmine
wines.palate: Off-dry and well-balanced with crisp acidity. Flavors of ripe lemon, peach, and apricot are complemented by a touch of minerality and a lingering finish
wines.appearance: A clear, pale yellow color with greenish reflections

wines.name: Pfaff Tradition Pinot Gris Alsace AOC (off-dry)
wines.description: Pfaff Tradition Pinot Gris Alsace AOC (off-dry) from the 2021 vintage is a lovely expression of the Alsace terroir offering a harmonious balance of fruitiness and minerality.
wines.nose: Fragrant bouquet of white peach, golden apple, and subtle floral notes with underlying hints of honey and spice
wines.palate: Medium-bodied with a smooth texture. Flavors of ripe pear, quince, and apricot are complemented by a gentle touch of sweetness and a crisp mineral finish
wines.appearance: Pale gold with a slight silvery sheen

wines.name: Domaine de la Chézatte Sancerre Rouge
wines.description: Domaine de la Chzatte Sancerre Rouge is a refreshing light-bodied red wine made from Pinot Noir grapes grown in the renowned Sancerre region of France.
wines.nose: Aromas of red berries like cherry and raspberry with hints of floral notes and a subtle earthiness
wines.palate: Light-bodied on the palate with fresh acidity and flavors of red fruit such as strawberry and cranberry balanced by a touch of minerality and soft tannins
wines.appearance: A bright ruby-red color with a translucent edge

wines.name: Domaine de la Chézatte Sancerre Rosé
wines.description: Domaine de la Chzatte Sancerre Rosé 2022 is a refreshing and elegant wine that highlights the finesse and aromatic character of Pinot Noir in a rosé style.
wines.nose: Fresh and fragrant nose with enticing aromas of red berries, citrus zest, and floral notes, complemented by a subtle mineral undertone
wines.palate: Light-bodied and crisp on the palate, with flavors of strawberry, raspberry, and grapefruit, balanced by lively acidity and a hint of minerality
wines.appearance: A vibrant, pale salmon pink color

wines.name: Domaine de la Chézatte Sancerre Blanc
wines.description: Domaine de la Chzatte Sancerre Blanc 2022 is a quintessential expression of Sauvignon Blanc from the famed Sancerre region, offering vibrant acidity and mineral undertones.
wines.nose: Bright citrus notes of lemon and grapefruit, complemented by hints of green apple, fresh grass, and subtle floral undertones
wines.palate: Crisp and zesty on the palate, featuring flavors of lime, green apple, and flinty minerals. A well-balanced acidity adds an invigorating finish
wines.appearance: Pale straw color with greenish hues

wines.name: Michel Thomas & Fils Lachaume Sancerre
wines.description: Michel Thomas & Fils Lachaume Sancerre 2022 is a refined and elegant white wine that epitomizes the characteristics of Sauvignon Blanc from the Sancerre region in the Loire Valley.
wines.nose: A fragrant nose with inviting aromas of citrus fruits, green apple, and fresh-cut grass, complemented by subtle mineral notes
wines.palate: Crisp and refreshing on the palate, with flavors of lime, grapefruit, and green apple. The vibrant acidity is balanced by a touch of minerality, offering a clean and zesty finish
wines.appearance: A clear and pale straw color with a slight greenish hue

wines.name: Jean Pabiot “Cuvée Séduction” Pouilly-Fumé
wines.description: Jean Pabiot “Cuve Sduction” Pouilly-Fum is an elegant white wine that showcases the classic characteristics of Sauvignon Blanc from the Pouilly-Fum appellation in the Loire Valley.
wines.nose: A fragrant nose with aromas of citrus fruits, green apple, and hints of flint and minerality
wines.palate: Light-bodied and vibrant on the palate, with flavors of lemon, lime, grapefruit, and a subtle smokiness. The mineral finish adds complexity and refreshment
wines.appearance: A pale straw yellow color with greenish hues

wines.name: Jean Pabiot “Domaine des Fines Caillottes” Pouilly-Fumé
wines.description: Jean Pabiot “Domaine des Fines Caillottes” Pouilly-Fum is an elegant white wine that exemplifies the classic characteristics of Pouilly-Fum appellation in the Loire Valley, known for its expressive Sauvignon Blanc wines.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose with bright citrus, green apple, and flinty minerality, complemented by delicate herbal notes
wines.palate: Medium-bodied with a crisp, vibrant palate. Flavors of grapefruit, lime, and green apple are enhanced by a steely minerality and a refreshing acidity
wines.appearance: A pale straw yellow color with greenish highlights

wines.name: Alain Pabiot “Les Chantebines” Pouilly-Fumé
wines.description: Alain Pabiot “Les Chantebines” Pouilly-Fum 2021 is a crisp and mineral-driven white wine crafted in the renowned Pouilly-Fum appellation, showcasing the exemplary expression of Sauvignon Blanc.
wines.nose: Intense and complex nose with aromas of citrus fruits, green apple, and a hint of flintiness typical of the terroir
wines.palate: Light-bodied and refreshing on the palate, with vibrant acidity and flavors of lemon zest, tart green apple, and subtle mineral undertones
wines.appearance: Pale straw yellow with greenish reflections

wines.name: Nicolas Gaudry Pouilly-Fumé
wines.description: Nicolas Gaudry Pouilly-Fum offers a classic expression of Sauvignon Blanc from the Loire Valley, known for its distinctive minerality and vibrant acidity.
wines.nose: Intense aromas of citrus fruits, like grapefruit and lemon, with nuances of green apple, mineral notes, and a hint of floral and fresh herbs
wines.palate: Crisp and refreshing on the palate, showcasing flavors of lime, green apple, and flint. The wine’s acidity is well-balanced with a clean, mineral finish
wines.appearance: Pale straw color with greenish highlights

wines.name: Olga Raffault Les Barnabes Chinon
wines.description: Olga Raffault Les Barnabes Chinon is a well-crafted red wine that showcases the elegance and complexity of the Cabernet Franc varietal from the Chinon appellation in the Loire Valley.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose featuring red berries, herbs, and hints of floral undertones
wines.palate: Medium-bodied with supple tannins, delivering flavors of cherry, raspberry, and earthy notes. A balanced acidity adds freshness to the palate
wines.appearance: A vibrant ruby red color

wines.name: Domaine de Beaulieu Tradition Chinon
wines.description: Domaine de Beaulieu Tradition Chinon is a refined red wine that showcases the purity and elegance of Cabernet Franc from the Chinon region.
wines.nose: Aromas of red berries, blackcurrant, and cherry, with hints of bell pepper, herbs, and earthy nuances
wines.palate: Medium-bodied on the palate, with flavors of red fruits, subtle spice, and a touch of minerality. Smooth tannins and balanced acidity provide a long, elegant finish
wines.appearance: A vibrant ruby red color with a light purple hue

wines.name: La Muse Merlot Val de Loire IGP
wines.description: La Muse Merlot Val de Loire IGP is a charming red wine that highlights the elegance and approachability of Merlot from the Loire Valley in France.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose with layers of red berries cherries and subtle spice notes
wines.palate: Medium-bodied on the palate with flavors of ripe raspberries black cherries and hints of licorice. The wine’s tannins are soft and well-integrated with a smooth finish
wines.appearance: A vibrant ruby red color

wines.name: La Muse Muscadet Sèvre et Maine Sur Lie
wines.description: La Muse Muscadet Sèvre et Maine Sur Lie is an exceptional white wine crafted by Vignoble Huteau-Boulanger, embodying the essence of the Loire Valley. This distinctive Muscadet is celebrated for its lean, mineral, and saline-driven profile, a hallmark of the Melon de Bourgogne grape and its unique terroir. Aged “sur…
wines.nose: An intense nose reveals white fruits, complemented by light notes of citrus fruits and grapefruit. Delicate hints of green apple, pear, and a touch of minerality also emerge
wines.palate: The palate is rich and full-bodied, retaining a vibrant freshness and fruitiness. It offers a crisp acidity, a light body, and pronounced mineral-like characteristics, often with saline and iodine notes, leading to a refreshing finish

wines.name: Pierre Chainier Pinot Noir
wines.description: Pierre Chainier Pinot Noir is a delicate and elegant red wine that embodies the quintessential characteristics of the Pinot Noir grape, offering a refined and versatile experience. This fruity, juicy, and approachable Pinot Noir showcases a light to medium body, effortlessly balancing brightness with a touch of…

wines.palate: Light-bodied and smooth on the palate, with flavors of fresh red berries complemented by undertones of forest floor and a touch of minerality. It bursts with crunchy, juicy berry fruit flavors, is well-balanced with a grippy, fresh finish…

wines.name: Pierre Chainier Rosé d’Anjou
wines.description: Pierre Chainier Rosé d’Anjou is a delightful rosé wine that epitomizes the freshness and vibrancy of the Anjou region of France.

wines.appearance: A brilliant straw-yellow color with fine bubbles

wines.description: Champagne Paul Dangin & Fils Cuvée Carte Blanche Brut is an elegant and refined expression of 100% Chardonnay from the heart of the Côte des Bar, crafted by a family with a rich tradition dating back to 1947. This Champagne embodies a perfect balance between intensity and finesse, showcasing the unique mineral-rich…

wines.nose: An aromatic nose with notes of fresh strawberries, raspberries, and a hint of citrus, complemented by subtle floral nuances. It is slightly fruity, revealing cherry, raspberry, and redcurrant, developing into more pronounced strawberry…
wines.palate: Light and crisp on the palate, with flavors of red berries, fresh apples, and a touch of brioche. The attack is fresh, leading to a beautiful ampleness, creaminess, and a fruity profile, culminating in a long, clean, and refreshing finish…

wines.name: Richebel Sparkling Brut Rosé LIMITED STOCK

wines.nose: Very clean, expressive, and intense, with prominent notes of white fruits such as pear and peach, bright citrus aromas, fresh herbs, cucumber, and delicate floral hints. Underlying nuances of lemon zest, limes, tropical fruit, and wet…

wines.appearance: Pale yellow with green edges

wines.palate: Rich and full-bodied on the palate, featuring layers of dark fruits like black currant and plum, complemented by hints of dark chocolate, coffee, and a touch of vanilla from oak aging. Firm tannins provide structure and a long, satisfying…
