wines.name: Miles From Nowhere Sauvignon Blanc Semillon
wines.description: Miles From Nowhere Sauvignon Blanc Semillon is a refreshing white wine that beautifully blends the crispness of Sauvignon Blanc with the richness of Semillon.
wines.nose: Fresh and aromatic with notes of citrus, green apple, and a touch of tropical fruits complemented by hints of grass and herbs
wines.palate: Light-bodied and zesty on the palate with flavors of grapefruit, lime, and green apple. The Semillon adds a layer of texture and richness, creating a harmonious balance
wines.appearance: Pale straw with green hues

wines.name: Miles From Nowhere Best Blocks Chardonnay
wines.description: Miles From Nowhere Best Blocks Chardonnay is a profound expression of the Chardonnay varietal, showcasing the unique qualities imparted by its terroir and winemaking techniques.
wines.nose: A pronounced bouquet of citrus fruits, green apple, and tropical notes, with subtle hints of vanilla and oak from barrel aging
wines.palate: Full-bodied with a creamy texture, featuring flavors of ripe pear, lemon zest, and a touch of minerality. The oak aging lends complexity with nuances of toasted almonds and a buttery finish
wines.appearance: A vibrant straw-yellow color with a hint of green nuance

wines.name: Miles From Nowhere Chardonnay
wines.description: Miles From Nowhere Chardonnay is a sophisticated white wine known for its balanced and expressive character, which is typical of well-crafted Chardonnays from premium vineyards.
wines.nose: Enticing aromas of citrus fruits, green apples, and white peaches, complemented by subtle hints of vanilla, butter, and toasted oak
wines.palate: Medium-bodied and well-rounded, featuring flavors of ripe stone fruits, citrus, and a touch of creaminess from the oak aging. A lively acidity balances the richness on the palate
wines.appearance: Pale straw yellow with a slight golden hue

wines.name: Tournon Mathilda Chapoutier Shiraz Victoria
wines.description: Tournon Mathilda Chapoutier Shiraz Victoria 2020 is a rich and expressive red wine hailing from the Victoria region of Australia, offering a vivid representation of the Shiraz grape.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose with layers of dark fruits like blackberry and plum, complemented by notes of pepper, spice, and a hint of smokiness
wines.palate: Full-bodied with a generous structure. Rich flavors of blackberries and pepper dominate the palate, with subtle undertones of dark chocolate and earthiness adding complexity
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red color

wines.name: Tournon Mathilda Chapoutier Viognier Marsanne Victoria
wines.description: Tournon Mathilda Chapoutier Viognier Marsanne Victoria 2021 is a captivating blend of Viognier and Marsanne that showcases the unique terroir of Victoria, Australia.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose featuring floral notes of honeysuckle and acacia, combined with hints of apricot, peach, and citrus zest
wines.palate: Full-bodied on the palate, with flavors of ripe stone fruits, citrus, and a touch of almond. The finish is long and refreshing with a hint of minerality
wines.appearance: A pale straw yellow color with subtle green hues

wines.name: Cranswick Lakefield Pink Moscato
wines.description: Cranswick Lakefield Pink Moscato is a refreshing rosé wine that offers a delightful combination of sweetness and effervescence.
wines.nose: Aromas of fresh strawberries, rosée petals, and a hint of citrus
wines.palate: Light-bodied and spritzy on the palate, with flavors of red berries, peaches, and a touch of honey. The finish is crisp and refreshing, balancing the sweetness with a subtle acidity
wines.appearance: A vibrant pink color with a fine bead of bubbles

wines.name: Cranswick Lakefield Moscato
wines.description: 1924 Scotch Barrel Aged Chardonnay is an intriguing white wine that offers a unique twist on traditional Chardonnay by incorporating the rich influence of Scotch whisky barrel aging.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose with layers of ripe apple, pear, and tropical fruits, intertwined with hints of vanilla, caramel, and a touch of smokiness from the Scotch barrels
wines.palate: Full-bodied and creamy on the palate, with flavors of baked apple, pineapple, and butterscotch. The influence of the Scotch barrels adds complexity with notes of toasted oak, spice, and a subtle hint of peat
wines.appearance: A brilliant golden yellow color

wines.name: Cranswick Estate Cabernet Sauvignon
wines.description: Cranswick Estate Cabernet Sauvignon embodies the rich, full-bodied characteristics expected of a classic Cabernet Sauvignon, offering an enjoyable expression of this varietal.
wines.nose: Aromas of dark berries, blackcurrant, and a hint of spice, with subtle notes of oak and vanilla
wines.palate: Full-bodied with flavors of ripe black fruits such as blackberry and plum, complemented by hints of chocolate, tobacco, and a touch of oak. Smooth tannins provide a balanced finish
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red color
wines.pairing: Cheese, Pork, Red Meat, Spicy Food

wines.name: Cranswick Estate Shiraz
wines.description: Cranswick Estate Shiraz 2021 is a vibrant red wine known for its robust character and rich fruit flavors, making it a standout choice among Shiraz enthusiasts.
wines.nose: Aromas of ripe blackberry, plum, and black cherry, accented by notes of pepper, tobacco, and a hint of vanilla from oak aging
wines.palate: Full-bodied and smooth, with layers of juicy dark fruit flavors, complemented by spicy pepper, subtle oak, and a touch of dark chocolate on the finish
wines.appearance: Deep garnet red with purple hues

wines.name: Cranswick Estate Chardonnay
wines.description: Cranswick Estate Chardonnay 2022 is a classic expression of Chardonnay with an Australian twist, offering freshness and balance with a subtle touch of oak.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose featuring citrus fruits like lemon and grapefruit, complemented by notes of green apple and subtle hints of vanilla and oak
wines.palate: Medium-bodied and crisp on the palate, with flavors of citrus, apple, and a light touch of oak adding depth and complexity. A balanced acidity keeps the wine refreshing and vibrant
wines.appearance: A pale straw color with hints of green

wines.name: Cranswick Lakefield Shiraz
wines.description: Cranswick Lakefield Shiraz 2022 is a robust red wine known for its rich and intense flavor profile, typical of Australian Shiraz.
wines.nose: Aromas of ripe blackberries, plums, and cherries with hints of black pepper, spice, and a touch of oak
wines.palate: Full-bodied with rich flavors of dark fruits, black pepper, and subtle oak, complemented by well-integrated tannins and a lingering finish
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red color indicative of its concentration and depth

wines.name: Cranswick Lakefield Chardonnay
wines.description: Cranswick Lakefield Chardonnay is a vibrant white wine that encapsulates the essence of the Chardonnay grape with an added complexity from subtle oak aging. Expertly crafted to reflect the very best of Australia’s winemaking heritage, this wine offers a delightful combination of fresh fruit flavors and refined oak…
wines.nose: Very fresh tropical and stone fruit notes are detected on the nose. It also presents fresh green apple and lemon rind aromas, mingled with subtle notes of oak and vanilla
wines.palate: Melon and gooseberry flavours bring freshness to the palate with a zesty acidity towards a medium, refreshing finish. Expect ripe peach and melon flavours, a richly textured creaminess, and well-balanced notes of ripe apple and citrus…
wines.appearance: White with a ripe lemon hue colour

wines.name: The Hedonist Cabernet Sauvignon
wines.description: The Hedonist Cabernet Sauvignon 2021 is a robust red wine that exudes classic Cabernet Sauvignon characteristics with a modern twist.
wines.nose: A complex nose featuring aromas of blackcurrant, dark cherry, and vanilla, complemented by subtle notes of cedar and tobacco
wines.palate: Full-bodied with a rich palate, offering flavors of ripe blackberry, black cherry, and dark chocolate. Tannins are firm yet seamlessly integrated, leading to a long and satisfying finish
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red with hints of purple

wines.name: Schild Estate Barossa Valley Moorooroo Shiraz
wines.description: Schild Estate Valley Moorooroo Shiraz is a quintessential representation of Barossa Valley Shiraz rich in flavor and depth with a bold character.
wines.nose: A nose dominated by dark berry fruits such as blackberry and blackcurrant with subtle hints of pepper, chocolate, and vanilla
wines.palate: Full-bodied and rich on the palate with flavors of ripe blackberries, plum, and dark chocolate. There are beautiful nuances of vanilla and spicy oak adding to the complexity
wines.appearance: A deep, inky purple color with a crimson hue

wines.name: Schild Estate Narrow Road Shiraz Cabernet Sauvignon
wines.description: Schild Estate Narrow Road Vineyard Shiraz Cabernet Sauvignon is a distinguished red wine that showcases the harmonious blend of Shiraz and Cabernet Sauvignon from the renowned Narrow Road Vineyard.
wines.nose: Intense bouquet of dark berries, plum, and cassis interwoven with hints of spice, chocolate, and smoky oak
wines.palate: Full-bodied with a rich and layered palate, featuring flavors of ripe blackberry, blackcurrant, and dark cherry, complemented by notes of mocha, pepper, and toasty oak. The tannins are firm yet refined, providing a long and elegant finish
wines.appearance: Deep ruby color with violet hues

wines.name: Schild Estate Prämie Shiraz
wines.description: Schild Estate Prmie Shiraz is a bold and powerful red wine that showcases the depth and richness of the Shiraz varietal from the Barossa Valley.
wines.nose: Rich and complex nose with aromas of dark berries, plum, and a touch of spice complemented by hints of oak and vanilla
wines.palate: Full-bodied and robust on the palate, with flavors of blackberry, cherry, and dark chocolate. The wine exhibits a well-structured tannin profile, with layers of spice and subtle smokiness adding depth
wines.appearance: A deep, inky purple color

wines.name: Schild Estate Barossa Shiraz
wines.description: Schild Estate Barossa Shiraz is a rich and robust red wine that showcases the bold and expressive characteristics of Shiraz from the Barossa Valley.
wines.nose: An inviting bouquet of ripe blackberry, plum, and dark cherry, intertwined with hints of pepper, spice, and a touch of oak
wines.palate: Full-bodied and powerful on the palate, with rich flavors of dark berries, plum, and blackcurrant complemented by notes of black pepper, licorice, and a subtle smokiness
wines.appearance: A deep, dark ruby red color with a vibrant hue

wines.name: Schild Estate Barossa Chardonnay
wines.description: Schild Estate Chardonnay 2022 is a well-balanced white wine that showcases the classic characteristics of Chardonnay, enhanced with subtle oak influences for added complexity.
wines.nose: Fresh and fragrant nose with notes of green apple, pear, and citrus zest, complemented by hints of vanilla and toasted almond from oak aging
wines.palate: Medium-bodied with a smooth texture, flavors of ripe apple, melon, and a touch of citrus, balanced by nuances of creamy vanilla and subtle oak
wines.appearance: A clear, pale straw color with a slight greenish hue

wines.name: Di Giorgio Coonawarra Shiraz
wines.description: Di Giorgio Coonawarra Shiraz offers a full-bodied expression of Shiraz with a delightful balance of fruit and spice.
wines.nose: A fragrant nose featuring blackberry, plum, and cherry, lifted by hints of pepper, spice, and oak
wines.palate: The palate is robust, showcasing ripe black fruits, subtle spice, and a touch of vanilla. Well-integrated tannins provide a smooth, lingering finish
wines.appearance: A deep garnet color with purple hues

wines.name: Di Giorgio Coonawarra Cabernet Sauvignon
wines.description: 2021 Di Giorgio Coonawarra Cabernet Sauvignon is a classic red wine that showcases the robust and rich characteristics of the Cabernet Sauvignon grape from the renowned Coonawarra region.
wines.nose: Intense aromas of blackcurrant, blackberry, and dark cherry, complemented by notes of cedar, mint, and a touch of eucalyptus
wines.palate: Full-bodied and well-structured on the palate, with flavors of ripe black fruits, cassis, and hints of dark chocolate and tobacco. The balanced acidity and firm tannins contribute to a lengthy finish
wines.appearance: A deep ruby red color with hints of purple

wines.name: Frank White (Chardonnay-Sauvignon Blanc)
wines.description: Frank White (Chardonnay-Sauvignon Blanc) 2022 is a delightful white wine blend that brings together the crisp acidity of Sauvignon Blanc with the rich texture of Chardonnay.
wines.nose: An expressive nose with notes of green apple, citrus, and tropical fruit, complemented by subtle hints of vanilla and floral undertones
wines.palate: Medium-bodied and well-balanced on the palate, with flavors of ripe apple, zesty lime, and a touch of pineapple. A gentle oak influence adds complexity and a creamy mouthfeel
wines.appearance: A vibrant pale straw color with brilliant clarity

wines.name: Berton Vineyards Reserve Barossa Shiraz
wines.description: Berton Vineyards Reserve Barossa Shiraz is a bold red wine offering the quintessential robust flavors and complexity associated with high-quality Barossa Shiraz.
wines.nose: Intense aromas of blackberry, plum, and dark chocolate, accented with notes of black pepper, vanilla, and oak
wines.palate: Full-bodied with rich flavors of dark berries, plum, and chocolate. Hints of spice, vanilla, and a touch of smokiness from oak aging provide complexity
wines.appearance: Deep, dark purple color

wines.name: Berton Vineyards Winemaker’s Reserve Shiraz
wines.description: The Berton Vineyards Winemaker’s Reserve Shiraz 2022 is a concentrated and complex red wine that highlights the richness and depth of the Shiraz varietal.
wines.nose: Intense aromas of dark berries, blackcurrant, and plums, interwoven with hints of spice, chocolate, and subtle oak notes
wines.palate: Full-bodied with rich flavors of blackberry, dark cherry, and plum on the palate. Notes of black pepper, licorice, and dark chocolate create added complexity. The tannins are smooth and well-integrated, providing a luxurious texture
wines.appearance: Deep, dark purple, almost opaque in color

wines.name: Susana Balbo Nosotros Single Vineyard Nómade Malbec
wines.description: Susana Balbo Nosotrosé Single Vineyard Nmade Malbec 2019 is a premium red wine crafted from meticulously selected grapes, showcasing the best qualities of Malbec from the Uco Valley region in Argentina.
wines.nose: Intense aromas of dark berries, particularly blackberry and blueberry, complemented by notes of violet, dark chocolate, and a touch of oak
wines.palate: Full-bodied with a rich texture, offering flavors of ripe black fruits, plum, and a hint of spice. The oak aging imparts additional complexity with subtle hints of vanilla and coconut
wines.appearance: A deep, inky purple color with a nearly opaque core

wines.name: Susana Balbo Brioso
wines.grape: Cabernet Franc, Cabernet Sauvignon, Malbec, Petit Verdot
wines.description: Susana Balbo Brioso is an elegant and robust red wine that showcases a harmonious blend of traditional Bordeaux varietals.
wines.nose: A complex bouquet of dark berries, black currant, and plum, complemented by hints of vanilla, tobacco, and spice
wines.palate: Full-bodied with firm tannins and rich flavors of blackberry, cassis, and dark chocolate. The palate is further enhanced by subtle notes of oak and a long, elegant finish
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red with purple hues

wines.name: Benmarco Expresivo
wines.description: Benmarco Expresivo 2021 is a robust red wine that combines the richness of Malbec with the structure of Cabernet Sauvignon, showcasing the best of both varietals.
wines.nose: Rich aromatic profile featuring ripe blackberries, dark cherries, and plums, interwoven with notes of tobacco, cedar, and a hint of spice
wines.palate: Full-bodied and velvety on the palate, with layers of dark fruit flavors complemented by undertones of chocolate, licorice, and a touch of vanilla. Fine-grained tannins add structure and complexity
wines.appearance: A deep and intense purple color with ruby highlights

wines.name: Benmarco Malbec
wines.description: Benmarco Malbec 2021 is a quintessential expression of Argentinian Malbec hailing from the renowned Uco Valley.
wines.nose: Aromas of blackberries plums and violets with subtle hints of vanilla and spice
wines.palate: Full-bodied with velvety tannins and flavors of dark fruits such as blackberry and plum complemented by hints of chocolate and black pepper
wines.appearance: Deep ruby color with purplish highlights

wines.name: Andeluna Pasionado Cuatro Cepas
wines.grape: Cabernet Franc, Cabernet Sauvignon, Malbec, Merlot
wines.description: Andeluna Pasionado Cuatro Cepas is a prestigious red blend wine that exemplifies the art of combining four varietals to produce a harmonious and complex expression.
wines.nose: Intense bouquet featuring aromas of ripe black fruits such as blackberry and plum, complemented by hints of spice, vanilla, and tobacco
wines.palate: Rich and full-bodied on the palate, with flavors of dark fruit, chocolate, and a hint of oak. The tannins are well-rounded and provide a smooth, lingering finish
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red with purple hues

wines.name: Andeluna Pasionado Malbec
wines.description: Andeluna Pasionado Malbec is a premium Argentine Malbec that embodies the rich terroir of the Uco Valley region.
wines.nose: Complex aromas of ripe blackberries, plums, and blueberries, with subtle notes of violet, vanilla, and tobacco
wines.palate: Full-bodied and rich on the palate, featuring flavors of dark fruit, chocolate, and espresso. Smooth tannins and a long, lingering finish
wines.appearance: A deep, inky purple color

wines.name: Andeluna Altitud Organic Malbec
wines.description: Andeluna Altitud Organic Malbec is a premium expression of organic viticulture that showcases the distinct character and complexity of high-altitude Malbec.
wines.nose: An alluring bouquet of blackberries and plums, mixed with floral notes of violet and a touch of spice and vanilla
wines.palate: Full-bodied with robust tannins, featuring flavors of dark berries, cherries, and hints of chocolate, complemented by subtle notes of espresso and tobacco on the finish
wines.appearance: A deep violet color with ruby hues, indicating its rich and concentrated nature

wines.name: Andeluna Altitud Cabernet Sauvignon
wines.description: Andeluna Altitud Cabernet Sauvignon is a robust red wine that embodies the high-altitude terroir of the Andes range, offering complexity and depth.
wines.nose: A rich bouquet of blackberries, cassis, and dark cherries, complemented by notes of pepper, tobacco, and a hint of mint
wines.palate: Full-bodied and complex on the palate, featuring bold tannins and flavors of blackcurrant, dark chocolate, and spice. A lingering finish with hints of oak and earthiness
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red color with a garnet edge

wines.name: Andeluna Altitud Malbec
wines.description: Andeluna Altitud Malbec 2020 is a distinguished red wine that captures the essence of high-altitude vineyards, offering a robust and complex flavor profile.
wines.nose: A bouquet of ripe blackberry and plum with floral hints of violet, complemented by subtle notes of vanilla and tobacco
wines.palate: Full-bodied and velvety on the palate, with flavors of dark berries, cherries, and a touch of chocolate. Finished with fine tannins and lingering notes of espresso
wines.appearance: Deep purplish-red color reflecting its intensity and concentration

wines.name: Andeluna 1300m Cabernet Sauvignon
wines.description: Andeluna 1300 Cabernet Sauvignon is a refined red wine that embodies the climatic and geographical conditions of the Uco Valley in Argentina.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose featuring ripe blackberries, cassis, and cherries, complemented by hints of green pepper, tobacco, and oak
wines.palate: Full-bodied with a well-structured palate, offering flavors of dark fruits, cedar, and a touch of spice. The tannins are firm yet smooth, leading to a lingering finish
wines.appearance: A deep ruby red color with hints of purple

wines.name: Andeluna 1300m Malbec
wines.description: Andeluna 1300 Malbec is a celebrated red wine that embodies the rich viticultural tradition of Argentina, known for producing exceptional Malbec.
wines.nose: Aromas of ripe black fruits, such as blackberry and plum, intertwined with floral notes of violet and subtle hints of spice and tobacco
wines.palate: Full-bodied with well-structured tannins and flavors of ripe blackberries, cherries, and a hint of chocolate and espresso on the finish, providing depth and complexity
wines.appearance: Deeply colored with a rich, dark violet hue

wines.name: Andeluna Raices Limited Edition Malbec
wines.grape: Cabernet Franc, Cabernet Sauvignon, Malbec, Merlot, Petit Verdot, Pinot Noir, Shiraz
wines.description: Andeluna Raices Limited Edition Malbec 2023 is a premium red wine that embodies the essence of Argentina’s renowned Malbec terroir.
wines.nose: On the nose, the wine offers an intriguing bouquet of dark fruits such as blackberry and plum, combined with floral notes of violet. Undertones of vanilla and tobacco come through as well
wines.palate: The palate is greeted with plush tannins and a full-bodied structure. Flavors of ripe blackberries and cherries dominate, while hints of chocolate and espresso linger on the finish, providing depth and complexity
wines.appearance: The Andeluna Raices Limited Edition Malbec 2023 presents a deep violet color with hues of plum and garnet. This rich color depth hints at the concentration and intensity of the wine waiting to be…

wines.name: Andeluna Edición Limitada Blanc de Malbec
wines.description: Andeluna Edicin Limitada Blanc de Malbec is a unique white wine that offers an unconventional take on Malbec by crafting it into a white varietal.
wines.nose: An aromatic nose with delicate floral notes, hints of white peach, citrus fruits, and a subtle minerality
wines.palate: Light-bodied and fresh on the palate, with flavors of green apple, lime, and a touch of stone fruit. Crisp acidity provides a refreshing finish
wines.appearance: A clear, pale yellow color with slight greenish hues

wines.name: Château Les Rambauds Cuvée du Chef Bordeaux AOC
wines.description: Chteau Les Rambauds Cuve du Chef Bordeaux AOC is a finely crafted red wine from the renowned Bordeaux region known for its blend of classic Bordeaux varietals.
wines.nose: Expressive nose with aromas of blackcurrant, plum, and cherry, complemented by hints of tobacco, vanilla, and earthy undertones
wines.palate: Medium-bodied with well-balanced tannins and acidity. Flavors of dark berries, plum, and cassis, with a touch of oak and spice on the finish
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red color with purple hues

wines.name: iLauri “Tavo” Pinot Grigio delle Venezie DOC
wines.description: iLauri “Tavo” Pinot Grigio delle Venezie DOC is a delightful white wine that captures the essence of the Pinot Grigio varietal from the renowned Delle Venezie region.
wines.nose: A nose filled with delicate floral notes, green apple, and hints of citrus
wines.palate: Light and crisp on the palate, with flavors of lemon zest, green apple, and a touch of pear. The finish is clean and refreshing
wines.appearance: A pale straw-yellow color with hints of green

wines.name: Gnarly Head Old Vine Zinfandel
wines.description: Gnarly Head Old Vine Zinfandel is a bold red wine that is crafted from old vine Zinfandel grapes, known for their complex and intense flavors.
wines.nose: Aromas of dark cherry, blackberry, and spice, complemented by notes of vanilla and toasted oak
wines.palate: Full-bodied with flavors of ripe blackberries, plums, and black pepper, along with hints of chocolate and spice. The palate is rich and smooth with well-integrated tannins
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red color with purple hues

wines.name: Gnarly Head Cabernet Sauvignon
wines.description: Gnarly Head Cabernet Sauvignon 2021 is a robust red wine known for its rich and bold flavor profile.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose brimming with dark blackberry, plum, and black cherry, complemented by nuances of vanilla and oak
wines.palate: Full-bodied with a well-structured palate. Predominantly flavors of dark berries, black currants, and a touch of chocolate, with subtle layers of coffee and spice
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red with hints of garnet around the edges

wines.name: Gnarly Head Chardonnay
wines.description: Gnarly Head Chardonnay is a robust white wine that brings forward the classic characteristics of the Chardonnay grape with an added depth from its distinctive aging process.
wines.nose: Inviting nose with layers of ripe apple, pear, and tropical fruits, complemented by hints of vanilla, caramel, and toasty oak
wines.palate: Full-bodied and smooth on the palate, with flavors of baked apple, mango, and butterscotch. The oak aging adds complexity with notes of toasted nuts, spice, and a hint of creaminess
wines.appearance: A radiant golden yellow color

wines.name: Reichsgraf von Kesselstatt RK Riesling Trocken (dry)
wines.description: Reichsgraf von Kesselstatt RK Riesling Trocken (dry) is a vibrant white wine that embodies the crisp and refreshing qualities of a well-made Riesling, delivering a dry, mineral-driven profile.
wines.nose: Bright and aromatic nose with notes of green apple, citrus zest, white peach, and fresh herbs, complemented by a subtle minerality
wines.palate: Light-bodied with a crisp acidity, presenting flavors of lime, green apple, and white peach. The dry finish is clean and refreshing, with a touch of flinty minerality
wines.appearance: A pale straw color with a slight greenish tint

wines.name: Lapostolle Le Petit Clos de Clos Apalta
wines.grape: Cabernet Sauvignon, Carménère, Merlot, Petit Verdot
wines.description: Lapostolle Le Petit Clos de Clos Apalta is an elegant red blend from Chile that showcases a harmonious integration of multiple varietals, rooted in the renowned Apalta Valley.
wines.nose: A complex nose with layers of black fruits, such as blackberry and plum, complemented by floral notes, spice, and hints of chocolate
wines.palate: Full-bodied with silky tannins, offering a palate of ripe dark berries, cocoa, and subtle oak, leading to a long, elegant finish
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red with purple hues

wines.name: Lapostolle Grand Selection Carménère
wines.grape: Cabernet Franc, Carménère, Grenache, Petit Verdot, Shiraz
wines.description: Lapostolle Grand Selection Carmnre 2020 is a distinctive red wine that reflects the rich heritage and unique terroir of Chilean wine-making.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose with notes of ripe black fruits, such as blackberries and plums, complemented by hints of green pepper, spices, and a touch of chocolate
wines.palate: Full-bodied with a silky texture on the palate. Rich flavors of dark fruits and spices are interwoven with subtle smoky notes, leading to a long, smooth finish
wines.appearance: A deep, dark purple color with garnet edges

wines.name: Lapostolle Apalta (French blend)
wines.description: Lapostolle Apalta 2021 is an exquisite red wine blend that combines the elegance and complexity of several French varietals grown in the unique terroir of Chile’s Apalta region.
wines.nose: An intense bouquet of blackberries, cherries, and plums intertwined with floral notes, hints of dark chocolate, and delicate spice
wines.palate: Full-bodied and rich, with well-structured tannins and flavors of ripe black fruits, eucalyptus, and a touch of oak, leading to a long, complex finish
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red with hints of purple

wines.name: The Hedonist Shiraz
wines.description: The Hedonist Shiraz is a well-crafted red wine that embodies the bold and rich characteristics of Shiraz.
wines.nose: A complex nose with aromas of blackberries, plums, and black pepper, complemented by subtle hints of chocolate and spice
wines.palate: Full-bodied and robust on the palate, with flavors of dark berries, licorice, and black pepper. The wine exhibits smooth tannins and a long, persistent finish with a touch of oak
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red color

wines.name: Schild Estate Barossa Cabernet Sauvignon
wines.description: Schild Estate Cabernet Sauvignon is a rich and bold red wine that showcases the depth and complexity characteristic of the Barossa Valley region.
wines.nose: A full bouquet of blackcurrant, blackberry, and ripe plum, intertwined with notes of cedar, tobacco, and a hint of mint
wines.palate: Full-bodied with firm yet fine tannins, offering flavors of dark berries, cassis, and plum, complemented by nuances of chocolate, leather, and a touch of herbal complexity
wines.appearance: A deep, dark ruby red with a hint of purple

wines.name: Schild Estate Barossa Merlot
wines.description: Schild Estate Merlot is a distinguished red wine renowned for its smooth texture and balanced profile, representative of the Merlot varietal.
wines.nose: An inviting nose of dark berries such as blackberry and plum, accented with hints of cocoa, cedar, and a touch of spice
wines.palate: Medium-bodied with a smooth, velvety mouthfeel. Flavors of ripe black cherry and plum are complemented by notes of chocolate, vanilla, and a subtle touch of oak
wines.appearance: A deep ruby red color, indicative of its rich flavor profile

wines.name: Susana Balbo Signature Malbec
wines.description: Susana Balbo Signature Malbec showcases the essence of Argentine Malbec with a refined and elegant expression.
wines.nose: Aromas of dark fruit such as blackberry and plum, complemented by hints of violet, vanilla, and spices
wines.palate: Full-bodied on the palate with ripe plum, blackberry, and cherry flavors, accented by notes of cocoa, coffee, and a touch of spice. Smooth, well-integrated tannins lead to a long, elegant finish
wines.appearance: Deep ruby with purple hues

wines.name: Susana Balbo Crios Torrontés
wines.description: Susana Balbo Crios Torronts 2022 is a vibrant and aromatic wine that highlights the unique characteristics of the Torronts grape, often referred to as Argentina’s signature white varietal.
wines.nose: Expressive aromas of white flowers, citrus, and stone fruits like peach and apricot, complemented by herbal notes
wines.palate: Light-bodied with a crisp acidity, the palate offers flavors of ripe peach, lemon, and pear. Hints of jasmine and orange blossom add complexity
wines.appearance: Pale straw yellow color with greenish reflections

wines.name: Bandicoot Estate Premium Selected Rosé
wines.description: Bandicoot Estate Premium Selected Rosé is a modern, crisp, and refreshing rosé, celebrated for its delicate pink and red fruit flavors and a textured, generous palate. This delightful and versatile wine brings a touch of elegance to any occasion, showcasing a balanced fruitiness and acidity that makes it an ideal…
wines.nose: Delicate aromas of rose petal, watermelon, and wild strawberry on the nose, complemented by hints of fresh raspberries and a touch of citrus zest
wines.palate: Light-bodied and crisp on the palate, offering juicy red fruit flavors with a refreshing hint of watermelon and a zesty citrus finish, all balanced by a lively acidity

wines.name: Conte Fosco Cuvée Brut
wines.description: Conte Fosco Cuvée Brut is a refreshing and elegant sparkling wine, delivering a fine effervescence and delicate flavor profile. Crafted with the Charmat method, it offers a pleasantly dry and very fresh experience, combining gentle acidity with a lively fizziness.
wines.nose: Features fine and delicate floral notes, subtle pear, citrus, and white-fleshed fruit aromas. Expect hints of green apple and white flowers
wines.palate: Light-bodied and refreshing on the palate, with flavors of ripe apple, pear, and a touch of lemon zest. It is pleasantly dry and very fresh, showcasing gentle acidity and a lively fizziness
wines.appearance: A brilliant straw yellow colour

wines.name: Val D’Oca Prosecco “Blu” Millesimato Extra Dry DOC (1500ml)
wines.description: Val D’Oca Proséecco “Blu” Millesimato Extra Dry DOC (1500ml) is an elegant sparkling wine crafted from the Glera grape offering a balance of freshness and subtle sweetness.
wines.nose: Delicate notes of green apple, pear, and white flowers accompanied by a hint of citrus zest
wines.palate: Light and refreshing on the palate with flavors of green apple, fresh peach, and a touch of honey. The slight sweetness is well-balanced by vibrant acidity
wines.appearance: Pale straw yellow with a fine and persistent perlage

wines.name: Val D’Oca Prosecco “Blu” Millesimato Extra Dry DOC
wines.description: Val D’Oca Proséecco “Blu” Millesimato Extra Dry DOC is a delightful sparkling wine from Italy that encapsulates the lively essence of Proséecco while offering a refined and subtle sweetness.
wines.nose: Inviting nose with notes of green apple, white peach, and citrus blossoms, complemented by hints of freshly baked bread
wines.palate: Crisp and refreshing on the palate, with flavors of ripe pear, apple, and a touch of honey. The fine bubbles and slight sweetness enhance the fruitiness of the wine
wines.appearance: Pale straw yellow with a persistent perlage

wines.name: Louis Perdrier Brut Rosé
wines.description: Louis Perdrier Brut Rosé is a delightful sparkling rosé wine that embodies the essence of elegance and refreshment.
wines.nose: Fresh and fruity with aromas of red berries, citrus, and a hint of floral undertones
wines.palate: Light-bodied and lively on the palate, featuring flavors of strawberries, raspberries, and a touch of zesty citrus. The effervescence adds a refreshing quality to the wine
wines.appearance: A beautiful pale pink hue with fine bubbles

wines.name: Louis Perdrier Brut d’Excellence (1,500ml)
wines.grape: Chenin, Colombard, Folle Blanche, Menu Pineau, Ugni blanc
wines.description: Louis Perdrier Brut d’Excellence (1500ml) nv is a sophisticated sparkling wine that embodies the elegance and finesse typical of high-quality bubbles.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose featuring notes of green apple, pear, and citrus, complemented by subtle hints of white flowers
wines.palate: Crisp and lively on the palate, with flavors of fresh orchard fruits, citrus zest, and a touch of brioche from the aging process. The well-balanced acidity enhances the refreshing finish
wines.appearance: A pale straw yellow color with a fine and persistent mousse

wines.name: Louis Perdrier Brut d’Excellence
wines.grape: Chenin, Colombard, Folle Blanche, Menu Pineau, Ugni blanc
wines.description: Louis Perdrier Brut d’Excellence is a commendable sparkling wine that exemplifies the elegance and finesse characteristic of well-crafted sparkling wines.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose featuring green apples, citrus notes, and hints of white flowers
wines.palate: Light-bodied and crisp on the palate with flavors of green apple, lemon zest and a touch of brioche providing a refreshing and well-balanced experience
wines.appearance: A delicate straw yellow color with fine and persistent bubbles

wines.name: Champagne Paul Dangin & Fils Cuvée Carte Or Brut
wines.description: Champagne Paul Dangin & Fils Cuvée Carte Or Brut is a refined sparkling wine that embodies the tradition and craftsmanship of the Côte des Bar region in Champagne, France. This generous Champagne, crafted by a dedicated family estate in Celles-sur-Ource, is celebrated for its harmony and balance, making it suitable…
wines.nose: Delicate notes of fresh apples, white flowers, and a hint of brioche, complemented by subtle nuances of almond and citrus zest, alongside classic aromas of cookies and pears
wines.palate: Balanced and creamy on the palate, it offers a straightforward attack that evolves into a gourmet profile with notes of almond. Crisp and refreshing, it reveals flavors of green apple, lemon, and a touch of honey, finishing with a clean…
wines.appearance: Gold yellow with greenish reflections and fine, persistent bubbles

wines.name: Cantina di Negrar Appassimento Rosso Veneto IGT
wines.description: Cantina di Negrar Appassimento Roséso Veneto IGT is a bold red wine made using the traditional appassimento method, which involves drying the grapes before fermentation to concentrate flavors and aromas.
wines.nose: Rich and complex nose with aromas of dried cherries, plums, and spices, accompanied by hints of cocoa, vanilla, and a touch of earthy undertones
wines.palate: Full-bodied and velvety, with flavors of dark berries, dried fruits, and chocolate. The wine exhibits balanced acidity and well-integrated tannins, leading to a long, satisfying finish
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red with garnet reflections

wines.name: Vernaiolo Chianti DOCG
wines.description: Vernaiolo Chianti DOCG 2022 is a classic Italian red wine crafted from Sangiovese grapes, offering a traditional representation of the Chianti region.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose with layers of cherry, red berries, and floral notes, intertwined with subtle hints of spice and earthiness
wines.palate: Medium-bodied and well-balanced on the palate, with flavors of ripe cherries, raspberries, and a touch of plum. The wine has a pleasant acidity and soft tannins, making it approachable and versatile
wines.appearance: A vibrant ruby red color

wines.name: Terre di Mario Montepulciano d’Abruzzo DOP
wines.description: Terre di Mario Montepulciano d’Abruzzo DOP is a robust red wine that embodies the traditional flavors of the Montepulciano grape variety from the Abruzzo region in Italy.
wines.nose: An expressive nose with notes of ripe black plum, blackberry, and a hint of spice, combined with subtle earthy undertones
wines.palate: Medium to full-bodied with velvety tannins and vibrant acidity. Flavors of dark cherry, licorice, and a touch of cocoa make for a well-balanced palate
wines.appearance: A deep ruby red with violet reflections

wines.name: Terre di Mario Vino Rosso
wines.description: Terre di Mario Vino Roséso is an engaging red wine that represents a delightful blend of varietals creating a harmonious and versatile profile.
wines.nose: Aromas of ripe red fruits like cherries and raspberries, with hints of spice and floral undertones
wines.palate: Medium-bodied with a smooth palate, exhibiting flavors of red berries, subtle spice notes, and a touch of oak
wines.appearance: A rich ruby red color

wines.name: Pirovano Collezione Primitivo Puglia IGT
wines.description: Pirovano Collezione Primitivo Puglia IGT from the 2022 vintage presents a robust and full-bodied experience typical of Primitivo wines from the Puglia region.
wines.nose: Rich aromas of dark berries plum and hints of spice and earth
wines.palate: Full-bodied on the palate with flavors of ripe black fruit spices and a touch of chocolate
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red with violet edges

wines.name: Château Bel Air Bordeaux AOP
wines.description: Chteau Bel Air Bordeaux AOP 2021 is a refined red wine that epitomizes the classic elegance and complexity of Bordeaux wines.
wines.nose: Expressive aromas of blackcurrant, cherry, and plum supported by notes of cedar, vanilla, and a subtle hint of graphite
wines.palate: Medium-bodied with a balanced structure and smooth tannins, offering flavors of black fruits, tobacco, and oak. A touch of minerality and a persistent finish enhance its complexity
wines.appearance: A deep ruby color with hints of purple

wines.name: Les Producteurs Réunis Cuvée Dissenay Pinot Noir
wines.description: Les Producteurs Réunis Cuvée Dissenay Pinot Noir is an elegant and approachable red wine, crafted from vineyards nestled between the mountains and the Mediterranean in France’s Pays d’Oc region. This unique terroir, with its ideal balance of warm sunshine and cooling breezes, allows the Pinot Noir grape to express its…
wines.nose: An aromatic nose reveals vibrant notes of red cherries and raspberries, complemented by subtle floral hints, earthy undertones, and a touch of green herb, sometimes with a whisper of oak or vanilla
wines.palate: Light-bodied and smooth on the palate, offering juicy flavors of fresh red berries, particularly cherry and raspberry. It presents a delicate finish with a touch of spice, a hint of smoke, and fine-grained tannins that contribute to a…
wines.appearance: Deep red with a purple tinge

wines.name: Château La Plaige Bordeaux Merlot
wines.description: Chteau La Plaige Bordeaux AOC is a classic Bordeaux blend that elegantly represents the rich wine-making heritage of the Bordeaux region.
wines.nose: A complex bouquet with aromas of dark berries, black cherry, and plum, mingling with hints of tobacco, cedar, and earthy tones
wines.palate: Medium-bodied with well-integrated tannins, the palate reveals flavors of ripe blackcurrant, cherry, and blackberry, complemented by nuances of vanilla, licorice, and a touch of spice
wines.appearance: Displays a deep ruby red color with garnet reflections

wines.name: Cantina Tollo Gufo Merlot
wines.description: Cantina Tollo Gufo Merlot is a captivating red wine that showcases the smooth and approachable nature of Merlot while highlighting the nuances of its Abruzzese terroir. It offers a pure expression of the varietal, resulting in a wine that is both fresh and well-structured with reserved tannins providing a pleasing…
wines.nose: A fragrant and enchanting bouquet of ripe red and black fruits, dominated by notes of plum, cherry, and morello cherry, with sweeping hints of blackberries. Subtle undertones of vanilla, mocha, and spice add layers of complexity
wines.palate: The palate is extremely fresh and very well structured, offering a medium-bodied profile. Reserved yet well-integrated tannins provide good texture, leading to a long, soft finish with complex undertones of spice and chocolate
wines.appearance: Intense ruby red with alluring violet hues, indicative of its richness

wines.name: Root:1 Cabernet Sauvignon Reserva
wines.description: Root:1 Cabernet Sauvignon Reserva is a robust red wine that captures the essence of Chilean terroir with its rich flavor and full-bodied profile.
wines.nose: An enticing bouquet of ripe blackcurrant blackberry and hints of cedar and tobacco
wines.palate: Full-bodied and well-structured on the palate with flavors of dark berries plum and chocolate complemented by subtle notes of spice and oak
wines.appearance: A deep ruby red color

wines.name: Frank Cabernet Shiraz Merlot
wines.description: Frank Cabernet Shiraz Merlot 2021 is a robust red wine blending the bold characteristics of Cabernet Sauvignon with the spiciness of Shiraz and the smoothness of Merlot.
wines.nose: The nose opens up with layers of black cherry, blackberry, and plum, intertwined with spicy notes of black pepper and a hint of vanilla
wines.palate: Full-bodied and rich on the palate, offering flavors of ripe blackberries, dark cherries, and plums, with undertones of spice and mocha. The tannins are well-structured and provide a lasting finish
wines.appearance: A deep, rich ruby color that signals its intensity

wines.name: Camino de Chile Malbec COMING SOON
wines.description: Camino de Chile Malbec is a robust red wine that captures the essence of the Malbec grape with its rich flavors and bold profile.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose with layers of dark fruits such as blackberry and plum accompanied by hints of spice and subtle oak notes
wines.palate: Full-bodied on the palate with intense flavors of ripe blackberries, cherries, and a touch of chocolate, complemented by well-integrated tannins and a smooth finish
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red color

wines.name: Andeluna Anduco Malbec
wines.description: Andeluna Anduco Malbec is a robust and expressive red wine that captures the essence of Argentinian Malbec with its vibrant flavors and depth.
wines.nose: An intriguing bouquet of dark fruits like blackberry and plum, combined with floral notes of violet and undertones of vanilla and tobacco
wines.palate: Full-bodied and structured on the palate, featuring flavors of ripe blackberries and cherries with hints of chocolate and espresso for added complexity
wines.appearance: Deep violet color with hues of plum

wines.name: Figuière Méditerranée Rosé IGP
wines.description: Figuire Mditerrane Rosé IGP is a refreshing rosé wine that embodies the Mediterranean spirit with its vibrant taste and aromatic profile.
wines.nose: Floral and fruity aromas with notes of strawberry, raspberry, and a hint of citrus zest
wines.palate: Light-bodied and crisp on the palate, delivering flavors of red berries, citrus, and a touch of minerality
wines.appearance: A pale pink color with delicate rosée petal highlights

wines.name: Domaine Saint-André Folie d’Inès Rosé
wines.description: Domaine Saint-Andr Folie d’Ins Rosé is an enchanting rosé wine that captures the essence of summer with its bright and refreshing profile.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose with nuances of fresh strawberries, raspberries, and a hint of rosée petals, underscored by subtle citrus notes
wines.palate: Light-bodied and crisp on the palate, offering flavors of red berries, watermelon, and a light citrus zest. The finish is refreshing with an elegant minerality
wines.appearance: A delicate pale pink color with shimmering salmon tints

wines.name: Listel Grain de Gris Rosé Terres du Midi IGP
wines.description: Listel Grain de Gris Rosé Terres du Midi IGP is a delightful rosé wine known for its refreshing and lively character, making it a perfect companion for warm days and light meals.
wines.nose: Fresh and fragrant with notes of red berries, citrus, and subtle floral hints
wines.palate: Light-bodied and crisp on the palate with flavors of strawberry, raspberry, and a touch of peach. The finish is clean and refreshing with a lingering minerality
wines.appearance: A pale salmon pink color

wines.name: Lapostolle Le Rosé
wines.description: Lapostolle Le Rosé is a fresh and elegant rosé wine that captures the essence of its Mediterranean varietals.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose with red fruit aromas such as strawberry and raspberry complemented by subtle notes of citrus and floral undertones
wines.palate: Light-bodied and refreshing on the palate with a crisp acidity. Flavors of fresh red berries, grapefruit and a hint of minerality lead to a clean and vibrant finish
wines.appearance: Pale pink with delicate salmon hues

wines.name: Plaimont Colombelle Colombard-Sauvignon Côtes de Gascogne IGP
wines.description: Plaimont Colombelle Colombard-Sauvignon Ctes de Gascogne IGP 2022 is a refreshing white wine from the Gascogne region of France, known for its vibrant and aromatic profile.
wines.nose: A lively nose featuring notes of citrus, green apple, and white flowers with a hint of tropical fruit
wines.palate: Light-bodied and crisp on the palate, with bright acidity and flavors of grapefruit, lime, and green apple. The wine exhibits a zesty freshness and a clean finish
wines.appearance: A clear, pale yellow color with greenish tints

wines.name: John Dapetrosino Grillo Sicilia DOC
wines.description: John Dapetrosino Grillo Sicilia DOC is a vibrant white wine that embodies the distinct terroir of Sicily, offering a refreshing and elegant expression of the native Grillo grape. Produced by Sibiliana, a cooperative of vine growers and pioneers of organic viticulture, this wine reflects their commitment to quality and…
wines.nose: An intense and vibrant nose, featuring hints of stone fruits and citrus typical of Sicily, complemented by notes of green apple, white flowers, and aromatic herbs such as sage and thyme. A subtle hint of fresh almond and a tantalizing…
wines.palate: Fresh, intense, and structured on the palate, with a light-bodied and crisp profile. Flavors of lemon, grapefruit, and a touch of minerality lead to a refreshing and well-balanced finish, often marked by a slight salinity that reflects…
wines.appearance: Golden yellow colour, often with bright greenish reflections

wines.name: Poggio Dragone Trebbiano-Chardonnay Colline Pescaresi IGP
wines.description: Poggio Dragone Trebbiano-Chardonnay Colline Pescaresi IGP is a fresh and vibrant wine that combines the crisp qualities of Trebbiano with the smooth and creamy nature of Chardonnay.
wines.nose: Delicate and refreshing nose featuring citrus fruits, green apple, and hints of white flowers
wines.palate: Light-bodied and crisp with flavors of lemon, green apple, and subtle floral notes. The Chardonnay adds a touch of creaminess that rounds out the palate
wines.appearance: Pale straw yellow color with greenish reflections

wines.name: Terre di Mario Pinot Grigio Terre di Chieti IGT
wines.description: Terre di Mario Pinot Grigio Terre di Chieti IGT 2022 is a refreshing white wine that exemplifies the crisp and clean qualities typical of the Pinot Grigio varietal.
wines.nose: Bright and aromatic nose with notes of green apple, citrus fruits, and a hint of white flowers
wines.palate: Light-bodied and refreshing on the palate, with flavors of lemon, lime, and green apple complemented by a mineral undertone
wines.appearance: A pale straw yellow color with greenish reflections

wines.name: Terre di Mario Vino Bianco
wines.description: 1924 Scotch Barrel Aged Chardonnay is an intriguing white wine that offers a unique twist on traditional Chardonnay by incorporating the rich influence of Scotch whisky barrel aging.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose with layers of ripe apple, pear, and tropical fruits, intertwined with hints of vanilla, caramel, and a touch of smokiness from the Scotch barrels
wines.palate: Full-bodied and creamy on the palate, with flavors of baked apple, pineapple, and butterscotch. The influence of the Scotch barrels adds complexity with notes of toasted oak, spice, and a subtle hint of peat
wines.appearance: A brilliant golden yellow color

wines.name: Brushtail Estate Grey Label Sparkling
wines.description: Brushtail Estate Grey Label Sparkling is a delightful and effervescent wine that embodies the elegance and vibrancy typical of high-quality sparkling wines, showcasing the depth of Australian winemaking. This refined sparkling wine is a prized Australian native, much like the Brushtail Possum that inspires the estate…
wines.palate: Light-bodied and crisp on the palate, with persistent bubbles leaving a creamy, crisp finish. Flavors of apple, lemon zest, and a delicate minerality create a refreshing and elegant mouthfeel

wines.name: Promesa Sommelier Edition Red
wines.description: Promesa Sommelier Edition Red is an elegant and fruit-forward red wine crafted by Viña de Aguirre, distinguished by its intense color and delicate aromas. Made with carefully selected Cabernet Sauvignon grapes from the winery’s estate, it embodies the rich terroir of Chile’s Central Valley, offering a beautifully…
wines.nose: Delightful aromas of blackcurrant and black cherries
wines.palate: Elegant with good balance, featuring soft and mature tannins

wines.name: Promesa Sommelier Edition White
wines.description: Promesa Sommelier Edition White is a still white Sauvignon Blanc from Chile’s Central Valley. Made with selected estate grapes, it is a young and elegant wine with bright citrus fruit and delicate floral aromatics.
wines.nose: Lime, citrus fruit and white flowers
wines.palate: Light-bodied and refreshing, with bright citrus-driven fruit, lively acidity and a clean, persistent finish
wines.appearance: Light yellow colour with greenish tones

wines.name: Bandicoot Estate Premium Selected White
wines.description: Bandicoot Estate Premium Selected White is a delightful Australian Chardonnay, crafted to be a fresh and vibrant expression of the varietal. This elegant and approachable white wine stands out for its crispness and lively fruit profile, showcasing the skilled winemaking of Bandicoot Estate.
wines.nose: Inviting aromas of green apple, citrus fruits, and white flowers, subtly underlined by minerality. Fresh white fruits like apple and pear mingle with hints of citrus and pineapple
wines.palate: Light-bodied and refreshing on the palate, offering flavors of lemon, green apple, and a touch of melon. It presents a nice roundness with a juicy balance, leading to a clean, zesty, and pleasantly long finish
wines.appearance: Pale straw yellow with clear and crisp clarity

wines.name: Bandicoot Estate Premium Selected Red
wines.description: Bandicoot Estate Premium Selected Red is a distinctive Australian Shiraz that showcases rich, bold fruit flavors and a full-bodied character. Crafted by skilled winemakers using cool fermentation, this wine delivers a smooth red with firm yet silky tannins, making it a truly special and approachable offering.
wines.nose: Intense aromas of dark berries, black pepper, and hints of smoky oak, complemented by soft spicy notes
wines.palate: Full-bodied with flavors of ripe blackberry, plum, and a touch of spice, alongside warm ripe blueberries and red cherries. Well-integrated, silky tannins lead to a pleasant, bodied finish, with hints of chocolate and oak adding richness…
wines.appearance: A vivid ruby colour

wines.name: Camino de Chile Sauvignon Blanc
wines.description: Camino de Chile Sauvignon Blanc is a refreshing white wine characterized by its vibrant acidity and lively fruit flavors.
wines.nose: Fresh and zesty nose with pronounced notes of citrus lime and green apple complemented by subtle grassy undertones
wines.palate: Light-bodied and crisp on the palate with flavors of grapefruit lemon and gooseberry. The bright acidity enhances the wine’s refreshing qualities
wines.appearance: A pale straw color with greenish hints

wines.name: Camino de Chile Chardonnay COMING SOON
wines.description: Camino de Chile Chardonnay is a delightful white wine that perfectly captures the essence of Chardonnay grown in the unique terroir of Chile.
wines.nose: Fresh and aromatic, with notes of citrus fruits, tropical fruits like pineapple, and delicate floral hints
wines.palate: Medium-bodied with a smooth, balanced acidity. Flavors of green apple, lemon zest, and a touch of minerality dominate the palate, finishing with a pleasing crispness
wines.appearance: A bright, pale yellow hue with greenish reflections

wines.name: Camino de Chile Merlot
wines.description: Camino de Chile Merlot is a delightful red wine that offers a harmonious balance between fruit flavors and subtle earthy undertones.
wines.nose: Expressive nose with aromas of ripe red berries, plum, and a hint of vanilla and tobacco
wines.palate: Medium-bodied with a velvety texture on the palate. Flavors of black cherry, raspberry, and chocolate are complemented by a touch of spice and oak
wines.appearance: A deep ruby red color with a slightly translucent edge

wines.name: Camino de Chile Cabernet Sauvignon
wines.description: Camino de Chile Cabernet Sauvignon offers a classic expression of one of the world’s most beloved red wine grapes.
wines.nose: Rich bouquet of blackcurrant and plum, enhanced by hints of tobacco, cedar, and a touch of pepper
wines.palate: Full-bodied with a firm tannin structure and flavors of dark berries, complemented by subtle notes of vanilla, oak, and spice
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red hue, indicating a robust presence

wines.name: Lamador Chardonnay COMING SOON
wines.description: Lamador Chardonnay is a vibrant and elegant white wine, crafted with carefully controlled yields to ensure concentrated flavors and exceptional quality. This Chilean Chardonnay offers a refreshing finish with a harmonious balance of fruit and a great persistence on the palate.
wines.nose: Intense aromas of citrus and tropical fruits, complemented by notes of green apple and white flowers
wines.palate: Balanced and fresh, with a predominance of pineapple and peaches, developing nicely in the mouth with a perfect balance between body and minerality
wines.appearance: Clear straw yellow with golden highlights

wines.name: Lamador Sauvignon Blanc
wines.description: Lamador Sauvignon Blanc is a vibrant and refreshing white wine that perfectly captures the essence of Chilean Sauvignon Blanc. It is appreciated for its bright citrus flavors, crisp acidity, and aromatic profile, making it a versatile and enjoyable choice.
wines.nose: An aromatic nose of citrus fruits like lime and grapefruit, along with notes of green apple, fresh herbs, and sometimes tropical fruits
wines.palate: Light-bodied and refreshing on the palate with flavors of lemon, green apple, and tropical fruits. It offers crisp acidity, a clean, zesty finish, and can sometimes present notes of nuts and melon, balancing fruitiness with minerality
wines.appearance: Pale yellow with silver highlights, often presenting a pale straw color with a greenish hue

wines.name: Lamador Merlot
wines.description: Lamador Merlot is a classic red wine that showcases the smooth and approachable nature of the Merlot grape, making it a versatile choice for various occasions.
wines.nose: An aromatic nose featuring ripe black cherry, plum, and a touch of chocolate, layered with hints of cedar and vanilla spices, alongside pleasant notes of raspberries and prune
wines.palate: Medium-bodied with soft tannins, offering flavors of juicy dark fruit, subtle oak, and a refined finish. Enjoy delightful notes of prunes, cassis, and blackberry, balanced by refreshing acidity
wines.appearance: Deep ruby red with captivating purple reflections

wines.name: Lamador Cabernet Sauvignon
wines.description: Lamador Cabernet Sauvignon is a robust red wine that showcases the classic characteristics of Cabernet Sauvignon with a modern touch. This full-bodied red is celebrated for its intensity, delivering powerful and fruity notes harmonized by balanced and smooth tannins.
wines.nose: An intense nose reveals aromas of blackcurrant, blackberry, and hints of cedar and tobacco, with pleasant black fruit notes that are both powerful and elegant
wines.palate: Full-bodied with a firm structure, it offers flavors of dark berries, cassis, and juicy notes of blackberry and prunes, complemented by refreshing acidity and very smooth tannins, along with a touch of oak and spice
wines.appearance: Intense ruby red

wines.name: Petal & Stem Sauvignon Blanc
wines.description: Petal & Stem Sauvignon Blanc is a crisp and refreshing white wine that showcases the classic characteristics of this popular grape varietal, known for its herbaceous and fruity profile.
wines.nose: Aromatic nose with notes of citrus fruits like lemon and lime, complemented by green apple and hints of freshly cut grass and herbs
wines.palate: Light-bodied and zesty on the palate, with flavors of grapefruit, green apple, and a touch of tropical fruits. The finish is clean with a refreshing minerality
wines.appearance: Pale straw color with greenish hues

wines.name: Clearwater Cove Sauvignon Blanc
wines.description: Clearwater Cove Sauvignon Blanc is a vibrant white wine that highlights the fresh and zesty characteristics of the Sauvignon Blanc grape.
wines.nose: Fresh and lively nose with aromas of gooseberry passionfruit and grassy notes intertwined with hints of citrus and green apple
wines.palate: Crisp and refreshing on the palate with flavors of tropical fruits citrus and a touch of minerality. The wine has a balanced acidity and a clean finish
wines.appearance: A pale straw color with greenish highlights

wines.name: Astoria Moscato Rosé Sweet Sparkling
wines.description: Astoria Sparkling Moscato Rosé is a delightful and refined sparkling wine, blending the aromatic sweetness of Moscato with the elegant character of a rosé. Crafted from aromatic grapes grown on the Val del Brun Estate, it offers an unmistakably festive and refreshing experience, perfect for sophisticated celebrations…
wines.nose: Characteristic notes of Moscato, with strong and delicate peach, hints of strawberry, sage, fresh raspberries, violets, roses, and lychee
wines.palate: Intensely aromatic and lively on the palate, offering a balanced sweetness with flavors of red berries, peach, tropical fruits, and a hint of honey, all lifted by a crisp acidity and fine, persistent bubbles
